-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetGloryPointInfo]
	@nCharId				INT,
	@nGloryPoint			INT,
	@nTodayGloryPoint		INT,
	@nThisWeekGloryPoint	INT,
	@nLastWeekGloryPoint	INT
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	-- Update user_gp table
	IF EXISTS (SELECT glory_point FROM user_gp_data WHERE char_id=@nCharId)
	BEGIN
		UPDATE user_gp_data SET glory_point = @nGloryPoint WHERE char_id=@nCharId
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		-- table에 추가하는 경우는 gp값이 0 이상인 경우로 한정.
		IF (@nGloryPoint > 0)
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO user_gp_data (char_id, glory_point, ownership_bonus_gp) VALUES (@nCharId, @nGloryPoint, 0)
		END
	END

	-- Update user_data table			
	UPDATE user_data SET today_glory_point=@nTodayGloryPoint, this_week_glory_point=@nThisWeekGloryPoint, last_week_glory_point=@nLastWeekGloryPoint WHERE char_id=@nCharId

	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

procedures.GM_UserRateDA_SrchByCharID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserRateDA_SrchByCharID]
	@char_id	int
AS
BEGIN

	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	set ansi_warnings off

	SELECT	r.rate_rank, r.rate_id, r.mu, r.sigma, r.update_cnt,
			u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name, u.race, u.class, u.guild_id, u.gender, u.lev,
			g.name as 'guild_nm'
	FROM	
	(
		SELECT	RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY rate_id ORDER BY mu DESC, sigma) AS 'rate_rank', rate_id, mu, sigma, update_cnt, char_id
		FROM	user_rate
	) r
	JOIN	user_data u	ON u.char_id = r.char_id
	LEFT JOIN	guild g	ON g.id = u.guild_id
	WHERE	u.char_id = @char_id
	
END

procedures.GM_UserEmotionDAO_InsertUpdateEmotions:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_UserEmotionDAO_InsertUpdateEmotions]
	@char_id		int,
	@emotion_type	smallint,
	@expire_date	int
AS
BEGIN

	IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT TOP 1 char_id FROM user_emotion (UPDLOCK) WHERE char_id = @char_id AND emotion_type = @emotion_type )
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO user_emotion
		(
			char_id,
			emotion_type,
			expire_date
		)
		VALUES
		(
			@char_id,
			@emotion_type,
			@expire_date
		)
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		UPDATE	user_emotion
		SET		expire_date = @expire_date
		WHERE	char_id = @char_id
		AND		emotion_type = @emotion_type
			
	END

	RETURN @@ROWCOUNT

END

procedures.GM_UserRateDA_SrchUserList_del:
create proc  [dbo].[GM_UserRateDA_SrchUserList_del]
	@rate_id	int,
	@cvs_class	varchar(100),
	@rank_from	int		= 1,
	@rank_to	int
AS
/*
	EXEC GM_UserRateDA_SrchUserList @rate_id=111, @cvs_class='0,1,2,3,4,5', @rank_from=1, @rank_to=100
	EXEC GM_UserRateDA_SrchUserList @rate_id=111, @cvs_class='0,1,2,3,4,5', @rank_from=3, @rank_to=10
*/
BEGIN

	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	--set ansi_warnings off	-- 사용하면 안됨(xml)

	DECLARE	@xml XML
	SET		@xml = CONVERT(xml, '<c>'+REPLACE(@cvs_class, ',', '</c><c>')+'</c>')

	SELECT	top (@rank_to - @rank_from + 1) r.id, r.mu, r.sigma,
			u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name, u.race, u.class, u.guild_id,
			g.id as 'guild_id', g.name as 'guild_name'
	FROM	user_rate r
	JOIN	user_data u	ON u.char_id = r.char_id
	LEFT JOIN	guild g	ON g.id = u.guild_id
	WHERE	r.rate_id = @rate_id
	AND		u.class IN (SELECT n.value('.', 'tinyint') as class from @xml.nodes('c') as c(n))
	AND		r.id NOT IN (
			SELECT	top (@rank_from - 1) r2.id 
			FROM	user_rate r2
			JOIN	user_data u2 ON u2.char_id = r2.char_id
			WHERE	r2.rate_id = @rate_id
			AND		u2.class IN (SELECT n.value('.', 'tinyint') as class from @xml.nodes('c') as c(n))
			ORDER BY mu DESC, sigma
	)
	ORDER BY mu DESC, sigma DESC
	
END
procedures.aion_GetUserIsBlock:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetUserIsBlock] 
	@charId int,
	@targetname nvarchar(50),
	@targetId int output,
	@isblock int output, 
	@optionflag int output
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	set @targetId = 0
	select @targetId = isnull(char_id,0) from user_data with (nolock) where user_id = @targetname and delete_complete_date=0 and race = (select race from user_data with(nolock) where char_id = @charId)
	set @isblock = 0
	set @optionflag = 0
	
	if @targetId is not null and @targetId != 0	
	begin
		-- Insert statements for procedure here
		if exists (SELECT block_id from user_block with(nolock) where char_id = @targetId and block_id = @charId)
			set @isblock = 1
		else
			set @isblock = 0
		select @optionflag = isnull(optionflags,0) from user_data (nolock) where char_id = @targetid
	end		
	return
END

procedures.aion_DeleteEventItem:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_DeleteEventItem]
	@itemid 		bigint
as
set nocount on

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'aionDeletedEventItemCount')
BEGIN
	CREATE TABLE [dbo].[aionDeletedEventItemCount](
		[delete_id] [int] NOT NULL,
		[char_id] [int] NOT NULL,
		[item_count] [bigint] NOT NULL,
		[apply_date] [datetime] NOT NULL,
		[event_item] [bigint] NOT NULL
	)
END

declare @currTime datetime

set @currTime = GETDATE()
	
insert into aionDeletedEventItemCount (char_id, item_count, apply_date, event_item)
select user_item.char_id, sum(amount) as item_count, @currTime, @itemid
from user_item
where user_item.name_id = @itemid and (warehouse = 0 or warehouse = 1 OR (warehouse >= 30 AND warehouse < 50))
group by user_item.char_id 

UPDATE user_item
SET warehouse=10, update_date=@currTime
WHERE name_id=@itemid

select *
from aionDeletedEventItemCount
where apply_date = @currTime

set nocount off
procedures.GM_UserRateDA_SrchUserListByRank:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserRateDA_SrchUserListByRank]
			@rate_id	int,
			@cvs_class	varchar(100),
			@rank_from	int		= 1,
			@rank_to	int
		AS
		BEGIN

			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off

			DECLARE	@sql varchar(4000)
			SET		@sql = '
			SELECT	x.*, g.name as ''guild_nm''
			FROM	(
				SELECT	RANK() OVER (ORDER BY r.mu DESC, r.sigma) AS rate_rank, r.rate_id, r.mu, r.sigma, r.update_cnt,
						u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name, u.race, u.class, u.guild_id, u.gender, u.lev
				FROM	user_rate r (nolock)
				JOIN	user_data u (nolock)	ON u.char_id = r.char_id and u.delete_complete_date = 0
				WHERE	r.rate_id = ' + convert(varchar, @rate_id)

			-- 직업조건
			IF (ISNULL(@cvs_class, 'null') <> 'null')
			BEGIN
				SET	@sql = @sql + '
				AND		u.class IN (' + @cvs_class + ') '
			END

			SET		@sql = @sql + '
			) x
			LEFT JOIN	guild g (nolock)	ON g.id = x.guild_id
			WHERE ' + convert(varchar, @rank_from) + '<= rate_rank AND rate_rank <=' + convert(varchar, @rank_to) + '
			ORDER BY rate_rank'

			EXEC (@sql)
			
		END

procedures.GM_UserRecoveryInfoDAO_Insert:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserRecoveryInfoDAO_Insert]
			@char_id int
			,@recovery_status tinyint
			,@returnValue INT OUTPUT
		as

set nocount on

DECLARE @error INT
DECLARE @rowCount INT

SET @returnValue = 0

if EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_recovery_info (UPDLOCK) WHERE char_id=@char_id) 
	begin
		UPDATE user_recovery_info
		SET recovery_status = @recovery_status
		WHERE char_id=@char_id
	end
else
	begin
		INSERT into user_recovery_info(char_id, recovery_status)
		VALUES (@char_id, @recovery_status)
	end

SELECT @error = @@ERROR, @rowCount = @@ROWCOUNT
IF @error <> 0 OR @rowCount < 1
	RETURN

SET @returnValue = 1
RETURN

set nocount off

procedures.aion_PutItemCompoundedTwoHand_20121105:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_PutItemCompoundedTwoHand_20121105]
	@dbId       bigint,
	@main_item_dbid bigint,
	@nWarehouse	int
as
set nocount on

declare @ret int

update user_item 
set warehouse = @nWarehouse,  main_item_dbid = @main_item_dbid, update_date=GETDATE()
where id = @dbId and warehouse != 17   /* 17은 합성제거된 아이템,  합성제거된 아이템이 다시 합성되지는 않음 */

set @ret = @@ROWCOUNT

declare @charid int

if NOT EXISTS (select id  from user_item_option where id = @dbId) 
begin
	select @charid = char_id from user_item where id = @dbId
	insert into user_item_option (id, char_id) values (@dbId, @charid)
end

set nocount off
IF @@ERROR <> 0
	return @ret
	
set @dbId = @@IDENTITY

return @ret
procedures.GM_UserResetName_Srch:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserResetName_Srch]
			@top_count	int,
			@page_num	int,
			@user_id	nvarchar(20),
			@account_id	int
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off

			if (@account_id != 0)
			begin
				-- account_id search
				select top (@top_count) account_id, char_id, char_name_old as user_id
				from	reset_charname_list (nolock)
				where	account_id = @account_id
				order by char_name_old

				select count(*) as total from reset_charname_list (nolock)
				where	account_id = @account_id
			end
			else if (ISNULL(@user_id, '') <> '')
			begin
				-- user_id search
				select top (@top_count) account_id, char_id, char_name_old as user_id
				from	reset_charname_list (nolock)
				where	char_id not in (
					select top (@top_count * (@page_num-1)) char_id from reset_charname_list (nolock)
					where	char_name_old like @user_id + '%'
					order	by char_name_old
				)
				and char_name_old like @user_id + '%'

				order by char_name_old

				select count(*) as total from reset_charname_list (nolock) where char_name_old like @user_id + '%'
			end
			else
			begin
				-- search all
				select top (@top_count) account_id, char_id, char_name_old as user_id
				from	reset_charname_list (nolock)
				where	char_id not in (
					select top (@top_count * (@page_num-1)) char_id 
					from	reset_charname_list (nolock) 
					order	by char_name_old
				)
				order by char_name_old

				select count(*) as total from reset_charname_list (nolock)

			end

procedures.aion_UpdateOldUserOfLowlevelToDelete:
-- 저레벨 캐릭터가 오랫동안 로그인 안 한 경우 delete_date 컬럼을 현재 시간으로 업데이트
-- 이후 캐릭터의 정보 삭제는 캐시서버에서 처리됨
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_UpdateOldUserOfLowlevelToDelete]
	@check_days int,
	@low_level	int
AS
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'temp_user_id_object_to_del$')
		DROP TABLE temp_user_id_object_to_del$

	BEGIN TRAN

	DECLARE		@sql		nvarchar(4000)
	SET @sql = 'SELECT char_id INTO temp_user_id_object_to_del$ FROM user_data WHERE delete_date = 0 AND delete_complete_date = 0 AND dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(last_logout_time, 0) + ' + CAST((3600*24*@check_days) AS nvarchar(20)) + '< dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0) AND lev < ' + CAST(@low_level AS nvarchar(20)) 
	PRINT @sql
	EXEC sp_executesql @sql

	UPDATE user_data SET delete_date = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0), delete_complete_date = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0) where char_id in (select char_id from temp_user_id_object_to_del$)

	COMMIT TRAN

END

CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_DeleteGuildMemberAll]

as  
set nocount on  

UPDATE dbo.user_data  
	SET guild_id=0, guild_rank=0, guild_intro='',guild_update_date = GetDate()
    FROM 
     (
         SELECT guild_id,char_id FROM dbo.user_data  with(nolock)

procedures.get_accountid:
CREATE proc [dbo].[get_accountid]
@inuserid nvarchar(20),
@charid int output,
@accountid int output,
@result int output
as
select top 1 @charid=char_id,@accountid=account_id from dbo.user_data with(nolock)
where user_id=@inuserid and delete_complete_date=0
--Result:0,角色ID，角色帐号ID存在，1,角色ID，角色帐号ID不存在, -1,其他错误
if(@@ROWCOUNT=1)
    BEGIN
        SET @result=0
        RETURN  
    END
else
    BEGIN 
         set @result=1
         RETURN
    END

if @@ERROR<>0
   BEGIN
        set @result=-1
        RETURN
   END

procedures.get_charid:
CREATE proc [dbo].[get_charid]
@charid int,
@accountid int output,
@result int output
as
select top 1 @accountid=account_id from dbo.user_data with(nolock)
where char_id=@charid
--Result:0,角色帐号ID存在，1,角色帐号ID不存在, -1,其他错误
if(@@ROWCOUNT=1)
    BEGIN
        SET @result=0
        RETURN  
    END
else
    BEGIN 
         set @result=1
         RETURN
    END

if @@ERROR<>0
   BEGIN
        set @result=-1
        RETURN
   END

procedures.get_constraint_name:
create procedure [dbo].[get_constraint_name] 
	@table nvarchar(100),
	@column nvarchar(100),
	@oldName nvarchar(250) output
as 
begin 	
	
	select 
		@oldName = default_constraints.name
	from sys.all_columns
		inner join
		sys.tables on all_columns.object_id = tables.object_id
		inner join 
		sys.schemas on tables.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
		inner join 
		sys.default_constraints on all_columns.default_object_id = default_constraints.object_id
	where schemas.name = 'dbo' and tables.name = @table and all_columns.name = @column			
end

procedures.GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyss:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyss]
		as
		set nocount on
		set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	a.abyss_id, a.owner_guild, a.owner_race, a.defense_count, a.reward, a.cur_pvp_status, a.next_pvp_status, a.door_upgrade_point, a.shield_upgrade_point, a.peace_count
					, ISNULL(g.name, '') as name, ISNULL(g.point, 0) as point, ISNULL(g.fund, 0) as fund, ISNULL(g.master_id, '') as master_id
					, ISNULL(u.user_id, '') as user_id
					, a.owner_char_id, a.last_ownership_bonus_gp
					-- [4.71] 그랜드어비스, 연속점령제한
					, a.owner_server , a.occupy_count, a.occupy_point, a.occupy_bonus
					-- [5.3] 어비스 수호령 관련 각 종족 연속 점령 횟수
					, a.occupy_reward_count_l, a.occupy_reward_count_d
			FROM	abyss a
			LEFT JOIN guild g on a.owner_guild = g.id
			LEFT JOIN user_data u on g.master_id = u.char_id
			ORDER BY a.abyss_id ASC
procedures.aion_DeleteItemByDate_20111227:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_DeleteItemByDate_20111227]
	@date INT,
	@warehouse INT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

-- 삭제된 지 @date일이 지난 @warehouse의 아이템을 실제로 제거한다.

-- DECLARE @curdate DATETIME
-- SET @curdate = GETDATE()
-- DELETE FROM user_item WHERE warehouse = @warehouse AND DATEDIFF(d, update_date, @curdate) > @date

DECLARE @deletedate DATETIME
SET @deletedate = DATEADD(d, -@date, GETDATE())

CREATE TABLE #deletedItem (
	[id] [int] NOT NULL
)

INSERT INTO #deletedItem with (tablock) SELECT ID from user_item where warehouse = @warehouse AND tid = 0 AND update_date < @deletedate

delete from user_item_option where ID in (select * from #deletedItem)
delete from user_item_charge where ID in (select * from #deletedItem)
Delete from user_item_polish where id in (select * from #deletedItem)
delete from user_item_attribute where id in (select * from #deleteditem)
DELETE FROM user_item WHERE ID in (select * from #deletedItem)

DROP TABLE #deletedItem


SET NOCOUNT OFF


/****** Object:  StoredProcedure [dbo].[aion_DeleteItem_20111227]    Script Date: 2014-03-14 오후 1:29:36 ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON

procedures.GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyssContributor:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyssContributor]
			@world_id nvarchar(5), 
			@abyss_id nvarchar(20),
			@srch_type nvarchar(1),
			@user_id nvarchar(30),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
				set nocount on
				set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

				declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @sql_where nvarchar(200)

				set @sql_where	= ''
				IF (@user_id != 'null')
				BEGIN
					IF @srch_type = '1'
						set @sql_where = @sql_where + ' and user_id = N'''+@user_id+''''
					ELSE
						set @sql_where = @sql_where + ' and owner_rank = '''+@user_id+''''
				END

				set @sql =  'select top('+@view_count+') ' +
							'		a.*,' +
							'		isnull(u.delete_type, 0) as delete_type, isnull(u.delete_complete_date, 0) as delete_complete_date, isnull(u.delete_date, 0) as delete_date, isnull(u.char_id, a.owner_char_id) as char_id, isnull(u.user_id, 0) as user_id,' +
							'		isnull(u.account_id, 0) as account_id, isnull(u.account_name, 0) as account_name, isnull(u.org_server, a.owner_server_id) as org_server, isnull(u.cur_server, 0) as cur_server,' +
							'		isnull(u.org_server, 0) as login_server, convert(nvarchar,isnull(u.create_date, ''1970-01-01''), 20) as create_date,' +
							'		convert(char, isnull(u.gender, 0)) as gender, convert(char, isnull(u.race, 0)) as race, convert(char, isnull(u.class, 0)) as class,' +
							'		convert(char, isnull(u.lev, 0)) as lev, convert(char, isnull(u.builder, 0)) as builder, isnull(u.world, 0) as world,' +
							'		case ' +
							'			WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time and u.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and u.last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
							'			WHEN u.last_login_time != u.last_logout_time or u.last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +
							'			WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time and u.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
							'			ELSE ''silver'' ' +
							'		end as logonoff ' +
							' from abyss_user_owner a(nolock) ' +
							' left join user_data u(nolock) on a.owner_char_id=u.char_id and u.delete_type != ''10000'' and u.org_server=' + CONVERT(varchar, @world_id) +
							' where	abyss_id=''' + @abyss_id + ''' ' +
							' and	owner_char_id^update_time not in (' +
							'	select top('+@top_count+') owner_char_id^update_time ' +
							'	from abyss_user_owner a2(nolock) ' +
							'	left join user_data u2(nolock) on a2.owner_char_id=u2.char_id and u2.delete_type != ''10000'' and u2.org_server=' + CONVERT(varchar, @world_id) +
							'	where	abyss_id=''' + @abyss_id + ''' ' + @sql_where +
							'	order by a2.update_time desc, a2.owner_rank, a2.owner_siegepoint)'
				set @sql = @sql + @sql_where
				set @sql = @sql + ' order by a.update_time desc, a.owner_rank, a.owner_siegepoint'

				exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetGuildJoinApplicantJoinInfo]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@nCharId	int,
	@nGuildId	int,
	@type int 
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @utc_adjust BIGINT
	SET @utc_adjust = dbo.GetUtcAdjustSecWithUTC_Local(GetUTCDate(), GetDate())
	
	if EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_guild_join_application WHERE char_id = @nCharId and guild_id = @nGuildId)
	begin
		if @type = 0
		begin
			SELECT user_id, class, gender, lev, world, dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(last_logout_time, @utc_adjust) AS last_logout_time, a.race, 0, ISNULL(b.id, -1), isnull(permission,0) FROM user_data a WITH(NOLOCK) left join house_instant b WITH(NOLOCK)  on a.char_id = b.id and b.state<>6 WHERE a.char_id = @nCharId and a.guild_id = 0 and a.delete_complete_date = 0 
		end
		else if @type = 1
		begin
			SELECT user_id, class, gender, lev, world, dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(last_logout_time, @utc_adjust) AS last_logout_time, a.race, b.id, b.addr_id, ISNULL(permission, 0) FROM user_data a WITH(NOLOCK), house_field b WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE a.char_id = @nCharId and a.guild_id = 0 and a.delete_complete_date = 0 and a.char_id = b.owner_id AND b.owner_type = 2
		end
	end
END
procedures.GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyssDefenderAbnormal:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyssDefenderAbnormal]
	@abyss_id			int,
	@tick_from			int,
	@tick_to			int,
	@valid_siege_point	int,	-- @valid_siege_point = 200, (max) = 240
	@invalid_char_count	int,
	@normal_rank_to		int,
	@normal_count_to	int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON
	SET	TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED

	SELECT	top 100 r.update_time, r.abyss_id, 
			--dateadd(second, r.update_time, '1970-01-01') as 'update_time2', -- test
			c.contributer_total, 
			r.defender_share_amount, r.defender_rank, r.defender_siegepoint, r.group_id,
			u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name,
			u.race, u.class, convert(char,u.gender) as gender,
			isnull(u.login_server, u.org_server) login_server, u.org_server, u.cur_server, u.world, u.lev, u.builder, convert(varchar(20),u.create_date, 120) as 'create_date', 
			u.delete_type, u.delete_complete_date, u.delete_date,
			CASE WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time THEN 'on'
				WHEN u.last_login_time != u.last_logout_time THEN 'off' END as 'logonoff'
	FROM	abyss_user_defender r	-- [1]reward
	JOIN	user_data u				-- [2]user info
			ON	r.defender_char_id = u.char_id
	JOIN(
			SELECT	abyss_id ,update_time
			FROM	abyss_user_defender
			WHERE	abyss_id = @abyss_id AND @tick_from <= update_time AND update_time <= @tick_to
			AND		defender_rank = 1 AND defender_share_amount <= @valid_siege_point
			GROUP BY abyss_id, update_time
			HAVING	@invalid_char_count <= count(defender_char_id)	-- 랭크 1인데 공훈도가 @valid_siege_point 이하인 캐릭터수가 @invalid_char_count 이상
			UNION
			SELECT	abyss_id ,update_time
			FROM	abyss_user_defender
			WHERE	abyss_id = @abyss_id AND @tick_from <= update_time AND update_time <= @tick_to
			AND		defender_rank <= @normal_rank_to
			GROUP BY abyss_id, update_time
			HAVING	count(defender_char_id) < @normal_count_to		-- 랭크 1 ~ @normal_rank_to의  포상자수가 @normal_count_to에 미달
			) s		-- [3]abnormal siege
			ON	s.abyss_id = r.abyss_id AND s.update_time = r.update_time
	JOIN(
			SELECT	abyss_id, update_time, count(abyss_id) as 'contributer_total'
			FROM	abyss_user_defender
			GROUP BY abyss_id, update_time
			) c		-- [4]contributer total count
			ON	c.abyss_id = s.abyss_id AND c.update_time = s.update_time
	ORDER BY u.char_id, r.abyss_id, r.update_time desc
	
END

	@nWarehouse	int
as

	set @ret = @@ROWCOUNT

procedures.GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyssInfoByID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AbyssDA_SrchAbyssInfoByID]
			@abyss_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			SELECT	a.abyss_id, a.owner_guild, a.owner_race, a.defense_count, a.reward, a.cur_pvp_status, a.next_pvp_status, a.door_upgrade_point, a.shield_upgrade_point, a.peace_count
					, ISNULL(g.name, '') as name, ISNULL(g.point, 0) as point, ISNULL(g.fund, 0) as fund, ISNULL(g.master_id, '') as master_id
					, ISNULL(u.user_id, '') as user_id
					, a.owner_char_id, a.last_ownership_bonus_gp
					-- [4.71] 그랜드어비스, 연속점령제한
					, a.owner_server , a.occupy_count, a.occupy_point, a.occupy_bonus
					-- [5.3] 어비스 수호령 관련 각 종족 연속 점령 횟수
					, a.occupy_reward_count_l, a.occupy_reward_count_d
			FROM	abyss a(nolock)
			LEFT JOIN guild g(nolock) on a.owner_guild = g.id
			LEFT JOIN user_data u(nolock) on g.master_id = u.char_id
			WHERE	a.abyss_id = @abyss_id

procedures.GM_UserUseditemOnTradingDAO_UpdateStatus:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[GM_UserUseditemOnTradingDAO_UpdateStatusForBuyRecovery]
	@char_id	int,
	@name_id	int,
	@status		tinyint
as
update user_useditem_ontrading set status=@status
where used_id=(
select top 1 target_item.used_id from (
select ROW_NUMBER() over (PARTITION BY uuo.used_id order by ui.create_date desc) rnk, uuo.used_id
from user_item ui join user_useditem_ontrading uuo on ui.name_id=uuo.tradeitemid
where ui.char_id=uuo.char_id
and ui.char_id=@char_id
and name_id=@name_id
and trade_type=1
and status=0
and DATEDIFF(SECOND, ui.create_date, uuo.regdate) between -1 and 2
) target_item
where target_item.rnk = 1
order by target_item.used_id desc)
procedures.aion_GetGuildList:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetGuildList]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@nType tinyint, 
	@strSearchString nvarchar(32)
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	
	if @nType = 0		
	begin
	SELECT aa.id, aa.name, bb.user_id, aa.level, aa.memberCount, aa.intro, aa.join_process_type, aa.join_restrict_level FROM
		(
			(SELECT a.id, a.name, a.master_id, a.level, b.memberCount, a.join_process_type, a.join_restrict_level, a.intro, a.point FROM
				(
				(SELECT TOP 50 id, name, master_id, level, join_process_type, join_restrict_level, intro, point  FROM guild WITH(NOLOCK) ORDER BY point DESC) a
				JOIN
				(SELECT COUNT(char_id) as memberCount, guild_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0 GROUP BY guild_id) b
				ON a.id = b.guild_id
				)
			) aa
			JOIN
			(SELECT char_id, user_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0) bb
			ON aa.master_id = bb.char_id
		) ORDER BY aa.point DESC
	end
	else if @nType = 1
	begin
	SELECT aa.id, aa.name, bb.user_id, aa.level, aa.memberCount, aa.intro, aa.join_process_type, aa.join_restrict_level FROM
		(
			(SELECT a.id, a.name, a.master_id, a.level, b.memberCount, a.join_process_type, a.join_restrict_level, a.intro FROM
				(
				(SELECT TOP 50 id, name, master_id, level, join_process_type, join_restrict_level, intro  FROM guild WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE name LIKE '%'+@strSearchString+'%' ORDER BY LEN(name)) a
				JOIN
				(SELECT COUNT(char_id) as memberCount, guild_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0 GROUP BY guild_id) b
				ON a.id = b.guild_id
				)
			) aa
			JOIN
			(SELECT char_id, user_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0) bb
			ON aa.master_id = bb.char_id
		) ORDER BY LEN(aa.name)
	end
	else if @nType = 2
	begin
	SELECT aa.id, aa.name, bb.user_id, aa.level, aa.memberCount, aa.intro, aa.join_process_type, aa.join_restrict_level FROM
		(
			(SELECT a.id, a.name, a.master_id, a.level, b.memberCount, a.join_process_type, a.join_restrict_level, a.intro FROM
				(
				(SELECT TOP 50 id, name, master_id, level, join_process_type, join_restrict_level, intro FROM guild WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE intro LIKE '%'+@strSearchString+'%') a
				JOIN
				(SELECT COUNT(char_id) as memberCount, guild_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0 GROUP BY guild_id) b
				ON a.id = b.guild_id
				)
			) aa
			JOIN
			(SELECT char_id, user_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0) bb
			ON aa.master_id = bb.char_id
		)
	end
END

				(
				(SELECT TOP 50 id, name, master_id, level, join_process_type, join_restrict_level, intro  FROM guild WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE race = @nRace and name LIKE '%'+@strSearchString+'%' ORDER BY LEN(name)) a
				JOIN
				(SELECT COUNT(char_id) as memberCount, guild_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0 GROUP BY guild_id) b
				ON a.id = b.guild_id
				)
			) aa
			JOIN
			(SELECT char_id, user_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0) bb
			ON aa.master_id = bb.char_id
		) ORDER BY LEN(aa.name)
	end
	else if @nType = 2
	begin
	SELECT aa.id, aa.name, bb.user_id, aa.level, aa.memberCount, aa.intro, aa.join_process_type, aa.join_restrict_level FROM
		(
			(SELECT a.id, a.name, a.master_id, a.level, b.memberCount, a.join_process_type, a.join_restrict_level, a.intro FROM
				(
				(SELECT TOP 50 id, name, master_id, level, join_process_type, join_restrict_level, intro FROM guild WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE race = @nRace and intro LIKE '%'+@strSearchString+'%') a
				JOIN
				(SELECT COUNT(char_id) as memberCount, guild_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0 GROUP BY guild_id) b
				ON a.id = b.guild_id
				)
			) aa
			JOIN
			(SELECT char_id, user_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE guild_id != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0) bb
			ON aa.master_id = bb.char_id
		)
	end
END

procedures.aion_DeleteLegacyTables:
-- legacy table 로 옮겨진 데이터들 영구적으로 삭제
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_DeleteLegacyTables]
	@log_id			bigint
AS
BEGIN

	BEGIN TRAN

	DECLARE	   @table_name	nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE		@sql		nvarchar(4000)

	DECLARE cur_item CURSOR
	FOR
	SELECT table_name FROM legacy_table_list WHERE log_id = @log_id 
	
	OPEN cur_item
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @table_name

	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = @table_name)
		BEGIN 
			SET @sql = 'DROP TABLE ' + @table_name
			PRINT @sql
			EXEC sp_executesql @sql
		END
		
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @table_name
	END
	CLOSE		cur_item
	DEALLOCATE	cur_item	
	
	DELETE FROM legacy_table_list WHERE log_id = @log_id
	
	--DELETE FROM legacy_log where id = @log_id
	
	COMMIT TRAN
	
END

procedures.aion_GetVendorItemListAllDark:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetVendorItemListAllDark]
	@warehouse	TINYINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
SELECT vendor_item_dark.id, user_item.name_id, vendor_item_dark.sale_price, 
	vendor_item_dark.user_price, vendor_item_dark.commit_amount, 
	vendor_item_dark.commit_date,	vendor_item_dark.remain_amount,  
	user_item.id,  user_data.char_id, user_data.user_id,
	isnull(user_item_option.soul_bound,0), isnull(user_item_option.enchant_count,0), isnull(user_item_option.skin_name_id,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name0,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name1,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),		
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.vanish_point,0),	
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.option_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.keyNameId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0)
FROM	vendor_item_dark INNER JOIN
	user_item ON vendor_item_dark.user_item_id = user_item.id left JOIN 
	user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id inner join
	user_data ON vendor_item_dark.char_id = user_data.char_id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse)
procedures.GM_UserItem_SrchItemByType:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItem_SrchItemByType]
			@item_name_id		nvarchar(2000),
			@enchant_count_from	nvarchar(30),
			@enchant_count_to	nvarchar(30),
			@amount_from		nvarchar(30),
			@amount_to			nvarchar(30),
			@dbid_from			nvarchar(30),
			@dbid_to			nvarchar(30),
			@multi_user_ids		nvarchar(1000),
			@view_count			nvarchar(6),
			@top_count			nvarchar(6),
			@authorize_count_from	nvarchar(30) = 'null',
			@authorize_count_to		nvarchar(30) = 'null'
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000)
			
			set @sql =  ' SELECT TOP ' + @view_count +
						-- user_item
						'		i.tid, i.expired_time, i.buy_amount, i.buy_duration, i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, i.amount, i.slot_id, i.slot, i.warehouse, convert(nvarchar,i.create_date,21 ) create_date, convert(nvarchar,i.update_date,21 ) update_date, i.producer ' +
						-- user_data
						'		, u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name ' +
						-- user_item_option
						'		, o.soul_bound, o.enchant_count, o.skin_name_id, o.stat_enchant_name0, o.stat_enchant_name1, o.stat_enchant_name2, o.stat_enchant_name3, o.stat_enchant_name4, o.stat_enchant_name5, o.option_count, o.dye_info, o.proc_tool_nameid, o.obtain_skin_type, o.expire_skin_time, o.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o.random_option,0) AS random_option ' +
						'		, ISNULL(o.limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(o.reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count ' +
						'		, ISNULL(f.freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
						'		, ISNULL(o.authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(o.vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
						-- 4.5 17차 깃털
						'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
						-- [4.71] 모조신석
						'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
						-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
						'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
						-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
						'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
						'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
						'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown' +
						'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId' +
						-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
						' FROM	user_item i (nolock) ' +
						' JOIN	user_data u (nolock) on i.char_id = u.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) on i.id = o.id and i.char_id = o.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id ' +
						' WHERE	u.delete_complete_date = 0 ' +
						' AND	(i.warehouse IN (0, 1, 3, 4, 5) or (i.warehouse between 30 and 49) or (i.warehouse between 60 and 79)) '
			
			IF @multi_user_ids != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql	+ 
						' AND ('+@multi_user_ids+') '
			END
			
			IF @item_name_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND ('+@item_name_id+' ) '
			END 
			
			IF @enchant_count_from != 'null' AND @enchant_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND o.enchant_count >= '''+@enchant_count_from+''' and o.enchant_count <= '''+@enchant_count_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @amount_from != 'null' AND @amount_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND i.amount >= '''+@amount_from+''' and i.amount <= '''+@amount_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @dbid_from != 'null' AND @dbid_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND i.id >= '''+@dbid_from+''' and i.id <= '''+@dbid_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @authorize_count_from != 'null' AND @authorize_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND o.authorize_count >= '''+@authorize_count_from+''' and o.authorize_count <= '''+@authorize_count_to+''' '
			END
			
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND i.id not in (' + 
							' SELECT top ' + @top_count + ' i.id ' +
							' FROM	user_item i(nolock), user_data u(nolock) ' +
							' WHERE	delete_complete_date = 0 and i.char_id = u.char_id ' +
							' AND	(i.warehouse in (0, 1, 3, 4, 5) or (i.warehouse between 30 and 49) or (i.warehouse between 60 and 79))' 
			
			IF @multi_user_ids != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND ('+@multi_user_ids+') '
			END
			
			IF @item_name_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND ('+@item_name_id+' ) '
			END
			
			IF @enchant_count_from != 'null' AND @enchant_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND o.enchant_count >= '''+@enchant_count_from+''' and o.enchant_count <= '''+@enchant_count_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @amount_from != 'null' AND @amount_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND i.amount >= '''+@amount_from+''' and i.amount <= '''+@amount_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @dbid_from != 'null' AND @dbid_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql +
							' AND i.id >= '''+@dbid_from+''' and i.id <= '''+@dbid_to+''' '
			END
						
			IF @authorize_count_from != 'null' AND @authorize_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND o.authorize_count >= '''+@authorize_count_from+''' and o.authorize_count <= '''+@authorize_count_to+''' '
			END
			
				set @sql = @sql + 
							' order by i.char_id asc' +
						') order by i.char_id asc '

			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

WHERE   (id NOT IN

procedures.aion_SetGuildOfflineChangeFlag:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_SetGuildOfflineChangeFlag    스크립트 날짜: 2006-02-20 오후 7:52:57 ******/



CREATE   proc [dbo].[aion_SetGuildOfflineChangeFlag]
	@nCharID		int,
	@nGuildOfflineChangeFlag smallint
as
set nocount on

IF @nGuildOfflineChangeFlag = 0
BEGIN
	UPDATE user_data
	SET guild_offline_change_flag=0,
		change_info_time = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0)
	WHERE char_id=@nCharId
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	UPDATE user_data
	SET guild_offline_change_flag |= @nGuildOfflineChangeFlag,
		change_info_time = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0)
	WHERE char_id=@nCharId
END
set nocount off
procedures.aion_PutSkill:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_PutSkill    스크립트 날짜: 2006-02-20 오후 7:52:57 ******/
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_PutSkill]
	@nCharId	int,
	@nSkillId		int,
	@nSkillData1	int,
	@nSkillData2	int
as
BEGIN TRANSACTION
set nocount on
if EXISTS (SELECT skill_id FROM user_skill(UPDLOCK) WHERE  char_id=@nCharId and skill_id=@nSkillId) 
begin
	UPDATE user_skill
	SET skill_data1 = @nSkillData1 , skill_data2 = @nSkillData2 
	WHERE char_id=@nCharId and skill_id=@nSkillId 
end
else
begin
	INSERT user_skill(char_id, skill_id, skill_data1, skill_data2) 
	VALUES (@nCharId, @nSkillId, @nSkillData1,@nSkillData2)	
end
set nocount off
COMMIT TRANSACTION

	ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0)

	user_item ON vendor_item_dark.user_item_id = user_item.id left JOIN 
	user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id inner join
	user_data ON vendor_item_dark.char_id = user_data.char_id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse)
SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.GM_UserItem_SrchItemCntByType:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItem_SrchItemCntByType]
			@item_name_id		nvarchar(1000),
			@enchant_count_from	nvarchar(30),
			@enchant_count_to	nvarchar(30),
			@amount_from		nvarchar(30),
			@amount_to			nvarchar(30),
			@dbid_from			nvarchar(30),
			@dbid_to			nvarchar(30),
			@authorize_count_from	nvarchar(30) = 'null',
			@authorize_count_to		nvarchar(30) = 'null'
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(2000)
			
			set @sql =	'SELECT i.name_id, sum(i.amount) amount_sum ' +
						' FROM	user_item i (nolock) ' +
						' JOIN	user_data u (nolock) on i.char_id = u.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN	user_item_option o (nolock) on i.id = o.id and i.char_id = o.char_id ' +
						' WHERE	u.delete_complete_date=0 ' +
						' AND	(i.warehouse in (0,1,3,4,5,6,7) OR (i.warehouse between 30 and 49) OR (i.warehouse between 60 and 79)) '
			
			IF (@item_name_id != 'null')
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND ('+@item_name_id+' ) '
			END
			
			IF (@enchant_count_from != 'null' AND @enchant_count_to != 'null')
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND o.enchant_count >= '''+@enchant_count_from+''' AND o.enchant_count <= '''+@enchant_count_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF (@amount_from != 'null' AND @amount_to != 'null')
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND i.amount >= '''+@amount_from+''' AND i.amount <= '''+@amount_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF (@dbid_from != 'null' AND @dbid_to != 'null')
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND i.id >= '''+@dbid_from+''' AND i.id <= '''+@dbid_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @authorize_count_from != 'null' AND @authorize_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + 
						' AND o.authorize_count >= '''+@authorize_count_from+''' and o.authorize_count <= '''+@authorize_count_to+''' '
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql + 
						' GROUP BY i.name_id '
		
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

	@nGuildId	int, 
	@type int 
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @utc_adjust BIGINT

	if @type = 0		
	begin

procedures.GM_WorldBotChannelInfoDA_SrchUserList:
CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_WorldBotChannelInfoDA_SrchUserList]
	@zone_id_from	int,
	@zone_id_to		int,
	@account_id		int,
	@char_id		int,
	@user_id		nvarchar(20)
AS
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	DECLARE @query nvarchar(2000)
	DECLARE @where nvarchar(500)
	
	SET @query = '
		SELECT	w.char_id, w.account_id, w.world_id as zone_id, u.user_id, u.org_server
		FROM	world_bot_channel_info w
		JOIN	user_data u on u.char_id = w.char_id '

	SET @where = '1 = 1'
	IF (@zone_id_from != 0)
	BEGIN
		SET	@where = @where + '
		AND	w.world_id >= ' + CONVERT(varchar, @zone_id_from)
	END
	IF (@zone_id_to != 0)
	BEGIN
		SET	@where = @where + '
		AND	w.world_id <= ' + CONVERT(varchar, @zone_id_to)
	END
	IF (@account_id != 0)
	BEGIN
		SET	@where = @where + '
		AND	w.account_id = ' + CONVERT(varchar, @account_id)
	END
	IF (@char_id != 0)
	BEGIN
		SET	@where = @where + '
		AND	w.char_id = ' + CONVERT(varchar, @char_id)
	END
	IF (@user_id != '')
	BEGIN
		SET	@where = @where + '
		AND	user_id = ''' + CONVERT(varchar, @user_id) + ''''
	END
	
	SET @query = @query + '
		WHERE ' + @where + '
		ORDER BY w.world_id, w.char_id DESC '
		
	PRINT @query
	EXEC (@query)

procedures.GM_AbyssRankingDA_SrchAbyssRankingList:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AbyssRankingDA_SrchAbyssRankingList]
			@race_type nvarchar(1),
			@user_id nvarchar(50),
			@view_count bigint,
			@top_count bigint,
			@from_date nvarchar(30),
			@to_date nvarchar(30),
			@world_id nvarchar(3)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(3000)
			
			set @sql =	' select * from (' +
						'	select top ' + CONVERT(varchar, @top_count + @view_count) + ' rank() over (order by update_time desc, abyss_ranking) as ''num''' +
						'			, t3.name, t2.best_abyss_rank, t1.guild_id, t1.abyss_ranking, t1.old_ranking, t1.lev, t1.class, t1.race, t1.abyss_point, t1.rank, t1.update_time, t1.rank_updatedate' +
						'			, t2.char_id, t2.user_id, t2.account_id, t2.account_name, t2.gender, t2.delete_date, t2.org_server, t2.cur_server,isnull(t2.login_server, t2.org_server) login_server' +
						'			, case	WHEN t2.last_login_time = t2.last_logout_time and t2.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and t2.last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
						'					WHEN t2.last_login_time != t2.last_logout_time or t2.last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +
						'					WHEN t2.last_login_time = t2.last_logout_time and t2.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
						'					end as logonoff ' +
						'			, ISNULL(t1.gp,0) as glory_point, ISNULL(gp.ownership_bonus_gp,0) as ownership_bonus_gp ' +
						'	from	abyss_ranking t1(nolock) ' +
						'	left outer join guild t3(nolock) on t1.guild_id = t3.id ' +
						'	left outer join guild t4(nolock) on t1.guild_id = t4.id ' +
						'	left join user_gp_data gp(nolock) on t1.char_id = gp.char_id ' +
						'	left join user_data t2(nolock) on t1.char_id = t2.char_id ' +
						'	where	t1.update_time between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+''' ' +
						'	and		t2.org_server='''+@world_id+''' '
			
			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql +
						'	and		t2.user_id = N'''+@user_id+''''
			END 
			
			IF @race_type != '2'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql +
						'	and		t1.race = '''+@race_type+''''
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql + 
						'	order by update_time desc, abyss_ranking asc) x ' +
						' where num between ' + convert(varchar, @top_count + 1) + ' and ' + convert(varchar, @top_count + @view_count) +
						' order by update_time desc, abyss_ranking asc '

			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_PutSkillSkin]
	@char_id		int,
	@skill_skin_id	smallint,
	@expire_time	int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON

	if EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_skill_skin (UPDLOCK) WHERE char_id = @char_id AND skill_skin_id = @skill_skin_id) 
		begin
			UPDATE user_skill_skin SET use_skin = 0, expire_time = @expire_time, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE char_id = @char_id AND skill_skin_id = @skill_skin_id

		end

	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END
procedures.rename_constraint:
create procedure [dbo].[rename_constraint]
	@table nvarchar(100),
	@column nvarchar(100),
	@newName nvarchar(250)
as
begin
	declare @oldName varchar(250)
	exec get_constraint_name @table, @column, @oldName output
	print @oldName
	
	exec sp_rename @oldName, @newName, N'object'
	
	exec get_constraint_name @table, @column, @oldName output
	print @oldName
end

procedures.GM_AccessAllowAccountDA_SrchAll:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AccessAllowAccountDA_SrchAll]
	@view_count		int		= 10000000,
	@page			int		= 1,
	@status			int		= null
as
begin
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	if (@status is null)
	begin
		select	top (@view_count) access_id, account_id ,account_name, status, regdate
		from	access_allow_account (nolock)
		where	access_id not in (select top (@view_count*(@page-1)) access_id from access_allow_account (nolock) order by account_name)
		order by account_name
	end
	else
	begin
		select	top (@view_count) access_id, account_id ,account_name, status, regdate
		from	access_allow_account (nolock)
		where	access_id not in (select top (@view_count*(@page-1)) access_id from access_allow_account (nolock) order by account_name)
		and		status = @status
		order by account_name
	end

	set nocount off
end

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetVendorItemListAllDark_20160122]
	@warehouse	TINYINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
SELECT vendor_item_dark.id, user_item.name_id, vendor_item_dark.sale_price, 
	vendor_item_dark.user_price, vendor_item_dark.commit_amount, 
	vendor_item_dark.commit_date,	vendor_item_dark.remain_amount,
	vendor_item_dark.can_buy_partial,
	user_item.id,  user_data.char_id, user_data.user_id,
	isnull(user_item_option.soul_bound,0), isnull(user_item_option.enchant_count,0), isnull(user_item_option.skin_name_id,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name0,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name1,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),		
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.vanish_point,0),	
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.option_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.keyNameId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillGroup,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillLevel,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.equipLevelDown, 0)
FROM	vendor_item_dark INNER JOIN
	user_item ON vendor_item_dark.user_item_id = user_item.id left JOIN 
	user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id inner join
	user_data ON vendor_item_dark.char_id = user_data.char_id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse)
SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchAllAttributesOfItemByD:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchAllAttributesOfItemByDBID]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@db_id nvarchar(20),
			@sub_item_warehouse int
		as			
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	top 1 -- user_item (메인무기)
					i1.id, i1.char_id, i1.name_id, i1.slot_id, i1.amount, i1.slot, i1.warehouse, convert(nvarchar,i1.create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,i1.update_date,21 ) AS update_date, i1.producer, i1.tid, i1.expired_time, i1.buy_amount, i1.buy_duration, i1.main_item_dbid, i1.dynamic_property, i1.import_id, i1.export_id, i1.server_of_origin,
					-- user_item_option
					o1.soul_bound, o1.enchant_count, o1.skin_name_id, o1.stat_enchant_name0, o1.stat_enchant_name1, o1.stat_enchant_name2, o1.stat_enchant_name3, o1.stat_enchant_name4, o1.stat_enchant_name5, o1.option_count, o1.dye_info, o1.proc_tool_nameid, o1.obtain_skin_type, o1.expire_skin_time, o1.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o1.random_option,0) AS random_option,
					ISNULL(o1.limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(o1.reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count,
					-- user_item (보조무기)

					ISNULL(i2.id, 0) as 'sub_id', ISNULL(i2.name_id, 0) as 'sub_name_id', ISNULL(i2.amount, 0) as sub_amount, 
					-- user_item_option
					ISNULL(o2.enchant_count,0) AS sub_enchant_count, ISNULL(o2.skin_name_id,0) AS sub_skin_name_id, 
					ISNULL(o2.stat_enchant_name0,0) AS sub_stat_enchant_name0, ISNULL(o2.stat_enchant_name1,0) AS sub_stat_enchant_name1, ISNULL(o2.stat_enchant_name2,0) AS sub_stat_enchant_name2, ISNULL(o2.stat_enchant_name3,0) AS sub_stat_enchant_name3, ISNULL(o2.stat_enchant_name4,0) AS sub_stat_enchant_name4, ISNULL(o2.stat_enchant_name5,0) AS sub_stat_enchant_name5,
					ISNULL(o2.proc_tool_nameid,0) as sub_proc_tool_nameid, ISNULL(o2.option_count, 0) as sub_option_count, ISNULL(o2.dye_info, 0) as sub_dye_info,
					-- 신성력
					ISNULL(c.charge_point, 0) as 'charge_point',ISNULL(c2.charge_point, 0) as 'sub_charge_point'
			FROM	user_item i1 (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o1(nolock) ON i1.id = o1.id and o1.char_id = @char_id and i1.id = @db_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item i2 (nolock) ON i2.char_id= @char_id and i2.main_item_dbid = i1.id and i2.warehouse = @sub_item_warehouse	-- 합성보조무기
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o2(nolock) ON i2.id = o2.id and o2.char_id = i2.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_charge c (nolock) ON i1.id = c.id	-- 신성력
			LEFT JOIN user_item_charge c2 (nolock) ON i2.id = c2.id	-- 신성력sub
			WHERE	i1.char_id = @char_id and i1.id = @db_id
			order by i2.update_date desc

			set nocount off

procedures.GM_AccessAllowAccountDA_SrchByAccount:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AccessAllowAccountDA_SrchByAccount]
	@account_id		int				= null,
	@account_name	nvarchar(14)	= null
as
begin
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	if (@account_id is not null and @account_name is not null)
	begin
		select	access_id, account_id ,account_name, status, regdate
		from	access_allow_account
		where	account_id = @account_id
		and		account_name = @account_name
	end
	else if (@account_id is not null)
	begin
		select	access_id, account_id ,account_name, status, regdate
		from	access_allow_account
		where	account_id = @account_id
	end
	else if (@account_name is not null)
	begin
		select	access_id, account_id ,account_name, status, regdate
		from	access_allow_account
		where	account_name = @account_name
	end

	set nocount off
end

			@char_id nvarchar(20)

procedures.aion_GetGuildRewardTime:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetGuildRewardTime]

as
begin
	declare @week_reward_time bigint
	declare @season_reward_time bigint
	declare @winnerLight int
	declare @winnerDark int
	
	select top 1 @week_reward_time   = guild_week_reward_time, 
				 @season_reward_time = guild_season_reward_time, 
				 @winnerLight = guild_winner_light,
				 @winnerDark  = guild_winner_dark
	from abyss_reward_update_time
	
	select ISNULL(@week_reward_time, 0), ISNULL(@season_reward_time, 0), ISNULL(@winnerLight, 0), ISNULL(@winnerDark, 0)
end
procedures.GM_AccessAllowAccountDA_SrchByAccountNam:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AccessAllowAccountDA_SrchByAccountNames]
	@cvs_account_name	varchar(3000),
	@view_count		int		= 10000000,
	@page			int		= 1,
	@status			int		= null
as
begin
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	DECLARE @query	varchar(max)
	SET		@query = '
		SELECT	top (' + CONVERT(varchar,@view_count) + ') access_id, account_id ,account_name, status, regdate
		FROM	access_allow_account (nolock)
		WHERE	access_id NOT IN (	SELECT top (' + CONVERT(varchar, @view_count*(@page-1)) + ') access_id 
									FROM access_allow_account (nolock) 
									WHERE	account_name IN (' +@cvs_account_name+ ') 
									AND		(' + CONVERT(varchar, ISNULL(@status, '-1')) + '=-1 OR status = ' + CONVERT(varchar, ISNULL(@status, '-1')) + ')
									ORDER BY account_name )
		AND		account_name IN (' + @cvs_account_name + ')
		AND		(' + CONVERT(varchar, ISNULL(@status, '-1')) + '=-1 OR status = ' + CONVERT(varchar, ISNULL(@status, '-1')) + ')
		ORDER BY account_name '

	EXEC (@query)

	set nocount off
end

procedures.total_qina:
CREATE proc [dbo].[total_qina]
	as
		set nocount on
		set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
		set ansi_warnings off

		declare @rs_inven bigint, @rs_account bigint, @rs_guild bigint
				, @rs_vendor_light bigint, @rs_vendor_dark bigint, @rs_mail bigint
				, @rs_attach bigint, @rs_attach_account bigint
		
		-- 인벤 0
		select @rs_inven = isnull(sum(amount),0)
		from user_item t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) 
		where t1.char_id=t2.char_id 
		and t2.delete_complete_date=0 
		and t1.name_id=182400001 
		and t1.warehouse=0

		-- 계정 창고 6 7
		select @rs_account = isnull(sum(amount),0)
		from user_item (nolock)
		where char_id in
		(
			select distinct account_id
			from user_data (nolock)
			where delete_complete_date=0
		)
		and name_id=182400001
		and (warehouse=6 or warehouse=7)

		-- 길드 3
		select @rs_guild = isnull(sum(fund),0)
		from guild (nolock)
		where delete_time=0	and fund > 0

		-- 중개등록 4
		select @rs_vendor_light = isnull(sum(sold_price),0)
		from vendor_log_light t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) 
		where t1.char_id=t2.char_id 
		and t2.delete_complete_date=0
		
		select @rs_vendor_dark = isnull(sum(sold_price),0)
		from vendor_log_dark t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) 
		where t1.char_id=t2.char_id 
		and t2.delete_complete_date=0

		-- 우편 5
		select @rs_mail = isnull(sum(t1.money),0)
		from user_mail t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock)
		where t1.money > 0 
		and t1.to_id=t2.char_id
		and t2.delete_complete_date=0

		-- 압류 50
		select @rs_attach = isnull(sum(amount),0)
		from user_item t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock)
		where t1.char_id=t2.char_id
		and t2.delete_complete_date=0
		and t1.name_id=182400001
		and t1.warehouse=50

		-- 길드압류 53
		-- 키나 압류 못 함. 단, 일반 템 압류는 가능

		-- 계정 창고 압류 56 57
		select @rs_attach_account = isnull(sum(amount),0)
		from user_item (nolock)
		where char_id in
		(
			select distinct account_id
			from user_data (nolock)
			where delete_complete_date=0
		)
		and name_id=182400001
		and (warehouse=56 or warehouse=57)

		select @rs_inven inven, @rs_account account, @rs_guild guild, 
			   @rs_vendor_light vendor_light, @rs_vendor_dark vendor_dark, @rs_mail mail, @rs_attach attach,@rs_attach_account attach_account,
			   @rs_inven+@rs_account+@rs_guild+@rs_vendor_light+@rs_vendor_dark+@rs_mail as total_qina
		
		set nocount off
		return

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchCheckVendorItems:

			@char_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			select top 1 id from vendor_item_light with (nolock) where char_id = @char_id

procedures.GM_AccessAllowAccountDAO_Insert:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AccessAllowAccountDAO_Insert]
	@account_id		int,
	@account_name	nvarchar(14),
	@status			tinyint
as
begin
	if not exists (select account_id from access_allow_account (updlock) where account_id = @account_id)
	begin
		insert into access_allow_account (account_id ,account_name, status, regdate)
		values (@account_id, @account_name, @status, getdate())
	end
	else
	begin
		update	access_allow_account
		set		status = @status
		where	account_id = @account_id
	end
end

procedures.usp_trace_start:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_trace_start]
                                   @TraceFileName sysname = NULL -- 파일저장경로및파일이름
                  ,                @TraceName sysname = 'trace'
                  ,                @option int = 2 -- trace 파일사이즈가풀일때파일롤오버여부2 이면한다. 0이면안한다.
                  ,                @MaxFileSize bigint = 5 -- 최고trace 파일사이즈
                  ,                @StopTime datetime = NULL -- trace 끝나는시간
                  ,                @Events varchar(1000) = '10,11,12,13,14,15,16,21,22,25,33,37,40,41,42,44,43,53,55,61,67,68,69,71,72,74,76,79,80'       
/*
                  Trace Event 설명
                  10 : RPC(원격프로시저가호출)가완료되면발생
                  11 : RPC가시작되면발생
                  12 : Transact-SQL 일괄처리가완료되면발생
                  13 : Transact-SQL 일괄처리가시작되면발생
                  14 : 사용자가SQL Server에성공적으로로그인하면발생
                  15 : 사용자가SQL Server에서로그아웃을하면발생
                  16 : 클라이언트인터럽트요청이나클라이언트연결이끊어지는등주의이벤트가일어나면발생
                  21 : 이벤트가windows 응용프로그램로그에기록되었음을나타냄
                  22 : 오류이벤트가SQL Server 오류로그에기록되었음을나타냄
                  25 : 다른트랜잭션이소유한리소스에대해호환되지않는잠금을가져오려고시도하여두개의트랜잭션이서로교착상태에있음을나타냄
                  33 : SQL Server에서예외가발생했음을나타냄
                  37 : 저장프로시저가다시컴파일되었음을나타냄
                  40 : Transact-SQL 문이시작되면발생
                  41 : Transact-SQL 문이완료되면발생
                  42 : 저장프로시저가사직된때를나타냄
                  43 : 저장프로시저가완료된때를나타냄
                  44 : 저장프로시저내의Transact-SQL 문이실행을시작했을때발생
                  45 : 저장프로시저내의Transact-SQL 문이실행을완료했을때발생
                  53 : 커서가ODBC, OLE DB 또는DB-Library에의해열린때를나타냄
                  55 : 버퍼파티션에서처리되지않는해시조인, 해시집계, 해시통합, 해시중복제외등의해시작업이대체계획으로되돌려졌음을나타냄
                  61 : OLE DB 오류가발생하였음을나타냄
                  67 : SQL Server 문이나저장프로시저실행중에발생한경고를나타냄
                  68 : 실행된Transact-SQL 문의계획트리를표시
                  69 : 정렬작업이메모리에적합하지않음을나타냄
                  71 : ODBC, OLE DB 또는DB-Library가사용하기위해Transact-SQL문을준비할때발생
                  72 : ODBC, OLE DB 또는DB-Library가준비된Transact-SQL문을실행할때발생
                  74 : Transact-SQL 문에서ODBC, OLE DB 또는DB-Library에의해이전에준비된커서를실행할때발생
                  76 : -
                  79 : -
                  80 : -
                  참고URL : http://technet.microsoft.com/ko-kr/library/ms186265.aspx
*/              
                  ,                 @Cols varchar(300) = '1,3,8,10,11,12,13,14,15,16,17,18,28,35,48'
/*
                  Trace Event 열ID
                  3 databaseID : database ID (DB_ID로확인가능한값)
                  8 HostName : 요청을처음에시작한클라이언트컴퓨터이름
                  10 ApplicationName : SQL Server 인스턴스에연결한클라이언트응용프로그램의이름
                  11 LoginName : SQL Server 로그인이름
                  12 SPID : 프로세스에할당한서버프로세스ID
                  13 Duration : 이벤트에의해사용된경과시간(마이트로초)
                  14 StartTime : 이벤트가시작된시간
                  15 EndTime : 이벤트종료시간
                  16 Reads : 서버에서수행한논리적디스크읽기수
                  
                  17 Writes : 서버에서수행한물리적디스트쓰기수
                  18 CPU : 이벤트에의해사용된CPU 시간(밀리초)
                  28 ObjectType : 개체유형(테이블, 함수, 저장프로시저등)
                  35 DatabaseName : 데이터베이스이름
                  48 RowCounts : 일괄처리의행수입니다
*/
                  ,                 @IncludeFilter sysname = NULL
                  ,                 @ExcludeFilter sysname = NULL
AS
BEGIN
                  SET NOCOUNT ON;
 
                  -- 사용자변수선언
                  DECLARE @TraceID int
                  DECLARE @On bit
                  DECLARE @Rc int
                  
                  SET @On = 1
                  
                  -- 이벤트와이벤트열을확인한다.
                  IF @Events IS NULL OR @Cols IS NULL BEGIN
                                   PRINT 'No Events or Coloumns.'
                                   RETURN -1
                  END
                  
                  -- 파일경로와파일명을설정
                  IF @TraceFileName IS NULL 
                                   SELECT @TraceFileName = 'C:\Trace\Trace' + CONVERT(char(8),getdate(), 112)
                                   --SELECT @TraceFileName = 'C:\Trace\Trace_' + CONVERT(char(8),getdate(), 112)
                                   
                  -- 추척큐를만든다.
                  EXEC @Rc = sp_trace_create @TraceID out, @option, @TraceFileName, @MaxFileSize, @StopTime
                  IF @Rc <> 0 BEGIN
                                             PRINT 'Trace not started'
                                             RETURN @Rc
                  END
                  PRINT 'Trace started.'
                  PRINT 'The trace file name is ' + @TraceFileName +'.'
                  
                  -- 추척할이벤트클래스들과이벤트열들을지정한다.
                  DECLARE @i int, @j int, @Event int, @Col int, @Colstring varchar(300)
                  
                  IF RIGHT(@Events, 1) <> ',' SET @Events = @Events + ','
                  SET @i = charindex(',', @Events)
                  WHILE @i <> 0 BEGIN
                                            SET @Event = cast(LEFT(@Events, @i - 1) AS int)
                                            SET @Colstring = @Cols
                                            
                                            IF RIGHT(@Colstring, 1) <> ',' SET @Colstring = @Colstring + ','
                                            SET @j = charindex(',', @Colstring)
                                            
                                            WHILE @j <> 0 BEGIN
                                                       SET @Col = CAST(LEFT(@Colstring,@j-1) AS int)
                                                       EXEC dbo.sp_trace_setevent @TraceID, @Event, @Col, @On
                                                       SET @Colstring=SUBSTRING(@Colstring, @j+1, 300)
                                                       SET @j=CHARINDEX(',', @Colstring)
                                            END
                                            SET @Events = substring(@Events, @i + 1, 300)
                                            SET @i = charindex(',', @Events)
                  END
                  
                  -- 필터를설정한다.
                  EXEC sp_trace_setfilter @TraceID, 10, 0, 7, N'SQL Profiler'
                  EXEC sp_trace_setfilter @TraceID, 1, 0, 7, N'EXEC% sp_%trace%'
                  
                  IF @IncludeFilter IS NOT NULL
                                   EXEC sp_trace_setfilter @TraceID, 1, 0, 6, @IncludeFilter
                                   
                  IF @ExcludeFilter IS NOT NULL
                                   EXEC sp_trace_setfilter @TraceID, 1, 0, 7, @ExcludeFilter
                                   
                  -- 추척을활성화한다.
                  EXEC sp_trace_setstatus @TraceID, 1
                  
                  -- 추척을기록한다. (TempDB의테이블생성사용)
                  -- 기록하는이유는Trace Stop 시TraceID를알아야하기때문
                  IF object_id('tempdb..TraceQueueList') IS NULL BEGIN 
                                   CREATE TABLE tempdb..TraceQueueList(TraceID int, TraceName varchar(20), TraceFile sysname)
                  END
                  
                  IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tempdb..TraceQueueList WHERE TraceName = @TraceName) BEGIN
                                   UPDATE temdb..TraceQueueList SET TraceID = @TraceId, TraceFile = @TraceFileName
                                   WHERE TraceName = @TraceName
                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                   INSERT tempdb..TraceQueueList VALUES (@TraceID, @TraceName, @TraceFileName)
                  END
END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchCountByNameIdAndCreate:
CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchCountByNameIdAndCreateDateTo]
			@name_id	int,
			@create_date_to	varchar(20)	= ''
		AS
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @vendor_log_dark_qina	bigint
			declare @vendor_log_light_qina	bigint
			declare @guild_fund bigint
			set @vendor_log_dark_qina = 0
			set @vendor_log_light_qina = 0
			set @guild_fund = 0
			
			if (@create_date_to = '')
			begin
				if (@name_id = 182400001)
				begin
					select	@vendor_log_dark_qina = ISNULL(SUM(sold_price), 0) from vendor_log_dark (nolock)
					select	@vendor_log_light_qina = ISNULL(SUM(sold_price), 0) from vendor_log_light (nolock)
					select	@guild_fund = ISNULL(SUM(fund), 0) from guild (nolock)
				end
				
				select	(SUM(amount) + @vendor_log_dark_qina + @vendor_log_light_qina + @guild_fund) as total_amount, name_id
				from	user_item (nolock)
				where	name_id = @name_id
				and		(warehouse in (0,1,3,4,5,6,7) OR (warehouse between 30 and 49) OR (warehouse between 60 and 79))
				group by name_id
			end
			else
			begin
				if (@name_id = 182400001)
				begin
					select	@vendor_log_dark_qina = ISNULL(SUM(sold_price), 0) from vendor_log_dark (nolock) where sold_date <= datediff(mi, '1970-01-01 09:00', @create_date_to)
					select	@vendor_log_light_qina = ISNULL(SUM(sold_price), 0) from vendor_log_light (nolock) where sold_date <= datediff(mi, '1970-01-01 09:00', @create_date_to)
					select	@guild_fund = ISNULL(SUM(fund), 0) from guild (nolock)
				end
								
				select	(SUM(amount) + @vendor_log_dark_qina + @vendor_log_light_qina + @guild_fund) as total_amount, name_id
				from	user_item (nolock)
				where	name_id = @name_id
				and		(warehouse in (0,1,3,4,5,6,7) OR (warehouse between 30 and 49) OR (warehouse between 60 and 79))
				and		create_date <= @create_date_to
				group by name_id
			end
procedures.aion_GetHighestLevelCharacterOfAccount:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: 2012-08-24
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetHighestLevelCharacterOfAccount]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@accountNum int 
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	IF @accountNum = 0
	Begin
		SELECT u1.account_id as gameAccountNo, u1.org_server as gameServerNo, u1.char_id as characterId, u1.lev as characterLevel
		FROM (
			select row_number() over (partition by account_id order by lev desc, char_id asc) as rank_lev, account_id, org_server, char_id, lev
			from user_data with (nolock) Where delete_complete_date=0
			) as u1
		WHERE u1.rank_lev=1 
	End
	ELSE
	Begin
		SELECT u1.account_id as gameAccountNo, u1.org_server as gameServerNo, u1.char_id as characterId, u1.lev as characterLevel
		FROM (
			select row_number() over (partition by account_id order by lev desc, char_id asc) as rank_lev, account_id, org_server, char_id, lev
			from user_data with (nolock) Where delete_complete_date=0 and account_id=@accountNum
			) as u1
		WHERE u1.rank_lev=1
	End
END

procedures.usp_trace_stop:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_trace_stop]
                                   @TraceName sysname = 'trace'                  
AS
BEGIN
                  SET NOCOUNT ON;
                  
                  -- 변수선언
                  DECLARE @TraceID int
                  DECLARE @TraceFileName sysname
                  
                  -- 추적목록을확인하여, 추적을중지한다.
                  IF object_id('tempdb..TraceQueueList') IS NOT NULL BEGIN
                                   SELECT @TraceID = TraceID, @TraceFileName = TraceFile FROM tempdb..TraceQueueList
                                   WHERE TraceName = @TraceName
                                                     IF @@rowcount <> 0 BEGIN
                                                                       EXEC sp_trace_setstatus @TraceID, 0
                                                                       EXEC sp_trace_setstatus @TraceID, 2
 
                                                                       DELETE tempdb..TraceQueueList WHERE TraceName = @TraceName
 
                                                                       PRINT 'Trace is stopped.' + ' The trace output file name is ' + @TraceFileName
                                                     END
                  END ELSE BEGIN
                                   PRINT 'No active traces.'
                  END
END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchCurDarkVendorItems:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchCurDarkVendorItems]
			@warehouse		nvarchar(2),
			@name_id		nvarchar(2450),
			@char_nm		nvarchar(30),
			@char_id		nvarchar(20),
			@from_name_id	nvarchar(20),
			@to_name_id		nvarchar(20),
			@view_count		nvarchar(5),
			@top_count		nvarchar(5),
			@world_id		nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @sql_where_etc nvarchar(2500)

			set @sql_where_etc = ' and u.delete_date=''0'' '
			
			IF @name_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_where_etc = @sql_where_etc + ' and ('+@name_id+') '
			END
			
			IF @char_nm != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_where_etc = @sql_where_etc + ' and u.user_id = N'''+@char_nm+''' '
			END
			
			IF @char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_where_etc = @sql_where_etc + ' and u.char_id = '''+@char_id+''' '
			END

			IF @from_name_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_where_etc = @sql_where_etc + ' and i.name_id between '''+@from_name_id+''' AND '''+@to_name_id+''' '
			END
			
			set @sql =  'SELECT top ' + @view_count +
						'		v.user_price, v.sale_price, v.commit_amount, v.remain_amount, v.commit_date ' +
						-- 5.3 4차 경매장 개선
						'		, v.afterUnitFee, v.afterUnitTax ' +
						'		, i.producer, i.tid, i.expired_time, i.buy_amount, i.buy_duration, i.id, i.name_id, i.amount, i.slot, i.warehouse ' +
						'		, o.soul_bound, o.enchant_count, o.skin_name_id, o.stat_enchant_name0, o.stat_enchant_name1, o.stat_enchant_name2, o.stat_enchant_name3, o.stat_enchant_name4, o.stat_enchant_name5, o.dye_info, o.proc_tool_nameid ' +
						'		, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count ' +
						'		, u.class, u.delete_date, u.org_server, u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name, u.race, u.lev ' +
						'		, CASE ' +
						'			WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time and u.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and u.last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
						'			WHEN u.last_login_time != u.last_logout_time or u.last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +
						'			WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time and u.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
						'			END as logonoff '+
						'		, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
						'		, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
						-- 4.5 17차 깃털
						'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
						-- [4.71] 모조신석
						'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
						-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
						'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
						-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
						'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
						'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
						'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown ' +
						'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId ' +
						-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
						' FROM	vendor_item_dark v (nolock) ' +
						' JOIN	user_item i (nolock) on i.id = v.user_item_id ' +
						' JOIN	user_data u (nolock) on u.char_id=i.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) on i.id = o.id and i.char_id = o.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id ' +
						' WHERE	i.warehouse='''+@warehouse+''' and u.org_server = '''+@world_id+'''' +
						' AND	i.id not in (SELECT top ' + @top_count + ' i.id ' +
						'	FROM	vendor_item_dark v (nolock), user_item i (nolock), user_data u (nolock) ' +
						'	WHERE	i.warehouse='''+@warehouse+''' and v.user_item_id=i.id and u.org_server = '''+@world_id+''' and u.char_id=i.char_id ' + @sql_where_etc +
						'	ORDER BY i.id asc)'
			
			set @sql = @sql + @sql_where_etc
			
			set @sql = @sql +
						' ORDER BY i.id asc'
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetVendorItemListAllLight_20140610]
	@warehouse	TINYINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
SELECT vendor_item_light.id, user_item.name_id, vendor_item_light.sale_price, 
	vendor_item_light.user_price, vendor_item_light.commit_amount, 
	vendor_item_light.commit_date,	vendor_item_light.remain_amount,
	vendor_item_light.can_buy_partial,
	user_item.id,  user_data.char_id, user_data.user_id,
	isnull(user_item_option.soul_bound,0), isnull(user_item_option.enchant_count,0), isnull(user_item_option.skin_name_id,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name0,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name1,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),		
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.vanish_point,0),	
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.option_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.keyNameId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0)
FROM	vendor_item_light INNER JOIN
	user_item ON vendor_item_light.user_item_id = user_item.id left JOIN 
	user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id inner join
	user_data ON vendor_item_light.char_id = user_data.char_id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse)
SET NOCOUNT OFF

CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchCurLightVendorItems]
			@warehouse		nvarchar(2),

			@char_nm		nvarchar(30),

			@top_count		nvarchar(5),
			@world_id		nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @sql_where_etc nvarchar(2500)

			set @sql_where_etc = ' and u.delete_date=''0'' '

			END

			BEGIN
				set @sql_where_etc = @sql_where_etc + ' and u.char_id = '''+@char_id+''' '
			END

			BEGIN
				set @sql_where_etc = @sql_where_etc + ' and i.name_id between '''+@from_name_id+''' AND '''+@to_name_id+''' '
			END
