						'		, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count ' +
						'		, u.class, u.delete_date, u.org_server, u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name, u.race, u.lev ' +
						'		, CASE ' +
						'			WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time and u.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and u.last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
						'			WHEN u.last_login_time != u.last_logout_time or u.last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +
						'			WHEN u.last_login_time = u.last_logout_time and u.last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
						'			END as logonoff '+
						'		, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
						'		, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
						-- 4.5 17차 깃털
						'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
						-- [4.71] 모조신석
						'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
						-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
						'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
						-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
						'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
						'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
						'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown ' +
						'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId ' +
						-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +

						' AND	i.id not in (SELECT top ' + @top_count + ' i.id ' +
						'	FROM	vendor_item_light v(nolock), user_item i (nolock), user_data u (nolock) ' +
						'	WHERE	i.warehouse='''+@warehouse+''' and v.user_item_id=i.id and u.org_server = '''+@world_id+''' and u.char_id=i.char_id ' + @sql_where_etc +

			set @sql = @sql + @sql_where_etc
			
			set @sql = @sql + 
						' ORDER BY i.id asc'
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

	ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0),

	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillLevel,0)
FROM	vendor_item_light INNER JOIN

	user_data ON vendor_item_light.char_id = user_data.char_id

AS
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	SELECT	charId, ItemId, retryCount, isDelete
			, nameId1, ItemCount1, nameId2, ItemCount2, nameId3, ItemCount3, nameId4, ItemCount4, nameId5, ItemCount5, UpdateDate

procedures.GM_AionTVContentsDA_Srch:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_AionTVContentsDA_Srch]
	@server_id	int,
	@isDeleted	varchar(1) = ''
AS
BEGIN
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	IF (@isDeleted != '')
	BEGIN
		SELECT	id, url, start_date, end_date, server_id, login_id, login_nm, reg_date, is_deleted
		FROM	aion_tv_contents (nolock)
		WHERE	server_id = @server_id AND is_deleted = CONVERT(tinyint, @isDeleted)
    ORDER BY server_id, reg_date DESC
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SELECT	id, url, start_date, end_date, server_id, login_id, login_nm, reg_date, is_deleted
		FROM	aion_tv_contents (nolock)
		WHERE	server_id = @server_id
    ORDER BY server_id, reg_date DESC
	END	
END
procedures.aion_SetHouseObjectByMoveHouse:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetHouseObjectByMoveHouse]
	@owner_id		INT,
	@owner_type		INT,
	@oldState		TINYINT,
	@newState		TINYINT
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	BEGIN TRAN
	
	UPDATE houseobject
	SET	[state] = @newState,
		world = 0,
		xlocation = 0.0,
		ylocation = 0.0,
		zlocation = 0.0,
		dir = 0
	WHERE owner_id = @owner_id and [state] = @oldState
	
	UPDATE houseobject
	SET owner_type = @owner_type,
		update_time = GETDATE()
	WHERE owner_id = @owner_id and [state] != 0

	COMMIT TRAN

END

procedures.aion_SetHouseObjectJukeBox:
-- Batch submitted through debugger: SQLQuery12.sql|7|0|C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\3\~vsAD27.sql

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetHouseObjectJukeBox]
	@obj_id		INT,
	@char_id	INT,
	@account_id	INT	
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	IF EXISTS (SELECT obj_id FROM houseobject_extdata(UPDLOCK) where obj_id = @obj_id)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE houseobject_extdata
			SET	account_id = @account_id
			WHERE obj_id = @obj_id
		END
	ELSE
		BEGIN
			INSERT houseobject_extdata(obj_id, char_id, account_id)
			VALUES (@obj_id, @char_id, @account_id)
		END
	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchItemByCond:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchItemByCond]
			@world_Id	nvarchar(5),
			@cond		nvarchar(2000),
			@warehouse	nvarchar(2)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000)
			
			if (@warehouse = '3')
			begin				
				-- 레기온 창고
				SET @sql =	'SELECT	T1.id, T1.char_id, T1.name_id, T1.amount, T1.slot, T1.warehouse, T1.producer, T1.tid, T1.expired_time, T1.buy_amount, T1.buy_duration ' +
							'		, T3.user_id, T3.char_id as account_name, T3.class, T3.account_id ' +
							'		, o.soul_bound, o.enchant_count, o.skin_name_id, o.stat_enchant_name0, o.stat_enchant_name1, o.stat_enchant_name2, o.stat_enchant_name3, o.stat_enchant_name4, o.stat_enchant_name5, o.dye_info, o.proc_tool_nameid, o.obtain_skin_type, o.expire_skin_time, o.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o.random_option,0) AS random_option ' +
							'		, o.limit_enchant_count, o.reidentify_count ' +
							'		, ISNULL(f.freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
							'		, ISNULL(o.authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(o.vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
							-- 4.5 17차 깃털
							'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
							-- [4.71] 모조신석
							'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
							-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
							'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
							-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
							'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId ' +
							-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
							'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
							-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
							'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown ' +
							'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId ' +
							-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
							' FROM	user_item T1 (nolock) ' +
							' JOIN	guild g (nolock) on g.id = T1.char_id ' +
							' JOIN	user_data T3 (nolock) on g.master_id = T3.char_id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) on T1.id = o.id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on T1.id = f.id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on T1.id = a.id ' +
							' WHERE	T1.warehouse = 3 and (' + @cond + ')'
			end
			else if (@warehouse = '2')
			begin
				-- 계정창고
				SET @sql =	'SELECT	T1.id, T2.char_id/*계정창고템주의*/, T1.name_id, T1.amount, T1.slot, T1.warehouse, T1.producer, T1.tid, T1.expired_time, T1.buy_amount, T1.buy_duration ' +
							'		, T2.char_id, T2.user_id, T2.account_name, T2.account_id, T2.org_server ' +
							'		, o.soul_bound, o.enchant_count, o.skin_name_id, o.stat_enchant_name0, o.stat_enchant_name1, o.stat_enchant_name2, o.stat_enchant_name3, o.stat_enchant_name4, o.stat_enchant_name5, o.dye_info, o.proc_tool_nameid, o.obtain_skin_type, o.expire_skin_time, o.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o.random_option,0) AS random_option ' +
							'		, o.limit_enchant_count, o.reidentify_count ' +
							'		, ISNULL(f.freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
							'		, ISNULL(o.authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(o.vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
							-- 4.5 17차 깃털
							'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
							-- [4.71] 모조신석
							'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
							-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
							'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
							-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
							'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId ' +
							-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
							'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
							-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
							'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown ' +
							'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId ' +
							-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
							' FROM	user_item T1 (nolock) ' +
							' JOIN	user_data T2 (nolock) on T2.account_id = T1.char_id and T2.delete_complete_date = 0 ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) on T1.id = o.id and T1.char_id = o.char_id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on T1.id = f.id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on T1.id = a.id ' +
							' WHERE	T2.org_server='''+@world_Id+''' and (' + @cond + ') ' +
							' AND	T1.warehouse IN (2,6,56,7,57) '
			end
			else
			begin
				-- 기타창고
				SET @sql =	'SELECT	T1.id, T1.char_id, T1.name_id, T1.amount, T1.slot, T1.warehouse, T1.producer, T1.tid, T1.expired_time, T1.buy_amount, T1.buy_duration ' +
							'		, T2.char_id, T2.user_id, T2.account_name, T2.account_id, T2.org_server ' +
							'		, o.soul_bound, o.enchant_count, o.skin_name_id, o.stat_enchant_name0, o.stat_enchant_name1, o.stat_enchant_name2, o.stat_enchant_name3, o.stat_enchant_name4, o.stat_enchant_name5, o.dye_info, o.proc_tool_nameid, o.obtain_skin_type, o.expire_skin_time, o.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o.random_option,0) AS random_option ' +
							'		, o.limit_enchant_count, o.reidentify_count ' +
							'		, ISNULL(f.freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
							'		, ISNULL(o.authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(o.vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
							-- 4.5 17차 깃털
							'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
							-- [4.71] 모조신석
							'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
							-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
							'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
							-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
							'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId ' +
							-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
							'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
							-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
							'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown ' +
							'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId ' +
							-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
							'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
							' FROM	user_item T1 (nolock) ' +
							' JOIN	user_data T2 (nolock) on T1.char_id = T2.char_id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) on T1.id = o.id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on T1.id = f.id ' +
							' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on T1.id = a.id ' +
							' WHERE	T2.org_server='''+@world_Id+''' and (' + @cond + ') '

				if (@warehouse = '0')		-- 인벤
					set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND (T1.warehouse='+@warehouse+' or T1.warehouse=50) and T1.export_id = 0'
				else if (@warehouse = '16')	-- 합성무기
					set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND (T1.warehouse='+@warehouse+' or T1.warehouse=17)'
				else if (@warehouse = '30')	-- 펫창고
					set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND (T1.warehouse between '+@warehouse+' and 49)'
				else						-- 기타
					set @sql = @sql + 
							' AND T1.warehouse='+@warehouse
			end
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

procedures.GM_BuilderLogDA_SrchBuilderLog:
--[WORLDDB]
--빌더 로그 커맨드 검색 수정

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_BuilderLogDA_SrchBuilderLog]
	@char_nm nvarchar(20), -- 캐릭터 명
	@build_nm nvarchar(40),
	@view_count nvarchar(5),
	@top_count nvarchar(5),
	@from_date nvarchar(30),
	@to_date nvarchar(30),
	@builder_lv nvarchar(5),
	@command_from nvarchar(5) = ''
as
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	set ansi_warnings off
	
	declare @sql nvarchar(1500), @sql_tmp nvarchar(300), @tmp int
	
	set @sql_tmp = ' '
	
	IF @char_nm != 'null'
	BEGIN
		set @sql_tmp = @sql_tmp + ' and CHAR_NM = N'''+@char_nm+''''
	END
	IF @build_nm != 'null'
	BEGIN
		set @sql_tmp = @sql_tmp + ' and BUILD_NM = N'''+@build_nm+''''
	END
	IF @builder_lv != 'null'
	BEGIN
		set @sql_tmp = @sql_tmp + ' and builder_lv = '''+@builder_lv+''''
	END
	IF @command_from != ''
	BEGIN
		set @sql_tmp = @sql_tmp + ' and command_from = '''+@command_from+''''
	END
	
	set @sql = ' select top ' + @view_count + ' BUILDER_LOG_ID, WORLD_ID, CHAR_NM, TARGET_CHAR_NM, BUILD_NM, BUILD_PARAMETER, BUILDER_TYPE, BUILDER_LV, convert(nvarchar,REGDATE,20 ) REGDATE, COMMAND_FROM, RESULT_MESSAGE ' +
			   ' from	builder_log (nolock) ' +
			   ' where	BUILDER_LOG_ID not in(select top ' + @top_count + ' BUILDER_LOG_ID from builder_log(nolock) where regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+''' '+@sql_tmp+' order by BUILDER_LOG_ID desc) ' +
			   ' and	regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+''' '+@sql_tmp+
			   ' order by BUILDER_LOG_ID desc '
	
	exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
	
	set nocount off
	return

procedures.aion_SetHouseObjectUseCount:

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetHouseObjectUseCount]
	@obj_id		INT,
	@char_id	INT,
	@use_count	INT,
	@next_reset_time	BIGINT,
	@cur_owner_usecnt_per_day	TINYINT
	
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	IF EXISTS (SELECT obj_id FROM houseobject_extdata(UPDLOCK) where obj_id = @obj_id)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE houseobject_extdata
			SET	accumulated_usecount = @use_count,

		END

			VALUES (@obj_id, @char_id, @use_count, @next_reset_time, @cur_owner_usecnt_per_day)
		END
		
	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),	
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0),

	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchItemNameIDByType:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchItemNameIDByType]
			@item_name_id nvarchar(2000),
			@enchant_count_from nvarchar(30),
			@enchant_count_to nvarchar(30),
			@amount_from nvarchar(30),
			@amount_to nvarchar(30),
			@dbid_from nvarchar(30),
			@dbid_to nvarchar(30),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(2500)
						
			set @sql = 'select top ' + @view_count +
					   ' sum(t1.amount) amount, t1.name_id, ' +
					   ' t2.char_id, t2.user_id, t2.account_id, t2.account_name ' +
					   ' from user_item t1(nolock) , user_data t2(nolock) ' +
					   ' where t2.delete_complete_date=''0'' and t1.char_id = t2.char_id and (t1.warehouse=0 or t1.warehouse=1 or t1.warehouse=3 or t1.warehouse=4 or t1.warehouse=5) '
			
			IF @item_name_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
					   set @sql = @sql + ' and ('+@item_name_id+' ) ' 
			END 
			
			IF @enchant_count_from != 'null' AND @enchant_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN					   
					   set @sql = @sql + '     and t1.enchant_count >= '''+@enchant_count_from+''' and t1.enchant_count <= '''+@enchant_count_to+''' '
			END
			
			IF @amount_from != 'null' AND @amount_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
					   
					   set @sql = @sql + '      and t1.amount >= '''+@amount_from+''' and t1.amount <= '''+@amount_to+''' '
			END
					   
			IF @dbid_from != 'null' AND @dbid_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
					   set @sql = @sql +'      and t1.id >= '''+@dbid_from+''' and t1.id <= '''+@dbid_to+''' '
			END
					   
					   set @sql = @sql +'       and t1.id not in (select top ' + @top_count + ' t1.id from user_item t1(nolock) , user_data t2(nolock) ' +
									    ' where delete_date=''0'' and t1.char_id = t2.char_id and (t1.warehouse=0 or t1.warehouse=1 or t1.warehouse=6 or t1.warehouse=7 or t1.warehouse=3 or t1.warehouse=4 or t1.warehouse=5) ' 
			
			IF @item_name_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
					   set @sql = @sql + ' and ('+@item_name_id+' ) ' 
			END 
					   
			IF @enchant_count_from != 'null' AND @enchant_count_to != 'null'
			BEGIN					   
					   set @sql = @sql + '     and t1.enchant_count >= '''+@enchant_count_from+''' and t1.enchant_count <= '''+@enchant_count_to+''' '
			END
					   
			IF @amount_from != 'null' AND @amount_to != 'null'
			BEGIN					   
					   set @sql = @sql + '     and t1.amount >= '''+@amount_from+''' and t1.amount <= '''+@amount_to+''' '
			END
					   
			IF @dbid_from != 'null' AND @dbid_to != 'null'
			BEGIN
					   set @sql = @sql +'      and t1.id >= '''+@dbid_from+''' and t1.id <= '''+@dbid_to+'''  '
			END
					   
					   
					   set @sql = @sql + ' order by t1.char_id asc ' +					   
								         ' ) group by t1.name_id,  t2.char_id, t2.user_id, t2.account_id, t2.account_name      '
			
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.GM_ChallengeTaskDA_SrchChallengeTaskByCh:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_ChallengeTaskDA_SrchChallengeTaskByCharId]
	@char_id	int
AS
BEGIN
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	SELECT	t.id, union_id, task_name_id, type, status, complete_count, last_complete_time,	-- challenge_task
			contributor_id, contributor_name, score,	-- challenge_task_contributor
			case when type = 1 then g.name else null end as 'guild_name'
	FROM	challenge_task t
	JOIN	challenge_task_contributor c ON t.id = c.challenge_task_id
	LEFT JOIN	guild g ON g.id = union_id
	WHERE	contributor_id = @char_id

	set nocount off
END
procedures.aion_DeleteUserUsedItemOnTradingByDate:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_DeleteUserUsedItemOnTradingByDate]
	@date	INT
AS
BEGIN
	set nocount on

	-- 등록 후 (@date)일이 지난 데이타 삭제
	DELETE	
	FROM	user_useditem_ontrading
	WHERE	regdate < dateadd(day, -@date, getdate())

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchItemsByNameIDByUpdateD:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchItemsByNameIDByUpdateDate]
	@char_id	int,
	@name_id	int,
	@warehouse	tinyint
AS
BEGIN
	set nocount on
	set	transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	select	top 1 i1.id, i1.char_id, i1.name_id, i1.slot_id, i1.amount, i1.slot, i1.warehouse, convert(nvarchar,i1.create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,i1.update_date,21 ) AS update_date, i1.producer, i1.tid, i1.expired_time, i1.buy_amount, i1.buy_duration, i1.main_item_dbid, i1.dynamic_property, i1.import_id, i1.export_id, i1.server_of_origin,
			-- user_item_option
			o1.soul_bound, o1.enchant_count, o1.skin_name_id, o1.stat_enchant_name0, o1.stat_enchant_name1, o1.stat_enchant_name2, o1.stat_enchant_name3, o1.stat_enchant_name4, o1.stat_enchant_name5, o1.option_count, o1.dye_info, o1.proc_tool_nameid, o1.obtain_skin_type, o1.expire_skin_time, o1.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o1.random_option,0) AS random_option
	from	user_item i1 (nolock)
	left join	user_item_option o1 (nolock) on i1.id = o1.id and i1.char_id = o1.char_id
	where	i1.char_id = @char_id and warehouse = @warehouse
	and		(o1.skin_name_id = @name_id or ((ISNULL(o1.skin_name_id, 0) = 0 and i1.name_id = @name_id)))
	order by i1.update_date desc
	
	set nocount off
END

procedures.aion_randombuddy:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_randombuddy] 
	@ownerid as int
as
begin 
	declare @getCount as int
	declare @buddyid as int
	declare @count1 as int
	declare @count2 as int
	select @count1 = count(a.buddy_id) from user_buddy1 a inner join house_field b on buddy_id  = owner_id and permission = 1 where a.char_id = @ownerid 
	select @count2 = count(a.buddy_id) from user_buddy1 a inner join house_instant b on buddy_id  = ID and permission = 1 where a.char_id = @ownerid 	
	
	if @count1 + @count2 = 0
	begin
		return 0;
	end
	
	select @getCount = (cast(((rand()*100)) as integer)%(@count1 + @count2))
	
	--print @count1
	--print @count2
	--print @getCount

	declare  buddycursor  cursor for select a.buddy_id from user_buddy1 a inner join house_field b on buddy_id  = owner_id and permission = 1 where a.char_id = @ownerid union select a.buddy_id from user_buddy1 a inner join house_instant b on buddy_id  = ID and permission = 1 where a.char_id = @ownerid 	

	set @buddyid = 0	
	open buddycursor	
	
	fetch next from buddycursor into @buddyid
	
	while @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	begin 	
	if @getCount < 0 break;	
	
	set @getCount = @getCount - 1
	fetch next from buddycursor into @buddyid
	end
	close buddycursor
	deallocate buddycursor
	--print @buddyid
	return @buddyid;
end

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyChargedItems:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyChargedItems]
			@char_id	int
		AS
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off

			SELECT	-- user_item (메인무기)
					i1.id, i1.char_id, i1.name_id, i1.slot_id, i1.amount, i1.slot, i1.warehouse, convert(nvarchar,i1.create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,i1.update_date,21 ) AS update_date, i1.producer, i1.tid, i1.expired_time, i1.buy_amount, i1.buy_duration, i1.main_item_dbid, i1.dynamic_property, i1.import_id, i1.export_id, i1.server_of_origin
					-- user_item_option
					, o1.soul_bound, o1.enchant_count, o1.skin_name_id, o1.stat_enchant_name0, o1.stat_enchant_name1, o1.stat_enchant_name2, o1.stat_enchant_name3, o1.stat_enchant_name4, o1.stat_enchant_name5, o1.option_count, o1.dye_info, o1.proc_tool_nameid, o1.obtain_skin_type, o1.expire_skin_time, o1.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o1.random_option,0) AS random_option
					, ISNULL(o1.limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(o1.reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
					-- user_item (보조무기)
					, i2.id as 'sub_id', i2.name_id as 'sub_name_id'
					-- 신성력
					, ISNULL(c.charge_point, 0) as 'charge_point'
			FROM	user_item i1 (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o1(nolock) ON i1.id = o1.id and o1.char_id = @char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item i2 (nolock) ON i2.char_id= @char_id and i2.main_item_dbid = i1.id and i2.warehouse = 16	-- 합성보조무기
			LEFT JOIN user_item_charge c (nolock) ON i1.id = c.id	-- 신성력
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i1.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i1.id = a.id
			WHERE	i1.char_id = @char_id
			and		i1.warehouse = 0
			and		((i1.name_id BETWEEN 100000000 AND 115099999)/*무기,방어구*/ OR (i1.name_id BETWEEN 125000000 AND 125399999)/*투구*/)

procedures.GM_ChallengeTaskDA_SrchChallengeTaskCont:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_ChallengeTaskDA_SrchChallengeTaskContributorByUnionId]
			@union_id	int
		AS
		BEGIN
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	challenge_task_id, contributor_id, contributor_name, score	-- challenge_task_contributor
					,g.master_id, u.account_id
			FROM	challenge_task t (nolock)
			JOIN	challenge_task_contributor c (nolock) ON c.challenge_task_id = t.id
			LEFT JOIN guild g (nolock) ON g.id = c.contributor_id		-- guild
			LEFT JOIN user_data u (nolock) ON u.char_id = g.master_id	-- guild_master
			WHERE	t.union_id = @union_id

			set nocount off
		END
procedures.aion_SetInstanceCondition:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetInstanceCondition]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@instance_id			int,
	@variable				nvarchar(256),
	@variable_hash			int,
	@value					int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE	@id	int
	SET	@id = 0

	SELECT @id = id FROM world_extcondition(updlock) WHERE world_type = 1 AND world_num = @instance_id AND variable_hash = @variable_hash
	IF (@@rowcount > 1)
		SELECT @id = id FROM world_extcondition WHERE world_type = 1 AND world_num = @instance_id AND variable = @variable

	IF (@id <> 0)
		UPDATE world_extcondition SET value = @value WHERE id = @id
	ELSE
		INSERT INTO world_extcondition (world_type, world_num, variable, variable_hash, value) VALUES (1, @instance_id, @variable, @variable_hash, @value)
END
procedures.Z_SendItem:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		aioncreater
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[Z_SendItem]
	@to_name 	nvarchar(20)	-- 接收者
,	@from_name   nvarchar(20)
,	@title       nvarchar(20)
,	@item_id		bigint		-- 物品
,	@item_amount	bigint	=1	-- 数量
,   @enchant int	= 0		    -- 强化
,   @mana_stone bigint	=0		-- 魔石
,   @god_stone bigint	= 0		-- 神石
,   @mana_stone_count bigint	= 4	
AS

if (@item_id <> 0)
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	DECLARE @char_id int
	SET @char_id =(SELECT top 1 char_id FROM user_data WHERE user_id=@to_name and [delete_date] = 0 and [delete_complete_date] = 0)
	IF @char_id >0 BEGIN
		DECLARE @dbid bigint
		INSERT INTO user_item (char_id,name_id,amount,slot,warehouse) VALUES (@char_id,@item_id,@item_amount,'0',5)
		SET @dbid = @@IDENTITY;
		IF @enchant > 0 OR @mana_stone > 0 OR @god_stone > 0 BEGIN

			IF @mana_stone_count = 0 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,0,0,0,0,0,0,@god_stone,0)
			END
			ELSE IF @mana_stone_count = 1 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,@mana_stone,0,0,0,0,0,@god_stone,0)
			END
			ELSE IF @mana_stone_count = 2 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,0,0,0,0,@god_stone,0)
			END
		    ELSE IF @mana_stone_count = 3 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,0,0,0,@god_stone,0)
			END
			ELSE IF @mana_stone_count = 4 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,0,0,@god_stone,0)
			END
			ELSE IF @mana_stone_count = 5 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,0,@god_stone,0)
			END
			ELSE IF @mana_stone_count = 6 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id,stat_enchant_name0,stat_enchant_name1,stat_enchant_name2,stat_enchant_name3,stat_enchant_name4,stat_enchant_name5,proc_tool_nameid,option_count) 
				VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, @enchant, @item_id,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@mana_stone,@god_stone,0)
			END
		END

		INSERT INTO user_mail (to_id,to_name,from_id,from_name,title,content,item_id,item_nameid,item_amount,express_mail) 
		VALUES (@char_id,@to_name,0,@from_name,@title,N'请查收系统发你的物品',@dbid,@item_id,@item_amount,1)

        select N'发送给[ '+@to_name+N' ]的物品成功'
	END ELSE BEGIN 
        select N'发送失败，角色名不存在：' + @to_name
END
	SET NOCOUNT OFF;
END
procedures.aion_GetVendorItemListCharDark_20160122:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetVendorItemListCharDark_20160122]
	@userId	INT,
	@warehouse	TINYINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
SET ROWCOUNT 50	
SELECT vendor_item_dark.id, user_item.id, user_item.name_id, vendor_item_dark.user_price, 
	vendor_item_dark.sale_price, vendor_item_dark.commit_amount, 
	vendor_item_dark.remain_amount, vendor_item_dark.commit_date,
	vendor_item_dark.can_buy_partial,
	isnull(user_item_option.soul_bound,0), isnull(user_item_option.enchant_count,0), isnull(user_item_option.skin_name_id,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name0,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name1,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),	
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.vanish_point,0),	
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.option_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.keyNameId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillGroup,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillLevel,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.equipLevelDown, 0)
FROM	vendor_item_dark(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN	user_item(NOLOCK) ON vendor_item_dark.user_item_id = user_item.id 
left join user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse) AND (user_item.char_id = @userId)
SET ROWCOUNT 0
SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyCompoundItems:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyCompoundItems]
	@char_id nvarchar(20)
as
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	SELECT	-- user_item (메인무기)
			i1.id, i1.char_id, i1.name_id, i1.slot_id, i1.amount, i1.slot, i1.warehouse, convert(nvarchar,i1.create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,i1.update_date,21 ) AS update_date, i1.producer, i1.tid, i1.expired_time, i1.buy_amount, i1.buy_duration, i1.main_item_dbid, i1.dynamic_property, i1.import_id, i1.export_id, i1.server_of_origin
			-- user_item_option
			, o1.soul_bound, o1.enchant_count, o1.skin_name_id, o1.stat_enchant_name0, o1.stat_enchant_name1, o1.stat_enchant_name2, o1.stat_enchant_name3, o1.stat_enchant_name4, o1.stat_enchant_name5, o1.option_count, o1.dye_info, o1.proc_tool_nameid, o1.obtain_skin_type, o1.expire_skin_time, o1.expire_dye_time, ISNULL(o1.random_option,0) AS random_option
			, ISNULL(o1.limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(o1.reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
			, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
			, ISNULL(o1.authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(o1.vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
			-- 4.5 17차 깃털
			, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
			-- [4.71] 모조신석
			, ISNULL(o1.proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(o1.proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
			-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
			, ISNULL(o1.exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(o1.exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(o1.exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(o1.exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
			-- [4.9] 최강무기스킬
			, ISNULL(o1.baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
			-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
			, ISNULL(o1.enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(o1.enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
			-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
			, ISNULL(o1.equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
			, ISNULL(o1.wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
			-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
			, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(o1.randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(o1.randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(o1.randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(o1.randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(o1.randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
			, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(o1.randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(o1.randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(o1.randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(o1.randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(o1.randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(o1.randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			-- user_item (보조무기)
			, i2.id sub_id, i2.name_id sub_name_id
			-- user_item_option
			, o2.enchant_count AS sub_enchant_count, o2.skin_name_id AS sub_skin_name_id
			, o2.stat_enchant_name0 AS sub_stat_enchant_name0, o2.stat_enchant_name1 AS sub_stat_enchant_name1, o2.stat_enchant_name2 AS sub_stat_enchant_name2, o2.stat_enchant_name3 AS sub_stat_enchant_name3, o2.stat_enchant_name4 AS sub_stat_enchant_name4, o2.stat_enchant_name5 AS sub_stat_enchant_name5
			, ISNULL(o2.random_option,0) AS sub_random_option
			-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화 (보조무기)
			, ISNULL(o2.enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as sub_enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(o2.enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as sub_enhanceSkillLevel
			-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
			, ISNULL(o2.equipLevelDown, 0) as sub_equipLevelDown
			, ISNULL(o2.wardrobeSlotId, 0) as sub_wardrobeSlotId
			-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
			, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr1, 0) as sub_randomAttr1, ISNULL(o2.randomValue1, 0) as sub_randomValue1, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr2, 0) as sub_randomAttr2, ISNULL(o2.randomValue2, 0) as sub_randomValue2, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr3, 0) as sub_randomAttr3, ISNULL(o2.randomValue3, 0) as sub_randomValue3, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr4, 0) as sub_randomAttr4, ISNULL(o2.randomValue4, 0) as sub_randomValue4, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr5, 0) as sub_randomAttr5, ISNULL(o2.randomValue5, 0) as sub_randomValue5
			, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr6, 0) as sub_randomAttr6, ISNULL(o2.randomValue6, 0) as sub_randomValue6, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr7, 0) as sub_randomAttr7, ISNULL(o2.randomValue7, 0) as sub_randomValue7, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr8, 0) as sub_randomAttr8, ISNULL(o2.randomValue8, 0) as sub_randomValue8, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr9, 0) as sub_randomAttr9, ISNULL(o2.randomValue9, 0) as sub_randomValue9, ISNULL(o2.randomAttr10, 0) as sub_randomAttr10, ISNULL(o2.randomValue10, 0) as sub_randomValue10
	FROM	user_item i1 (nolock)
	JOIN	user_item i2 (nolock) ON i1.id = i2.main_item_dbid and i2.char_id = @char_id
	LEFT JOIN user_item_option o1 (nolock) ON i1.id = o1.id and o1.char_id = i1.char_id
	LEFT JOIN user_item_option o2 (nolock) ON i2.id = o2.id and o2.char_id = i2.char_id
	LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i1.id = f.id
	LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i1.id = a.id
	WHERE	i1.char_id = @char_id
	and		i2.main_item_dbid != 0
	and		i2.warehouse = 16

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetInstanceCondition]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@current_time			int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT world_num, variable, value FROM world_extcondition WHERE world_type = 1 and world_num IN (SELECT instance_id FROM instance WHERE validity_time > @current_time)
END
procedures.GM_ChallengeTaskDA_SrchChallengeTaskQues:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_ChallengeTaskDA_SrchChallengeTaskQuestByUnionId]
	@union_id	int
AS
BEGIN
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	SELECT	union_id,	-- challenge_task
			challenge_task_id, quest_id, q.complete_count	-- challenge_task_quest
	FROM	challenge_task t
	JOIN	challenge_task_quest q ON q.challenge_task_id = t.id
	WHERE	union_id = @union_id

	set nocount off
END

procedures.aion_Today_Abyss_Kill:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
Create PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_Today_Abyss_Kill]
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	DECLARE @temp TABLE
	(
		user_id int,
		user_name NVARCHAR(25),
		user_race int,
		user_kill_cnt int,
		kill_cnt int,	
		from_name NVARCHAR(25),	
		mail_title NVARCHAR(25),
		mail_centent NVARCHAR(255),
		item_id int,
		item_count int
	);
	--大于250奖励
	INSERT INTO @temp(user_id, user_name, user_race, user_kill_cnt, kill_cnt, from_name, mail_title, mail_centent, item_id, item_count)
	select char_id, user_id, race, today_abyss_kill_cnt, 250, N'人头奖励', N'杀死 250 人奖励', N'请查收以下物品', 188051885, 1
	from user_data 
	where today_abyss_kill_cnt >= 250 and DateDiff(dd,last_login_time,getdate())=0
	order by today_abyss_kill_cnt desc;
	--大于200奖励
	INSERT INTO @temp(user_id, user_name, user_race, user_kill_cnt, kill_cnt, from_name, mail_title, mail_centent, item_id, item_count)
	select char_id, user_id, race, today_abyss_kill_cnt, 200, N'人头奖励', N'杀死 200 人奖励', N'请查收以下物品', 186000030, 1
	from user_data 
	where today_abyss_kill_cnt >= 200 and DateDiff(dd,last_login_time,getdate())=0
	order by today_abyss_kill_cnt desc;

	--大于150奖励
	INSERT INTO @temp(user_id, user_name, user_race, user_kill_cnt, kill_cnt, from_name, mail_title, mail_centent, item_id, item_count)
	select char_id, user_id, race, today_abyss_kill_cnt, 150, N'人头奖励', N'杀死 150 人奖励', N'请查收以下物品', 188051720, 1
	from user_data 
	where today_abyss_kill_cnt >= 150 and DateDiff(dd,last_login_time,getdate())=0
	order by today_abyss_kill_cnt desc;

	--大于100奖励
	INSERT INTO @temp(user_id, user_name, user_race, user_kill_cnt, kill_cnt, from_name, mail_title, mail_centent, item_id, item_count)
	select char_id, user_id, race, today_abyss_kill_cnt, 100, N'人头奖励', N'杀死 100 人奖励', N'请查收以下物品', 186000031, 1
	from user_data 
	where today_abyss_kill_cnt >= 100 and DateDiff(dd,last_login_time,getdate())=0
	order by today_abyss_kill_cnt desc;

	--大于50奖励
	INSERT INTO @temp(user_id, user_name, user_race, user_kill_cnt, kill_cnt, from_name, mail_title, mail_centent, item_id, item_count)
	select char_id, user_id, race, today_abyss_kill_cnt, 50, N'人头奖励', N'杀死 50 人奖励', N'请查收以下物品', 186000051, 1
	from user_data 
	where today_abyss_kill_cnt >= 50 and DateDiff(dd,last_login_time,getdate())=0
	order by today_abyss_kill_cnt desc;

	select * from @temp order by user_kill_cnt desc

	DECLARE
		@user_id AS INT,
		@user_name AS NVARCHAR(20),
		@user_race AS INT,
		@user_kill_cnt AS INT,
		@kill_cnt  AS INT,
		@from_name AS NVARCHAR(25),	
		@mail_title AS NVARCHAR(25),
		@mail_centent AS NVARCHAR(255),
		@item_id AS INT,
		@item_count AS INT;
	    

	WHILE EXISTS(SELECT user_name FROM @temp)
	BEGIN
		SET ROWCOUNT 1

		SELECT @user_id= user_id, @user_name= user_name, @user_race= user_race,@user_kill_cnt= user_kill_cnt,@kill_cnt= kill_cnt,@from_name= from_name,@mail_title= mail_title,@mail_centent= mail_centent,@item_id= item_id,@item_count= item_count FROM @temp;

		DECLARE @string NVARCHAR(512)

		SET @string = 'EXEC [dbo].[aion_SendMailItem] N'''+@user_name+''', N'''+ @from_name +''', N'''+@mail_title+''', N'''+@mail_centent+''', '+convert(NVARCHAR,@item_id)+', '+convert(NVARCHAR,@item_count)+', 0'
	     
		if exists (select char_id from user_data where user_id = @user_name)
			EXEC(@string)
		else
			print @string

		SET ROWCOUNT 0
	    
		DELETE FROM @temp WHERE user_name=@user_name and item_id=@item_id  and kill_cnt=@kill_cnt;
	END

	SET NOCOUNT OFF;
END

procedures.GM_ForbiddenWordDA_SrchForbiddenWord:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_ForbiddenWordDA_SrchForbiddenWord]
			@world_id nvarchar(3),
			@forbidden_word nvarchar(30),
			@forbidden_type nvarchar(2),
			@is_like nvarchar(2),			
			@forbidden_reason nvarchar(3),
			@status nvarchar(1),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000), @tmp int
						
			set @sql = 'select top ' + @view_count +
					   ' forbidden_id, forbidden_type, forbidden_reason, is_like, world_id, forbidden_word, status, login_id, login_nm, regdate' +
					   ' from forbidden_word (nolock)' +
					   ' where FORBIDDEN_ID not in (select top ' + @top_count + ' FORBIDDEN_ID from forbidden_word(nolock) where world_id='''+@world_id+''' '
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' and status = '''+@status+''' and is_like = '''+@is_like+''' '				
			
			IF @forbidden_type != '3'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and forbidden_type = '''+@forbidden_type+''''	
			END 
			
			IF @forbidden_reason != '100'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and forbidden_reason = '''+@forbidden_reason+''''	
			END 
								   			
			IF @forbidden_word != 'null'
			BEGIN				
				set @sql = @sql + ' and forbidden_word like N''%'+@forbidden_word+'%'''
			END 
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by FORBIDDEN_ID desc) '
			
			IF @forbidden_type != '3'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and forbidden_type ='+@forbidden_type+''				
			END 			
					
			set @sql = @sql + ' and status = '''+@status+''' and is_like = '''+@is_like+''' ' 			
			set @sql = @sql + ' and world_id = '''+@world_id+''''
			
			
			IF @forbidden_reason != '100'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and forbidden_reason = '''+@forbidden_reason+''''
			END 
					   			
			IF @forbidden_word != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and forbidden_word like N''%'+@forbidden_word+'%'''		
			END 			
										
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by FORBIDDEN_ID desc'	
							
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
procedures.aion_SetInstanceExtraCountAbyssOP:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetInstanceExtraCountAbyssOP]
	@charId			INT,
	@mapNumber		INT,
	@extraCount		TINYINT,
	@nextResetTime	BIGINT
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON
	IF @mapNumber = 0
		UPDATE user_instance_extracount
		SET next_reset_time = 0
		WHERE char_id = @charId
	ELSE
		IF EXISTS (SELECT map_number FROM user_instance_extracount (UPDLOCK) WHERE char_id = @charId AND map_number = @mapNumber) 
			UPDATE user_instance_extracount
			SET extra_count_abyssop = @extraCount,
				next_reset_time = @nextResetTime
			WHERE char_id = @charId AND map_number = @mapNumber
		ELSE
			INSERT INTO user_instance_extracount VALUES(@charId, @mapNumber, @extraCount, @nextResetTime)

	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END
procedures.aion_RegisterGameMoneyTradePhase2:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<bluewing,,ByungJun>
-- Create date: <20124/04/19,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_RegisterGameMoneyTradePhase2] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@id bigint, 
	@seller int,
	@qina bigint,
	@request_id nvarchar(64)
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	If EXISTS(Select id From game_money_trade with (nolock) Where id=@id and seller=@seller and qina=@qina and state IS NULL)
	Begin
		Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set state=1, register_date=GETDATE(), request_id=@request_id Where id=@id
		If @@ROWCOUNT = 1
			return 0
		Else
			return -2 -- Fail to update
	End
	Else
	Begin
		return -1	-- Can't find 
	End
END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharID]
			@char_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			-- 키나
			SELECT	1 as 'sort', i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, p.name_id as 'polish_name_id', p.random_id, p.polish_point
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_polish p (nolock) ON i.id = p.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	(i.char_id = @char_id) and i.name_id=182400001 and warehouse=0

			-- 압류
			UNION ALL
			SELECT	2 as 'sort', i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, p.name_id as 'polish_name_id', p.random_id, p.polish_point
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5

					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point

procedures.aion_GetInvalidGuildList:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_GetInvalidGuildList    스크립트 날짜: 2006-02-20 오후 7:52:57 ******/


CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetInvalidGuildList]
as
set nocount on

select id
from guild g
where (g.master_id = 0 and g.delete_requested = 0) 
	or (g.master_id not in (select char_id from user_data where delete_complete_date=0)	)

set nocount off
procedures.GM_GuildDA_SrchGuild:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_GuildDA_SrchGuild]
			@world_id nvarchar(5),
			@guild_nm nvarchar(32),
			@guild_cond nvarchar(1),
			@race nvarchar(5),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1200)
			declare @sql_tmp nvarchar(100)
			
			set @sql_tmp = ''
			
			IF @race != 'null' 
			BEGIN
				set @sql_tmp = ' and t2.race = '''+@race+''''
			END 
			
			IF @guild_nm != 'null' and @guild_cond = '2'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_tmp = @sql_tmp + ' and t1.level = '''+@guild_nm+''''
			END 

			set @sql =	' select top ' + @view_count +
						' t1.level, count(t1.id) cnt , (select user_id from user_data t3 where t1.master_id=t3.char_id) user_id, ' +
						' (select account_id from user_data t3 where t1.master_id=t3.char_id) account_id, ' +
						' (select account_name from user_data t3 where t1.master_id=t3.char_id) account_name, ' +
						' t1.id, t1.name, t1.master_id, t1.rank, t1.point, t1.fund, t1.delete_requested, t1.delete_time, ' +
						' t2.race, t2.org_server ' +
						' , t1.point_max_time ' +
						' from guild t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) ' +
						' where t2.org_server='''+@world_id+''' '+@sql_tmp+' and t1.id=t2.guild_id and t1.id not in (select top ' + @top_count + ' t1.id from guild t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) ' +
						' where t2.org_server='''+@world_id+''' '+@sql_tmp+' and t1.id=t2.guild_id and t1.master_id=t2.char_id order by t1.id desc) '
			
			IF @guild_nm != 'null' and @guild_cond = '0'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t1.name = N'''+@guild_nm+''''
			END
			
			IF @guild_nm != 'null' and @guild_cond = '1'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.user_id = N'''+@guild_nm+''''
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' group by t1.level, t1.id, t1.name, t1.master_id, t1.rank, t1.point, t1.fund, t1.delete_requested, t1.delete_time, t2.race, t2.org_server, t1.point_max_time '
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t1.id desc '
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
procedures.aion_escrowadditem:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_escrowadditem]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@charid int, 
	@itemid bigint,
	@itemamount bigint
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here        
	update user_item set warehouse = 154 where id = @itemid
	insert into user_escrow (seller, qina, itemid, itemamount, buyer, state, registerdate) values (@charid, 0, @itemid, @itemamount, 0, 1, GETDATE())
	
	IF @@ERROR <> 0
		return 0
	return @@identity
END

procedures.aion_GetVendorItemListCharLight:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetVendorItemListCharLight]
	@userId	INT,
	@warehouse	TINYINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
SET ROWCOUNT 50	
SELECT vendor_item_light.id, user_item.id, user_item.name_id, vendor_item_light.user_price, 
	vendor_item_light.sale_price, vendor_item_light.commit_amount, 
	vendor_item_light.remain_amount, vendor_item_light.commit_date,
	isnull(user_item_option.soul_bound,0), isnull(user_item_option.enchant_count,0), isnull(user_item_option.skin_name_id,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name0,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name1,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),	
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.vanish_point,0),	
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.option_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.keyNameId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0)
FROM	vendor_item_light(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN	user_item(NOLOCK) ON vendor_item_light.user_item_id = user_item.id 
left join user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse) AND (user_item.char_id = @userId)
SET ROWCOUNT 0
SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.aion_GetItem:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_GetItem  ******/
-- 최종 수정일 : 2013/11/14 bluewing

/* 아이템 DB ID로 아이템을 가져온다. */
/* user_item_option이 추가 되면서 limit_Enchant_option 추가*/
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetItem]
	@userItemDbId	bigint
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

SELECT   a.id, name_id, slot_id,  amount, tid, slot, isnull(soul_bound, 0), isnull(enchant_count,0), ISNULL(skin_name_id,0),
	ISNULL(b.stat_enchant_name0, 0), 
	ISNULL(b.stat_enchant_name1, 0), 
	ISNULL(b.stat_enchant_name2, 0), 
	ISNULL(b.stat_enchant_name3, 0), 
	ISNULL(b.stat_enchant_name4, 0), 
	ISNULL(b.stat_enchant_name5, 0), 
	ISNULL(option_count, 0),
	ISNULL(dye_info, 0), ISNULL(proc_tool_nameid, 0), producer, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration,
	ISNULL(obtain_skin_type, 0), ISNULL(expire_skin_time, 0), ISNULL(expire_dye_time, 0) AS expire_dye_time,
	ISNULL(random_option, 0) AS random_option,
	ISNULL(limit_enchant_count, 0) AS limit_enchant_count,
	ISNULL(reidentify_count, 0) as reidentify_count,	
	ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count,
	ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point,
	ISNULL(b.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(b.option_prob_addition, 0)
FROM      user_item a left join  user_item_option b on a.id = b.id
WHERE   (a.id = @userItemDbId) 
SET NOCOUNT OFF

procedures.aion_escrowaddqina:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_escrowaddqina]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@charid int, 
	@qina bigint,
	@decrease int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    declare @itemid int, @amount bigint
    if @decrease = 1
    begin
		select @itemid = id, @amount = amount from user_item(updlock) where char_id=@charid and name_id=182400001 and warehouse=0
		
		if (@amount < @qina)
		begin
			return -2
		end
		
		if @itemid is null or @itemid <= 0 
		begin 
			return -1
		end
		
		update user_item set amount = amount - @qina where id = @itemid
	end
	
	insert into user_escrow (seller, qina, itemid, itemamount, buyer, state, registerdate) values (@charid, @qina, 0, 0, 0, 1, GETDATE())
	
	IF @@ERROR <> 0
		return 0
		
	return @@identity
END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharIDandDBID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharIDandDBID]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@db_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			SELECT  i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id
					, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21) create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21) update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property
					, option_count, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count
					, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	i.char_id = @char_id and i.id = @db_id

procedures.GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildApplicationsList:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildApplicationsList]
			@guild_id nvarchar(10),
			@view_count int,
			@top_count int
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			select top(@view_count) t1.delete_type, t1.delete_complete_date, t1.delete_date, t1.org_server, t1.cur_server, isnull(t1.login_server, t1.org_server) login_server
					, t1.char_id, t1.user_id, t1.account_id, t1.account_name, t1.race, t1.class, t1.gender, t1.lev, t1.world, convert(nvarchar,t1.last_logout_time,20 ) last_logout_time,
					case WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' and last_logout_time > '2007-12-12 00:00:00.000' THEN '#339900'
						 WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'  THEN 'brown'
						 WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' THEN 'black'
						 end as logonoff
					, t2.applicant_intro, t2.apply_time
			from	user_data t1(nolock) LEFT JOIN user_guild_join_application t2(nolock) on t1.char_id = t2.char_id
			where	t2.guild_id=@guild_id and t2.char_id not in (select top(@top_count) char_id from user_guild_join_application(nolock) where guild_id=@guild_id order by char_id asc) order by t2.char_id asc

procedures.aion_escrowset:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_escrowset]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@escId int,
	@state int,
	@buyer int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    declare @orgState int
    declare @qina bigint, @item bigint
    select @qina = qina, @item = itemid, @orgState = state from user_escrow where ID = @escId
    
    if @orgState is null
		return -1
		
	if @orgState <> 1 
		return -2
		
	if @qina = 0 and @item <> 0
	begin 
		declare @warehouse int
		select @warehouse = warehouse from user_item (updlock) where id = @item
		
		if @warehouse is null
			return -3
		
		if @warehouse <> 154
			return -4		
		
		update user_item set warehouse = 0, char_id = 0 where id = @item	-- 기존에 있던 아이템의 warehouse를 변경. 혹시 모를 소유주 문제를 피하기 위해서 소유주도 변경.
	end
	
	update user_escrow set state = @state, buyer = @buyer, completedate = GETDATE() where ID = @escId
	return 0
END
procedures.aion_SetItemDropCtrlInfo:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_GetItemDropCtrlList    스크립트 날짜: 2009-09-10 오후 4:35:56 ******/


CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetItemDropCtrlInfo]
	@item_id			int,
	@item_cur_count		int,
	@next_reset_time	bigint
AS
BEGIN TRANSACTION

set nocount on
IF EXISTS (SELECT item_name_id FROM item_drop_ctrl(UPDLOCK) WHERE item_name_id=@item_id)
begin
	UPDATE item_drop_ctrl
	SET cur_count = @item_cur_count, next_reset_time = @next_reset_time
	WHERE item_name_id = @item_id
end
else
begin
	INSERT item_drop_ctrl(item_name_id, cur_count, next_reset_time)
	VALUES (@item_id, @item_cur_count, @next_reset_time)	
end
set nocount off

COMMIT TRANSACTION

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharIDandWareh:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharIDandWarehouse]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@db_id nvarchar(20),
			@warehouse nvarchar(3)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000)

			set @sql =	-- user_item
						'SELECT	i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin ' +
						-- user_item_option
						'		, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count,ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count ' +
						'		, ISNULL(f.freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
						'		, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
						-- 4.5 17차 깃털
						'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
						-- [4.71] 모조신석
						'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
						-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
						'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
						-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
						'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
						'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
						'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown ' +
						'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId ' +
						-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
						' FROM	user_item i (nolock) ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id ' +
						' WHERE	(i.char_id = '''+@char_id+''') and warehouse='''+@warehouse+''' '
						
			IF (@db_id <> 'null')
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and i.id='''+@db_id+''''
			END 
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

		b.attribute6, b.attribute6value
from	user_item_attribute b with(index(PK_user_item_attribute), nolock) 
join	vendor_item_dark a with (nolock)
		on b.id = a.user_item_id
	--select a.user_item_id, b.name_id, b.random_id, b.polish_point  from vendor_item_dark a join user_item_polish b on a.user_item_id = b.id
else
	select	b.id, 
		b.attribute1, b.attribute1value, 
		b.attribute2, b.attribute2value, 		
		b.attribute3, b.attribute3value, 
		b.attribute4, b.attribute4value, 
		b.attribute5, b.attribute5value, 
		b.attribute6, b.attribute6value
from	user_item_attribute b with(index(PK_user_item_attribute), nolock) 
join	vendor_item_dark a with (nolock)
		on b.id = a.user_item_id
where	a.char_id = @ownerId 
	--select a.user_item_id, a.user_item_id, b.name_id, b.random_id, b.polish_point from vendor_item_dark a join user_item_polish b on (a.user_item_id = b.id and a.char_id = @ownerid)
