CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildByID]
			@guild_id nvarchar(10)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			SELECT	g.level, g.officer_right, g.member_right, g.id, g.name, g.master_id, g.rank, g.point, g.fund, g.delete_requested, g.delete_time
					, g.notice1, g.notice2, g.notice3, g.notice4, g.notice5, g.notice6, g.notice7
					, g.noticetime1, g.noticetime2, g.noticetime3, g.noticetime4, g.noticetime5, g.noticetime6, g.noticetime7
					, ISNULL(u.user_id, 0) as user_id, ISNULL(u.account_id, 0) as account_id, ISNULL(u.account_name, '') as account_name, ISNULL(u.race, 0) as race
					, g.point_max_time
					-- [4.9] 길드 자동 가입 관련
					, g.intro, g.join_process_type, g.join_restrict_level
			FROM	guild g(nolock)
			LEFT JOIN	user_data u(nolock) ON g.master_id = u.char_id and g.id = u.guild_id
			WHERE	g.id = @guild_id
procedures.aion_FinishGameMoneyTrade:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<bluewing,,ByungJun>
-- Create date: <20124/04/19,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_FinishGameMoneyTrade] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@request_id nvarchar(64),
	@eventType tinyint,	-- NP_AUCTION_TYPE_SUCCESSFUL_BID=1, NP_AUCTION_TYPE_TIMEOUT_SALE=2, NP_AUCTION_TYPE_CANCEL_SALE=3, NP_AUCTION_TYPE_FAIL_BID=4
	@seller int,
	@buyer int,
	@state smallint OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	declare @id bigint
	declare @oldBuyer int
	declare @reward_seller tinyint
	
	set @state = 0	--존재하지 않는 항목일 경우, 아래 if문에 의해서 @state가 세팅되지 않고 반환되는 것을 미리 막기
	
	Select @id=id, @state=state, @oldBuyer=ISNULL(buyer, 0), @reward_seller=ISNULL(reward_seller, 0) From game_money_trade with (nolock) Where request_id=@request_id and state=1;

	If @id<>0
	Begin
		if @eventType = 1
		begin 
			if @seller <> 0 and @buyer = 0 and @oldBuyer = 0		-- 거래 완료, 판매쪽 처리 중, 구매쪽 처리 미완료
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set reward_seller=1 Where id=@id;
			else if @seller <> 0 and @buyer = 0 and @oldBuyer <> 0	-- 거래 완료, 판매쪽 처리 중, 구매쪽 처리 완료
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set state=2, complete_date=GETDATE(), reward_seller=1 Where id=@id;
			else if @seller = 0 and  @buyer <> 0 and @reward_seller = 0	-- 거래 완료, 구매쪽 처리 중, 판매쪽 처리 미완료
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set buyer=@buyer Where id=@id;
			else if @seller = 0 and @buyer <> 0 and @reward_seller = 1	-- 거래 완료, 구매쪽 처리 중, 판매쪽 처리 완료
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set state=2, complete_date=GETDATE(), buyer=@buyer Where id=@id;
		end
		else if @eventType = 2
		begin
			if @seller <> 0
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set state=-1, complete_date=GETDATE() Where id=@id;
		end
		else if @eventType = 3	-- 판매 취소는 거래가 진행되지 않았을 때만 허용함
		begin
			if @seller <> 0 and @state = 1 and @reward_seller = 0
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set state=-2, complete_date=GETDATE() Where id=@id;
		end
		else if @eventType = 4	-- 구매 실패라고 해도 판매자에게 보상 가기 전까지만 허용함
		begin
			if @buyer <> 0 and @state = 1 and @oldBuyer <> 0 and @reward_seller=0
				Update game_money_trade with (updlock) set state=-3, complete_date=GETDATE() Where id=@id;
		end
	
		If @@ROWCOUNT = 1
		begin
			Select @state=state From game_money_trade with (nolock) Where id=@id
			return 0
		end
		Else
			return -2 -- Fail to update
	End
	Else
	Begin
		return -1	-- Can't find 
	End
END
procedures.aion_SetItemDye_20111227:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetItemDye_20111227] 
	@itemId		bigint,
	@dyeInfo	int,
	@expireDyeTime	int
AS

declare @nCharId int

/*
select @nCharId = char_id  from user_item_option where id = @itemId
if (@nCharId is not null)
begin
	update user_item_option set dye_info = @dyeInfo, expire_dye_time = @expireDyeTime where ID = @itemid
end
else
begin
	select @nCharId = char_id  from user_item where id = @itemId
	insert into user_item_option (id, char_id,dye_info, expire_dye_time) values (@itemId, @nCharId, @dyeInfo, @expireDyeTime)
end

SET NOCOUNT OFF
*/
SET NOCOUNT ON

if EXISTS (select id  from user_item_option (UPDLOCK) where id = @itemId) 
	begin
		update user_item_option set dye_info = @dyeInfo, expire_dye_time = @expireDyeTime where ID = @itemid
	end
else
	begin
		select @nCharId = char_id  from user_item where id = @itemId
		insert into user_item_option (id, char_id,dye_info, expire_dye_time) values (@itemId, @nCharId, @dyeInfo, @expireDyeTime)
		if @@ERROR <> 0
		begin
			update user_item_option set dye_info = @dyeInfo, expire_dye_time = @expireDyeTime where ID = @itemid
		end
	end
	
SET NOCOUNT OFF

procedures.aion_GetVendorItemListCharLight_20160122:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetVendorItemListCharLight_20160122]
	@userId	INT,
	@warehouse	TINYINT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
SET ROWCOUNT 50	
SELECT vendor_item_light.id, user_item.id, user_item.name_id, vendor_item_light.user_price, 
	vendor_item_light.sale_price, vendor_item_light.commit_amount, 
	vendor_item_light.remain_amount, vendor_item_light.commit_date,
	vendor_item_light.can_buy_partial,
	isnull(user_item_option.soul_bound,0), isnull(user_item_option.enchant_count,0), isnull(user_item_option.skin_name_id,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name0,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name1,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name2,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name3,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name4,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.stat_enchant_name5,0),	
	isnull(user_item_option.option_count,0),
	isnull(user_item_option.dye_info,0), isnull(user_item_option.proc_tool_nameid,0), user_item.producer, 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.expire_dye_time, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.limit_enchant_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.random_option,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.reidentify_count, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.authorize_count, 0), 
	ISNULL(user_item_option.vanish_point,0),	
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enchant_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.option_prob_addition, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.keyNameId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedState, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillGroup,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillLevel,0),
	ISNULL(user_item_option.equipLevelDown, 0)
FROM	vendor_item_light(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN	user_item(NOLOCK) ON vendor_item_light.user_item_id = user_item.id 
left join user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id
WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse) AND (user_item.char_id = @userId)
SET ROWCOUNT 0
SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharIDandWareh:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyItemByCharIDandWarehouseRange]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@from_warehouse nvarchar(3),
			@to_warehouse nvarchar(3)
		AS
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			SELECT	-- item
					i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse
					, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time
					, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin
					-- item_option
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id
					, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5
					, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count
					, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	i.char_id = @char_id and (warehouse between @from_warehouse and @to_warehouse)

					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown

					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_polish p (nolock) ON i.id = p.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	i.char_id = '+ CONVERT(varchar,@char_id) +'
			AND		i.id IN ('+ @csv_item_ids+ ')'
			
			EXEC (@query)

procedures.aion_forbiddenlist:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_forbiddenlist]
	@type	int
AS

-- 2016년 7월 6일 09시 기준
-- 이름변경시 유지 1년 -> 60일
declare @applyDate datetime = Cast('2016-07-06 09:00:00' as datetime)

set nocount on
	if @type=1	
		select forbidden_word, forbidden_type*10+forbidden_reason as relate from forbidden_word with(nolock) where STATUS=0 and IS_LIKE=0
	if @type=2
		select forbidden_word, forbidden_type*10+forbidden_reason as relate from forbidden_word with(nolock) where STATUS=0 and IS_LIKE=1
	if @type=3
		select forbidden_char, forbidden_type*10+forbidden_reason as relate from forbidden_char with(nolock) where status=0 and (forbidden_reason in (3,4))
			and ((REGDATE < @applyDate and datediff(d, regdate, getdate()) < 366) or (datediff(d, regdate, getdate()) < 61))

set nocount off
procedures.aion_RemoveItemBind:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_RemoveItemBind]
	@nId			bigint,
	@nRemoveWarehouse int
as
set nocount on
BEGIN TRANSACTION
DELETE FROM user_item_bind WHERE item_id = @nId
-- 이미 바인드에서 빠진 경우에 warehouse중복처리되지 않도록
IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 0
	BEGIN
		UPDATE user_item SET warehouse = @nRemoveWarehouse, update_date = GETDATE() WHERE id = @nId
		COMMIT TRANSACTION
		RETURN 0
	END
ELSE
	BEGIN
		ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
		RETURN 1
	END
set nocount off

		ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId1, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId2, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.exceedSkillId3, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.baseSkillId, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillGroup,0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.enhanceSkillLevel,0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.equipLevelDown, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr1, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue1, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr2, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue2, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr3, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue3, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr4, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue4, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr5, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue5, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr6, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue6, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr7, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue7, 0),
		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr8, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue8, 0),

		ISNULL(user_item_option.randomAttr10, 0), ISNULL(user_item_option.randomValue10, 0)
	FROM	vendor_item_light(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN	user_item(NOLOCK) ON vendor_item_light.user_item_id = user_item.id 
	left join user_item_option on user_item.id = user_item_option.id
	WHERE (user_item.warehouse = @warehouse) AND (user_item.char_id = @userId)

procedures.GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildItem:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildItem]
			@guild_id nvarchar(20),
			@warehouse nvarchar(2)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off

			SELECT	i.producer, i.tid, i.expired_time, i.buy_amount, i.buy_duration, i.id, i.name_id, i.amount, i.slot, i.warehouse
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option
					, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(o.authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(o.vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	guild g (nolock), user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and i.char_id = o.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	g.id = @guild_id and g.id = i.char_id and (i.warehouse = @warehouse or i.warehouse = '53')
procedures.aion_GetAbnormalStatusList:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_GetAbnormalStatusList    스크립트 날짜: 2006-02-20 오후 7:52:56 ******/

CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetAbnormalStatusList]
	@nCharId int
as
SET NOCOUNT ON

declare @useTime int
declare @cd int
declare @sk int = 12885
while(@sk < 12895)
begin
if (EXISTS(SELECT * FROM user_abnormal_status WHERE skill_id = @sk AND char_id = @nCharId))
BEGIN
	 SELECT @cd = effect_remain2, @useTime = logout_time FROM user_abnormal_status WHERE skill_id = @sk AND char_id = @nCharId
	 declare @reTime int
	 set @reTime = (dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0) - @useTime) * 1000
	 if (@cd > @reTime)
	 Begin
	   UPDATE user_abnormal_status SET effect_remain2 = @cd - @reTime, effect_remain3 = @cd - @reTime, effect_remain4 = @cd - @reTime WHERE skill_id = @sk AND char_id = @nCharId
	 end
	 else 
	 Begin
	   DELETE FROM user_abnormal_status WHERE skill_id = @sk AND char_id = @nCharId
	 End
END
set @sk = @sk + 1
end

SELECT skill_id, skill_level, target_slot, effect_remain1, effect_remain2, effect_remain3, effect_remain4, interval_value1, interval_value2, interval_value3, interval_value4 
FROM user_abnormal_status
WHERE char_id=@nCharId
set nocount off

	@nRollbackWarehouse int
as
set nocount on

UPDATE user_item SET warehouse = @nRollbackWarehouse, update_date = GETDATE() WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT item_id FROM user_item_bind)
DELETE FROM user_item_bind
IF @@ERROR = 0
	BEGIN
		COMMIT TRANSACTION
		RETURN 0
	END
ELSE
	BEGIN
		ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
		RETURN 1
	END

procedures.GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildMembers:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_GuildDA_SrchGuildMembers]
			@guild_id nvarchar(10),
			@view_count int,
			@top_count int
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			select top(@view_count) t1.org_server, t1.char_id, t1.user_id, t1.account_id, t1.account_name, t1.race, t1.class, t1.gender, t1.guild_rank, t1.guild_intro, t1.guild_nickname, t1.lev, convert(nvarchar,t1.last_logout_time,20 ) last_logout_time,
					case WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' and last_logout_time > '2007-12-12 00:00:00.000' THEN '#339900'
						 WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'  THEN 'brown'
						 WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' THEN 'black'
						 end as logonoff
			from	user_data t1(nolock)
			where	t1.guild_id=@guild_id and t1.char_id not in (select top(@top_count) char_id from user_data(nolock) where guild_id=@guild_id order by char_id asc) order by t1.char_id asc

procedures.aion_AddCharRankPoint:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_AddCharRankPoint]
	@char_id int,
	@rank_id int,
	@point_to_add int
as 
begin
	set nocount on;
	IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM user_rank WHERE char_id = @char_id AND rank_id = @rank_id)
	begin
		UPDATE user_rank SET point = point + @point_to_add WHERE char_id = @char_id AND rank_id = @rank_id
	end
	ELSE
	begin
		INSERT INTO user_rank(char_id, rank_id, point) VALUES (@char_id, @rank_id, @point_to_add)
	end
	set nocount off;
end

procedures.GM_house_give:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_house_give] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@addrId int,
	@ownerId int,
	@ownerName NVARCHAR(32) OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	declare @ret int
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	if exists (select addr_id from house_field with(updlock) where addr_id = @addrId and state = 2)	--No Owner상태인 집이 있고
	begin
		if exists (select addr_id from house_field where owner_id = @ownerId) -- 소유한 집은 없어야 하며
		begin
			set @ret = 2
		end
		else
		begin
			if exists (select ID from user_auction where buyerID = @ownerId and state =1) -- 현재 상위 입찰인 집도 없어야 한다.
			begin
				set @ret = 3
			end
			else
			begin
				if exists (select ID from house_instant where id = @ownerId and state = 5)
				begin
					set @ret = 0
					
					exec aion_deleteAuctionBetting @ownerid

					SELECT @ownerName = user_id FROM user_data WITH (nolock) WHERE char_id = @ownerId					

					update house_field set owner_id = @ownerId, state = 5, owner_name = @ownerName where addr_id = @addrId
					
					declare @lastcharge int
									
					select @lastcharge=max(lastcharge) from house_field
					
					exec aion_SetHouseFieldCharge @addrid, 1, 0, @lastcharge
				end
				else
				begin 
					set @ret = 4
				end
			end
		end
	end 		
	else	
		set @ret = 1
	
	return @ret
	
END
procedures.aion_GetAbyssRankingNew:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetAbyssRankingNew]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@nServerId			int,
	@nRace				int,
	@nNum				int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	DECLARE @update_time BIGINT
	SET @update_time = (SELECT max(update_time) FROM abyss_ranking WHERE race = @nRace and server_id = @nServerId)

	SELECT TOP(@nNum) abyss_ranking, abyss_ranking.char_id, user_data.user_id, abyss_ranking.class, user_data.gender, abyss_ranking.lev, abyss_ranking.abyss_point, abyss_ranking.gp, update_time, ISNULL(guild.name, ''), old_ranking
	FROM abyss_ranking(nolock)
	JOIN user_data with (nolock) on abyss_ranking.char_id = user_data.char_id
	LEFT JOIN guild with (nolock) on abyss_ranking.guild_id = guild.id
	WHERE update_time = @update_time 
	AND abyss_ranking.race = @nRace
	AND abyss_ranking.server_id = @nServerId
	ORDER BY abyss_ranking

END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyPetItem:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyPetItem]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@from_warehouse nvarchar(3),
			@to_warehouse nvarchar(3)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			SELECT	-- user_item
					i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin
					-- user_item_option
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	i.char_id = @char_id and (warehouse between @from_warehouse and @to_warehouse)

procedures.aion_SetItemExpiredTime:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetItemExpiredTime]
	@nDBId		bigint,
	@nExpiredTime	int
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

	DECLARE @nTTL int
	DECLARE @result int
	SELECT @nTTL = Expired_Time FROM user_item(updlock) WHERE id = @nDBId
	
	-- if the 'time to live' is positive, the timer has already been activated.
	IF @nTTL >= 0 RETURN @nTTL

	SET @result = @nExpiredTime - @nTTL
	UPDATE user_item SET Expired_Time = @result WHERE id = @nDBId

	RETURN @result

SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckCo:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckConn_ORS] 
	@fromServerId	int,
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64),
	@ret			int	output,
	@err_str	nvarchar(256) output
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;

set @ret = 0
set @err_str = ''

print 'Check ServerConnection To ServerId(' + + cast(@fromServerId as nvarchar) + ')'

declare @connectString	nvarchar(256)
set @connectString = ''

declare @serverName  nvarchar(128)
set @serverName = ''
declare @databaseName  nvarchar(64)
set @databaseName = ''
select @serverName = datasource, @databaseName = database_name from AionAddedService_Servername where server_id = @fromServerId
if @@rowcount = 0
begin
	set @ret = -1
	set @err_str = 'Cannot find serverName of server Id(' + cast(@fromServerId as nvarchar) + ')'
	print @err_str
	return
end

declare @db_info nvarchar(256)
set @db_info = '''' + @serverName + ''';''' + @db_userId + ''';''' + @db_passwd + ''''

declare @retVal int
declare @sql	nvarchar(4000)
set @sql = 'select @retVal = result from openrowset (''SQLOLEDB'', ' + @db_info
			+ ', '''+ @databaseName +'.dbo.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckConn_local_ORS'' )'
exec sp_executesql @sql, N'@retVal int output', @retVal output

if @@error <> 0
begin
	set @ret = -2;
	set @err_str = 'Connection Error!!! to serverName of server Id(' + cast(@fromServerId as nvarchar) + ')'
end

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyPolishedItems:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyPolishedItems]
			@char_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	-- user_item
					i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin
					-- user_item_option
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- user_item_polish
					, p.name_id as 'polish_name_id', p.random_id, p.polish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_polish p (nolock) ON i.id = p.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	i.char_id = @char_id
			AND		(i.warehouse = 0/*인벤*/ OR i.warehouse BETWEEN 20 AND 49/*펫*/ OR i.warehouse BETWEEN 60 AND 79/*하우스*/)
			AND		(i.name_id BETWEEN 100000000 AND 102999999	/*무기만 연마가능*/)
			ORDER BY i.id DESC

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchAllHouseList:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchAllHouseList]
			@race nvarchar(300),
			@size nvarchar(300),
			@state nvarchar(300),
			@user_id nvarchar(20),
			@account_name nvarchar(30),
			@obj_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(3000)
			
			set @sql = 'select t2.user_id, isnull(t2.org_server,0) as org_server,' +
			't1.*, '+
			't3.id as auction_id, t3.race, t3.sellerid, t3.sellername, t3.buyerid, t3.buyername, t3.qina, t3.stepqina, t3.createtime, t3.betCount, t3.lastupdate,'+
			't4.land_nameid, t4.world_id, t4.center_x, t4.center_y, t4.center_z '+			
			'from house_field t1(nolock) left outer join user_data t2(nolock) on t1.owner_id=t2.char_id ' +
			'left outer join user_auction t3 on t1.addr_id=t3.goodsid and (t3.state=0 or t3.state=1)'+
			' join house_addrinfo t4 on t1.addr_id=t4.addr_id '+
			'left outer join user_auctionfilter t5 on t1.addr_id=t5.goodsID '+
			'where t5.goodsID is null '
			
			if @race != ''
			begin
				set @sql = @sql + 'and ' + @race
			end
			
			if @size != ''
			begin
				set @sql = @sql + 'and ' + @size
			end
			
			if @state = '(t1.state=6)'
				set @sql = @sql + 'and t1.chargeCount <= 0'
			else 
			begin
				if @state != ''
				begin
					set @sql = @sql + 'and ' + @state
				end
			end
			
			if @user_id is not null
			begin
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.user_id=''' + @user_id + ''' '
			end
			
			if @account_name is not null
			begin
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.account_name=''' + @account_name + ''' '
			end

			if @obj_id != 0
			begin
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t1.addr_id=' + @obj_id
			end

			print @sql
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off

	@fromUid		int,
	@fromRace		int,
	@ret			int	output
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;

set @ret = 0

declare @char_count int
declare @count int
set @count = 0

select @count = count(*) from user_data (nolock) where account_id = @fromUid and delete_complete_date = 0 and race <> @fromRace
if @count <> 0
begin 
	set @ret = -10002	-- 복수 Race	
end

					from user_data with (nolock)
					where account_id = @fromUid and delete_complete_date = 0)

if @char_count >= 10
	set @ret = -10018	-- 캐릭터 생성 제한 숫자를 초과

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchAuctionHistory:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchAuctionHistory]
			@type		int,	-- 1: house
			@goodsID	int		-- addr_id
		AS
		BEGIN
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	id, type, race, goodsID, sellerID, sellerName, buyerID, buyerName, 
					InitQina, qina, stepQina, state, lastUpdate, CreateTime, BetCount

procedures.aion_SetItemExportFlag:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		spinel
-- Create date: 2010.11.10
-- Description:	인터서버 아이템 거래 (수출)
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetItemExportFlag]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@exportid		bigint OUTPUT,
	@id				bigint,
	@exportto		int,
	@date			int	
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT id FROM user_item(updlock) WHERE id = @id AND export_id <> 0)
	BEGIN
		INSERT export_item_log(item_id, export_to_sv, export_to_id, export_date) VALUES (@id, @exportto, 0, @date)
		SET @exportid = @@IDENTITY
		UPDATE user_item SET export_id = @exportid WHERE id = @id
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SET @exportid = 0
	END	
END
procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOr:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOrgChar_local_ORS] 
	@fromServerId		int,
	@toServerId		int,
	@orgCharId		int,
	@orgCharName	nvarchar(20),
	@premium		int,
	@withAccountWarehouse int,
	@byOnline		int
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;

declare @ret	int
set @ret = 0

declare @lev	int
declare	@delete_date	int
declare @guild	int
declare @qina_restrict_value bigint
declare @level_restrict_value int
declare @ap_restrict_value int
declare @gp_restrict_value int
declare @user_qina bigint
declare @user_mail_qina bigint
declare @warehouse_qina bigint
declare @ap	bigint
declare @user_restrict_item_cnt int
declare @vendor_item_cnt int
declare @vendor_log_item_cnt int
declare	@charName	nvarchar(20)
declare @user_restrict_recipe_cnt int
declare @last_login_time datetime
declare @last_logout_time datetime
declare @house_count int
declare @escrow_count int
declare @house_auction_count int
declare @buddy_count int
declare @account_id int
declare @gp bigint
declare @ownership_bonus_gp int


declare @realtime_move_char_status int

set @realtime_move_char_status = (select user_state from user_server_transfer with (nolock) where char_id = @orgCharId)

-- Max Qina 제한값 얻어오기
set @qina_restrict_value = (select value from 
(select top (1) item_name_id, value , world_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
where
RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
and
service_type in (0,2)
and
type = 2
and 
service_class_type = @premium
and
world_id in (0, @toServerId)
and
start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
order by world_id desc) as b)

-- min level 제한값 얻어오기
set @level_restrict_value = (select value from 
(select top (1) item_name_id, value , world_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
where
RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
and
service_type in (0,2)
and
type = 4
and
world_id in (0, @toServerId)
and 
service_class_type = @premium
and
start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
order by world_id desc) as b)

-- ap 제한값 얻어오기
set @ap_restrict_value = (select value from 
(select top (1) item_name_id, value , world_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
where
RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
and
service_type in (0,2)
and
type = 3
and
world_id in (0, @toServerId)
and 
service_class_type = @premium
and
start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
order by world_id desc) as b)


-- gp 제한값 얻어오기
/*
set @gp_restrict_value = (select value from 
(select top (1) item_name_id, value , world_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
where
RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
and
service_type in (0,2)
and
type = 6
and
world_id in (0, @toServerId)
and 
service_class_type = @premium
and
start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
order by world_id desc) as b)
*/


set @lev = 0
select @lev = lev, @delete_date = delete_date, @guild = guild_id, @ap = abyss_point, @charName = user_id, @last_login_time= last_login_time, @last_logout_time = last_logout_time, @account_id=account_id   from user_data (nolock) where char_id = @orgCharId
if @lev <> 0
begin
	if @charName <> @orgCharName and not exists(select id from user_name_change_log where char_id = @orgCharId and old_name = @orgCharName)
		set @ret = -10103
	--if (@last_login_time > @last_logout_time or @last_logout_time > dateadd(mi, -10, GetDate()) ) set @ret = -100
	--if (@byOnline != 0 and @realtime_move_char_status != 1) set @ret = -101
	if (@level_restrict_value is not null and @lev < @level_restrict_value)	set @ret = -10001	-- 레벨 제한 조건 불충족
	if @guild <> 0		set @ret = -10003	-- guild에 가입해 있음
	if @delete_date<> 0	set @ret = -10009	-- 삭제 대기 또는 삭제 상태임
	if (@ap_restrict_value is not null and @ap > @ap_restrict_value) set @ret = -10004	-- AP 제한 조건 불충족
	
	select @gp = ISNULL(glory_point, 0), @ownership_bonus_gp = ISNULL(ownership_bonus_gp, 0) from user_gp_data where char_id = @orgCharId
	--if (@gp > @gp_restrict_value) set @ret = -10016
	if (@ownership_bonus_gp > 0 ) set @ret = -10017

	if exists(select * from user_punishment where char_id = @orgCharId and status = 0 and ((play_block = 1 and end_date > GETDATE()) or (play_block = 0 and Remain_Minute > 0)) and (punish_code != 101 and punish_code != 102))
		set @ret = -10010	-- 제재 상태에 있음

	set @user_qina = (select ISNULL(sum(amount), 0)
	from user_item with (nolock)
	where char_id = @orgCharId and name_id = 182400001
	and warehouse in (0, 1))

	set @user_mail_qina = (select ISNULL(sum(money), 0) from user_mail with (nolock) where to_id = @orgCharId)
	

	if @withAccountWarehouse > 0 
	begin
		set @warehouse_qina = (select ISNULL(sum(amount), 0)
		from user_item with (nolock)
		where char_id = @account_id and name_id = 182400001
		and warehouse in (6, 7))
	end
	else begin
		set @warehouse_qina = 0
	end	
	
	declare @sum_sold_price bigint
	set @sum_sold_price = 0

	select @sum_sold_price = @sum_sold_price + CAST(ISNULL(SUM(sold_price - after_fee), 0) AS bigint)
	from vendor_log_dark with (nolock) where char_id = @orgCharId

	select @sum_sold_price = @sum_sold_price + CAST(ISNULL(SUM(sold_price - after_fee), 0) AS bigint)
	from vendor_log_light with (nolock) where char_id = @orgCharId
	
	set @user_qina = @user_qina + @user_mail_qina + @warehouse_qina + @sum_sold_price

	if (@qina_restrict_value is not null and @user_qina is not null and @user_qina >= @qina_restrict_value)
	begin
		set @ret = -10005	-- qina 제약에 걸림
	end


	set @user_restrict_item_cnt = (select count(*) from (
	select restricted_item.item_name_id as name_id, restricted_item.value as item_count, * from restricted_item with (nolock)
	join (
		select max(world_id) as restrict_world_id, item_name_id as restrict_item_name_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
		where
		RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
		and
		service_type in (0,2)
		and
		type = 1
		and
		world_id in (0, @toServerId)
		and
		service_class_type = @premium
		and
		start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
		group by item_name_id) as b
	on restricted_item.item_name_id = b.restrict_item_name_id and restricted_item.world_id = b.restrict_world_id
	where
	RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
	and
	service_type in (0,2)
	and
	type = 1
	and 
	service_class_type = @premium
	and
	restricted_item.world_id in (0, @toServerId)
	and
	start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
	) as a
	join (select name_id, sum(amount) as amount from (Select * From user_item  with (nolock) where char_id = @orgCharId) as tmpItem Where warehouse in (0, 1, 4, 5, 154) or (warehouse between 30 and 49) or (warehouse between 60 and 79)  group by name_id) as u
	on a.item_name_id = u.name_id and a.item_count <= u.amount)

	if @user_restrict_item_cnt > 0
		set @ret = -10006	-- Item 제약에 걸림

	set @user_restrict_recipe_cnt = (select count(*) from (
	select restricted_item.item_name_id as name_id, * from restricted_item with (nolock)
	join (
		select max(world_id) as restrict_world_id, item_name_id as restrict_item_name_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
		where
		RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
		and
		service_type in (0,2)
		and
		type = 5
		and
		service_class_type = @premium
		and
		world_id in (0, @toServerId)
		and
		start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
		group by item_name_id) as b
	on restricted_item.item_name_id = b.restrict_item_name_id and restricted_item.world_id = b.restrict_world_id
	where
	RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
	and
	service_type in (0,2)
	and
	type = 5
	and
	service_class_type = @premium
	and
	restricted_item.world_id in (0, @toServerId)
	and
	start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
	) as a
	join (select recipe_id from user_recipe with (nolock) where char_id = @orgCharId) as u
	on a.item_name_id = u.recipe_id)

	if @user_restrict_recipe_cnt > 0
		set @ret = -10012	-- recipe 제약에 걸림


	if @withAccountWarehouse > 0
	begin
		set @user_restrict_item_cnt = (select count(*) from (
		select restricted_item.item_name_id as name_id, restricted_item.value as item_count, * from restricted_item with (nolock)
		join (
			select max(world_id) as restrict_world_id, item_name_id as restrict_item_name_id from restricted_item with (nolock)
			where
			RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
			and
			service_type in (0,2)
			and
			type = 1
			and
			service_class_type = @premium
			and
			world_id in (0, @toServerId)
			and
			start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
			group by item_name_id) as b
		on restricted_item.item_name_id = b.restrict_item_name_id and restricted_item.world_id = b.restrict_world_id
		where
		RESTRICT_STATUS = 1
		and
		service_type in (0,2)
		and
		type = 1
		and
		service_class_type = @premium
		and
		restricted_item.world_id in (0, @toServerId)
		and
		start_date <= getdate() and (end_date is null or getdate() < end_date)
		) as a
		join (select name_id, sum(amount) as amount from (Select * From user_item  with (nolock) where char_id = @account_id) as tmpItem Where warehouse in (6,7) group by name_id) as u
		on a.item_name_id = u.name_id and a.item_count <= u.amount)

		if @user_restrict_item_cnt > 0
			set @ret = -10006	-- Item 제약에 걸림
	end

/* 
-- 벤더에 등록된 아이템이 있는지 확인
*/
/*
	set @vendor_item_cnt = 0
	set @vendor_item_cnt = (select count(*)
						from vendor_item_dark with (nolock)
						where char_id = @orgCharId)

	if @vendor_item_cnt > 0
		set @ret = -10007	-- 벤더 등록 아이템 존재

	set @vendor_item_cnt = (select count(*)
						from vendor_item_light with (nolock)
						where char_id = @orgCharId)

	if @vendor_item_cnt > 0
		set @ret = -10007	-- 벤더 등록 아이템 존재
		

-- 정산 안한 아이템이 있는지 확인
	set @vendor_log_item_cnt = 0;
	set @vendor_log_item_cnt = (select count(*)
						from vendor_log_dark with (nolock)
						where char_id = @orgCharId)

	if @vendor_log_item_cnt > 0
		set @ret = -10008	-- 정산 안한 아이템 존재

	set @vendor_log_item_cnt = (select count(*)
						from vendor_log_light with (nolock)
						where char_id = @orgCharId)

	if @vendor_log_item_cnt > 0
		set @ret = -10008	-- 정산 안한 아이템 존재
*/

/* 
-- 일반형 하우스 있는지 여부 확인
*/
	set @house_count = 0;
	set @house_count = (select count(*)
						from house_field with (nolock)
						where owner_id = @orgCharId)

	if @house_count > 0
		set @ret = -10011	-- 일반형 하우스 있음
		
/* 
-- escrow 에 등록된 것이 있는지 여부 확인
*/
	set @escrow_count = 0;
	set @escrow_count = (select count(*)
						from user_escrow with (nolock)
						where seller = @orgCharId and state = 1)

	if @escrow_count > 0
		set @ret = -10014	-- escrow리스트에 있음
		
/*
-- 경매 등록 상태 체크
   - 경매에 올린 상태: sellerID , state = 0
   - 경매 입찰 상태: buyerID, state = 1
*/
	set @house_auction_count = 0;
	set @house_auction_count = (select COUNT(*)
								from user_auction with (nolock)
								where (sellerID = @orgCharId and state = 0) or (buyerID = @orgCharId and state = 1))
	
	if 	@house_auction_count > 0
		set @ret = -10013
		

	
	if exists (select complete_date from game_money_trade where seller =  @orgCharId and complete_date is NULL) 
		set @ret = -10105

		

	
/*
-- 서버간 친구 있는지 여부 확인

*/		
/*
	set @buddy_count = 0;
	set @buddy_count = (select count(*)
						from user_buddy_inter with (nolock)
						where char_id = @orgCharId)

	if @buddy_count > 0
		set @ret = -10015	-- 서버간 친구 리스트가 있음
*/		

end
else
begin
	set @ret = -10103	-- 캐릭터 없음
end

select @ret as result

end
procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMySealedItems:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMySealedItems]
			@char_id nvarchar(20)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	-- user_item
					i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin
					-- user_item_option
					, soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option
					, sealexpiredtime, sealstate, expire_dye_time
					, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count
					, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate
					, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point
					-- 4.5 17차 깃털
					, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value
					-- [4.71] 모조신석
					, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag
					-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
					, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3
					-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
					, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId
					-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
					, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel
					-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
					, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown
					, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId
					-- [6.2] 아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
					, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5
					, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10
			FROM	user_item i (nolock)
			JOIN	user_item_sealed s (nolock) ON s.id = i.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id
			LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id
			WHERE	i.char_id = @char_id
			and		i.warehouse! = 10

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchAuctionHistoryByBuyerID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchAuctionHistoryByBuyerID]
			@type		int,	-- 1: house
			@buyerID	int		-- char_id
		AS
		BEGIN
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

			SELECT	id, type, race, goodsID, sellerID, sellerName, buyerID, buyerName, 
					InitQina, qina, stepQina, state, lastUpdate, CreateTime, BetCount
			FROM	user_auction (nolock)

procedures.aion_SetItemExportFlagEx:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		spinel
-- Create date: 2010.11.10
-- Description:	인터서버 아이템 거래 (수출)
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetItemExportFlagEx]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@exportid		bigint,
	@id				bigint,
	@exportto		int,
	@exporttoid		bigint,
	@date			int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	
	IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM export_item_log(updlock) WHERE id = @exportid)
		UPDATE export_item_log SET export_to_id = @exporttoid WHERE id = @exportid
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		INSERT export_item_log(item_id, export_to_sv, export_to_id, export_date) VALUES (@id, @exportto, @exporttoid, @date)
		UPDATE user_item SET export_id = @@IDENTITY WHERE id = @id
	END	
END
procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOr:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOrgChar_ORS] 
	@fromServerId	int,
	@toServerId	int,
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64),
	@orgCharId		int,
	@orgCharName	nvarchar(20),
	@premium		int,
	@withAccountWarehouse int,
	@byOnline		int,
	@ret			int	output
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;

declare @connectString	nvarchar(256)
set @connectString = ''

declare @serverName  nvarchar(128)
set @serverName = ''
declare @databaseName  nvarchar(64)
set @databaseName = ''
select @serverName = datasource, @databaseName = database_name from AionAddedService_Servername where server_id = @fromServerId
if @@rowcount = 0
begin
	set @ret = -10101
	return
end

declare @db_info nvarchar(256)
set @db_info = '''' + @serverName + ''';''' + @db_userId + ''';''' + @db_passwd + ''''

declare @retVal int
declare @sql	nvarchar(4000)
set @sql = 'select @retVal = result from openrowset (''SQLOLEDB'', ' + @db_info
			+ ', ''' + @databaseName + '.dbo.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOrgChar_local_ORS ' + cast(@fromServerId as nvarchar) 
			+ ', ' + cast(@toServerId as nvarchar) 
			+ ', ' + cast(@orgCharId as nvarchar) 
			+ ', ''''' + @orgCharName + ''''' '
			+ ', ' + CAST(@premium as nvarchar)
			+ ', ' + CAST(@withAccountWarehouse as nvarchar)
			+ ', ' + cast(@byOnline as nvarchar) + ''' )'
--print @sql
exec sp_executesql @sql, N'@retVal int output', @retVal output
if @@error <> 0 set @ret = -10102;
else set @ret = @retVal

return

(
	@dbId			bigint,
	@ownerId		int,
	@customvalue	int
)
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
if exists (select id from user_item_ext(UPDLOCK) where id = @dbId) 
	begin
		update user_item_ext set sa_custom1 = @customvalue, char_id = @ownerId where id = @dbId

	end

procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_DeleteO:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_DeleteOrgChar_local_ORS] 
	@toServerId	int,
	@fromServerId	int,
	@orgCharId		int,
	@orgCharName	nvarchar(20)
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;

declare @ret int
set @ret = 0

if @orgCharId <> 0
begin
	-- 캐릭터 이름을 다른 사람이 다시 사용하지 못 하도록 forbidden_char에 추가
	insert into forbidden_char (
				FORBIDDEN_TYPE, FORBIDDEN_REASON, WORLD_ID,
				FORBIDDEN_CHAR, FORBIDDEN_ACCOUNT_NM,
				[STATUS], LOGIN_ID, LOGIN_NM, REGDATE)
	values(1, 3, @fromServerId, @orgCharName, '', 0, 'AddedService', 'Type4_MoveServer', GetDate())

	if @@error <> 0	or @@rowcount = 0
	begin 
		set @ret = -11029	-- Forbidden_char Insert Error!!!
		GOTO send_result
	end

	-- 캐릭터 삭제 처리
	declare @delete_date int
	set @delete_date = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(getutcdate(), 0);

	update user_data 
		set delete_date = @delete_date, 
			delete_complete_date = @delete_date, 
			delete_type	= @toServerId	-- 캐릭터 이전으로 인한 삭제 이전한 곳의 ServerId를 넣어 준다.
		where char_id = @orgCharId

	if @@error <> 0	or @@rowcount = 0
	begin
		set @ret = -11030
		goto send_result
	end

	-- Item Table에서 Vendor에 있는 항목들을 모두 인벤토리로 옮김
	-- 옮겨간 캐릭터가 올려 놓은 목록이 없도록.
	update user_item 
		set warehouse = 0 
		where char_id = @orgCharId and warehouse = 4

	-- Vendor Table에서 삭제
	delete vendor_item_light where char_id = @orgCharId

	delete vendor_item_dark where char_id = @orgCharId

end

send_result:
select @ret as result
procedures.aion_ResetFinishedRepeatQuestList:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_ResetFinishedRepeatQuestList]
	@questlist		nvarchar(max),
	@userId			int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	
	declare @sql nvarchar(max)
		
	set @sql = 'UPDATE user_finished_quest '
				+ 'SET repeat_quest_count = 0 '
				+ ' WHERE char_id = ' + cast(@userId AS nvarchar(20))+' AND quest_id IN ( ' + @questlist + ')'

	exec sp_executesql @sql
	
END

procedures.GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyWarehouseItems:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDA_SrchMyWarehouseItems]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@warehouse nvarchar(5),
			@uid nvarchar(1000),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000)
			declare @sql_where nvarchar(1500)
			
			set @sql_where = ' '
			
			IF @warehouse = '17'
				set @sql_where = @sql_where + 'where (warehouse='''+@warehouse+''') and i.char_id='''+@char_id+''' and main_item_dbid != 0 '
			ELSE IF @warehouse = '7'
				set @sql_where = @sql_where + 'where (warehouse='''+@warehouse+''' or warehouse=57) and i.char_id='''+@char_id+''' '
			ELSE IF @warehouse = '6'
				set @sql_where = @sql_where + 'where (warehouse='''+@warehouse+''' or warehouse=56) and i.char_id='''+@char_id+''' '
			ELSE
				set @sql_where = @sql_where + 'where (warehouse='''+@warehouse+''') and i.char_id='''+@char_id+''' '
			
			IF @uid != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_where = @sql_where + ' and ('+@uid+') '
			END

			set @sql =  'SELECT	TOP ' + @view_count +
						-- user_item
						'		i.id, i.char_id, i.name_id, slot_id, amount, slot, warehouse, convert(nvarchar,create_date,21 ) AS create_date, convert(nvarchar,update_date,21 ) AS update_date, producer, tid, expired_time, buy_amount, buy_duration, main_item_dbid, dynamic_property, import_id, export_id, server_of_origin, ' +
						-- user_item_option
						'		soul_bound, enchant_count, skin_name_id, stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, ISNULL(random_option,0) AS random_option, ISNULL(limit_enchant_count,0) AS limit_enchant_count, ISNULL(reidentify_count,0) AS reidentify_count ' +
						'		, ISNULL(freetradestate, 0) as freetradestate ' +
						'		, ISNULL(authorize_count, 0) as authorize_count, ISNULL(vanish_point, 0) as vanish_point ' +
						-- 4.5 17차 깃털
						'		, ISNULL(attribute1, 0) as attribute1, ISNULL(attribute1value, 0) as attribute1value, ISNULL(attribute2, 0) as attribute2, ISNULL(attribute2value, 0) as attribute2value, ISNULL(attribute3, 0) as attribute3, ISNULL(attribute3value, 0) as attribute3value, ISNULL(attribute4, 0) as attribute4, ISNULL(attribute4value, 0) as attribute4value, ISNULL(attribute5, 0) as attribute5, ISNULL(attribute5value, 0) as attribute5value, ISNULL(attribute6, 0) as attribute6, ISNULL(attribute6value, 0) as attribute6value ' +
						-- [4.71] 모조신석
						'		, ISNULL(proc_break_count, 0) as proc_break_count, ISNULL(proc_break_flag, 0) as proc_break_flag ' +
						-- [4.75] 돌파스킬
						'		, ISNULL(exceedState, 0) as exceedState, ISNULL(exceedSkillId1, 0) as exceedSkillId1, ISNULL(exceedSkillId2, 0) as exceedSkillId2, ISNULL(exceedSkillId3, 0) as exceedSkillId3 ' +
						-- [4.9] 최강무기 스킬
						'		, ISNULL(baseSkillId, 0) as baseSkillId' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템으로 스킬 강화
						'		, ISNULL(enhanceSkillGroup, 0) as enhanceSkillGroup, ISNULL(enhanceSkillLevel, 0) as enhanceSkillLevel ' +
						-- [5.0] 아이템 레벨 다운
						'		, ISNULL(equipLevelDown, 0) as equipLevelDown' +
						'		, ISNULL(wardrobeSlotId, 0) as wardrobeSlotId' +
						-- [6.2]아이템 랜덤 옵션 (새로운 것)
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr1, 0) as randomAttr1, ISNULL(randomValue1, 0) as randomValue1 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr2, 0) as randomAttr2, ISNULL(randomValue2, 0) as randomValue2 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr3, 0) as randomAttr3, ISNULL(randomValue3, 0) as randomValue3 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr4, 0) as randomAttr4, ISNULL(randomValue4, 0) as randomValue4 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr5, 0) as randomAttr5, ISNULL(randomValue5, 0) as randomValue5 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr6, 0) as randomAttr6, ISNULL(randomValue6, 0) as randomValue6 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr7, 0) as randomAttr7, ISNULL(randomValue7, 0) as randomValue7 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr8, 0) as randomAttr8, ISNULL(randomValue8, 0) as randomValue8 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr9, 0) as randomAttr9, ISNULL(randomValue9, 0) as randomValue9 ' +
						'		, ISNULL(randomAttr10, 0) as randomAttr10, ISNULL(randomValue10, 0) as randomValue10 ' +
						' FROM	user_item i (nolock) ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_option o (nolock) ON i.id = o.id and o.char_id = i.char_id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_freeTrade f (nolock) on i.id = f.id ' +
						' LEFT JOIN user_item_attribute a (nolock) on i.id = a.id ' +
						+ @sql_where
			set @sql = @sql + ' and i.id not in (select top ' + @top_count + ' id from user_item(nolock) i '+@sql_where+' order by id desc) '
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by i.id desc'
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_OnLine_:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_OnLine_Execute_ORS] 
	@serviceId	int,
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64),
	@ret	int	output,
	@err_str	nvarchar(50) output
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;

--declare @ret	int
--declare @err_str	nvarchar(256)

declare @checkConnectServerId	int
declare @checkError	int
declare @toServer	int
declare	@serverId	int

set @ret=0
set @checkError = 0
set @err_str = 'Process'

select @checkConnectServerId = fromServer, @toServer = toServer  from AionAddedService (nolock)
where serviceType = 4 and serviceFlag = 0 and status = 0 and idx = @serviceId

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckConn_ORS @checkConnectServerId, @db_userId, @db_passwd, @ret output, @err_str output
if @ret != 0
begin
	set @checkError = 1
	print @err_str
end

if @checkError <> 0
begin
	set @ret=-100
	RAISERROR('CheckConn Error!!!', 1, 1)
	return
end

declare	@idx	int
declare	@fromServer	int
declare @fromCharId	int
declare @fromCharName	nvarchar(20)
declare @toCharId	int
declare @toCharName	nvarchar(20)
declare @fromUid	int
declare @fromRace	int

declare @linkedServerName nvarchar(50)
declare @retVal	int
declare @retStatus int
declare @newCharId int

declare @serviceType int
declare @preminum int
declare @withAccountWarehouse int

-- 우선은 status 는 고려하지 말자...
select @idx = idx, @fromServer = fromServer, @fromCharId = fromCharacterId, @fromCharName = fromCharacter, @toCharId = toCharacterId, @toCharName = toCharacter, @fromUid = fromUid, @fromRace = fromRace, @serviceType=serviceType, @withAccountWarehouse=warehouse  from AionAddedService (nolock)
where (serviceType = 4 or serviceType = 14) and serviceFlag = 0 and status = 0 and idx = @serviceId


set @newCharId = @toCharId
set @retStatus = -1
set @err_str = 'No success'

if @serviceType = 8  
begin
	set @preminum = 1
end
else begin
	set @preminum = 0
end

--print 'start check other server'

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckLocalChar_ORS @fromUid, @fromRace, @retVal output
if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOrgChar_ORS @fromServer, @toServer, @db_userId, @db_passwd, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @preminum, @withAccountWarehouse, 1, @retVal output
if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_Process_ORS @db_userId, @db_passwd, @fromServer, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @toServer, @toCharId, @toCharName, @preminum, @withAccountWarehouse, @newCharId output, @retVal output
if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

set @retStatus = 1	-- 성공
set @err_str = 'success'

UpdateRetVal:
	update AionAddedService Set status = @retStatus, serviceFlag = @retVal, toCharacterId = @newCharId, applyDate = getdate() where idx = @idx
	set @ret = @retVal

	@charid int,
	@category int
AS
BEGIN

	-- interfering with SELECT statements.

		update user_webnotify set unsent = 0 where char_id = @charid and category = @category

END

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseAuctionForbiddenList:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseAuctionForbiddenList]
			@race nvarchar(300),
			@size nvarchar(300),
			@state nvarchar(300)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(2000)		
			
			set @sql = 'select t1.*, t2.type, t3.user_id, isnull(t3.org_server,0) as org_server,'+
			't4.land_nameid, t4.world_id, t4.center_x, t4.center_y, t4.center_z '+
			'from house_field t1(nolock) left outer join user_data t3(nolock) on t1.owner_id=t3.char_id '+
			'join house_addrinfo t4(nolock) on t1.addr_id=t4.addr_id '+
			'join user_auctionfilter t2(nolock) on t1.addr_id=t2.goodsID '+
			'where t2.type=2 and '+@race+' and ' + @size + ' and ' + @state			
						
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

			set nocount off

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetItemImportFlag]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@importid		bigint OUTPUT,
	@id				bigint,
	@importfrom		int,
	@importfromid	bigint,
	@date			int	
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT id FROM user_item(updlock) WHERE id = @id AND import_id <> 0)
	BEGIN
		INSERT import_item_log(item_id, import_from_sv, import_from_id, import_date) VALUES (@id, @importfrom, @importfromid, @date)
		SET @importid = @@IDENTITY
		UPDATE user_item SET import_id = @importid WHERE id = @id
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SET @importid = 0
	END	
END

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseByCharID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseByCharID]
		@char_id	int	
AS
BEGIN
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted			
	
	SELECT	top (1)	
			h.id, h.addr_id, h.building_nameid, 
			h.owner_id, h.owner_type, h.owner_race, h.state, h.permission, h.comment_state, 
			h.roof, h.outwall, h.frame, h.door, h.garden, h.fence, 
			h.inwall1, h.inwall2, h.inwall3, h.inwall4, h.inwall5, h.inwall6, 
			h.infloor1, h.infloor2, h.infloor3, h.infloor4, h.infloor5, h.infloor6, 
			h.addon1, h.addon2, h.addon3, 
			h.flag1, h.flag2, h.flag3, h.flag4, h.flag5, h.flag6, h.flag7, 
			h.comment, h.chargeCount, h.warningCount, h.lastCharge, 
			h.update_time, h.created_time,
			adr.land_nameid, adr.world_id, adr.center_x, adr.center_y, adr.center_z,
			a.id as 'auction_id',  a.type , a.race, 
			a.goodsID, a.sellerID, a.sellerName, a.buyerID, a.buyerName, 
			a.InitQina, a.qina, a.stepQina, a.state as 'auction_state', a.lastUpdate, a.CreateTime, a.BetCount
	FROM	house_field h (nolock)
	JOIN	
			house_addrinfo adr (nolock) ON h.addr_id = adr.addr_id
	LEFT JOIN 
			user_auction a (nolock) ON h.addr_id = a.goodsID 
	WHERE	h.owner_id = @char_id

	set nocount off	
END

procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_ORS:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_ORS] 
	@serverId	int,
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64)
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;
-- serviceType 4:캐릭터 서버이전, 14:프리미엄 캐릭터 서버이전, 16:마스터서버 캐릭터 서버이전

declare @checkConnectServerId	int
declare @ret	int
declare @err_str	nvarchar(256)
declare @checkError	int
declare @toServer	int

set @toServer = 0
select top (1) @toServer = server_id from server_info
where info_name = 'SERVER_START_TIME'
order by int_value desc


if @toServer = 0 or (@serverId <> 0 and @toServer <> @serverId)
begin
	RAISERROR('Check ServerId Error!!!', 1, 1)
	return
end

set @checkError = 0

declare checkConn_cursor	cursor for
select fromServer from AionAddedService (nolock)
where (serviceType = 4 or serviceType = 14 or serviceType = 16) and serviceFlag = 0 and status = 0 and toServer = @toServer
group by fromServer

open checkConn_cursor
fetch next from checkConn_cursor into @checkConnectServerId

while @@fetch_status = 0
begin
	exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckConn_ORS @checkConnectServerId, @db_userId, @db_passwd, @ret output, @err_str output
	if @ret != 0
	begin
		set @checkError = 1
		print @err_str
	end

	fetch next from checkConn_cursor into @checkConnectServerId
end

close checkConn_cursor
deallocate checkConn_cursor

if @checkError <> 0
begin
	RAISERROR('CheckConn Error!!!', 1, 1)
	return
end

declare	@idx	int
declare	@fromServer	int
declare @fromCharId	int
declare @fromCharName	nvarchar(20)
declare @toCharId	int
declare @toCharName	nvarchar(20)
declare @fromUid	int
declare @fromRace	int

declare @linkedServerName nvarchar(50)
declare @retVal	int
declare @retStatus int
declare @newCharId int

declare @serviceType int
declare @preminum int
declare @withAccountWarehouse int

-- 우선은 status 는 고려하지 말자...
declare moveChar_cursor cursor for
select idx, fromServer, fromCharacterId, fromCharacter, toCharacterId, toCharacter, fromUid, fromRace, serviceType, warehouse from AionAddedService (nolock)
where (serviceType = 4  or serviceType = 14 or serviceType = 16) and serviceFlag = 0 and status = 0 and toServer = @toServer

open moveChar_cursor
fetch next from moveChar_cursor	into @idx, @fromServer, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @toCharId, @toCharName, @fromUid, @fromRace, @serviceType, @withAccountWarehouse

while @@fetch_status = 0
begin
	set @newCharId = @toCharId
	set @retStatus = -1
	
	if @serviceType = 14  
	begin
		set @preminum = 1
	end
	else begin
		set @preminum = 0
	end

	exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckLocalChar_ORS @fromUid, @fromRace, @retVal output
	if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

	exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOrgChar_ORS @fromServer, @toServer, @db_userId, @db_passwd, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @preminum, @withAccountWarehouse, 0, @retVal output
	if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

	exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_Process_ORS @db_userId, @db_passwd, @fromServer, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @toServer, @toCharId, @toCharName, @preminum, @withAccountWarehouse, @newCharId output, @retVal output
	if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

	set @retStatus = 1	-- 성공

UpdateRetVal:
	update AionAddedService Set status = @retStatus, serviceFlag = @retVal, toCharacterId = @newCharId, applyDate = getdate() where idx = @idx

	fetch next from moveChar_cursor	into @idx, @fromServer, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @toCharId, @toCharName, @fromUid, @fromRace, @serviceType, @withAccountWarehouse
end

close moveChar_cursor
deallocate moveChar_cursor
procedures.aion_rollbackGameMoneyTrade:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Bluewing,,ByungJun>
-- Create date: <2014,06,23>
-- Description:	<Description,,>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_rollbackGameMoneyTrade]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@request_id nvarchar(64),
	@id bigint output, 
	@seller int output,
	@qina bigint output,
	@cash bigint output
	
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    Update game_money_trade Set state=-3, complete_date=GETDATE() Where request_id=@request_id and state=1
    If @@ROWCOUNT = 1
    Begin
		Select @id=id, @seller=seller, @qina=qina, @cash=cash From game_money_trade Where request_id=@request_id
		return 0
	End
	Else
	Begin
		return -1
	End
END

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseById:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseById]
			@id		int
		AS
		/*
			EXEC GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseById @id = 700012076
		*/
		BEGIN
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted			
			
			SELECT	top (1)	
					h.addr_id, h.building_nameid, 
					h.owner_id, h.owner_type, h.owner_race, h.state, h.permission, h.comment_state, 
					h.roof, h.outwall, h.frame, h.door, h.garden, h.fence, 
					h.inwall1, h.inwall2, h.inwall3, h.inwall4, h.inwall5, h.inwall6, 
					h.infloor1, h.infloor2, h.infloor3, h.infloor4, h.infloor5, h.infloor6, 
					h.addon1, h.addon2, h.addon3, 
					h.flag1, h.flag2, h.flag3, h.flag4, h.flag5, h.flag6, h.flag7, 
					h.comment, h.chargeCount, h.warningCount, h.lastCharge, 
					h.update_time, h.created_time,
					adr.land_nameid, adr.world_id, adr.center_x, adr.center_y, adr.center_z,
					a.id as 'auction_id',  a.type , a.race, 
					a.goodsID, a.sellerID, a.sellerName, a.buyerID, a.buyerName, 
					a.InitQina, a.qina, a.stepQina, a.state as 'auction_state', a.lastUpdate, a.CreateTime, a.BetCount
			FROM	house_field h (nolock)
			JOIN	
					house_addrinfo adr (nolock) ON h.addr_id = adr.addr_id
			LEFT JOIN 
					user_auction a (nolock) ON h.addr_id = a.goodsID 
			WHERE	h.addr_id = @id
			ORDER BY a.id DESC

			set nocount off	
		END

procedures.aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_ORS_DIR:
/*
aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_ORS 를 가져와 테스트를 위해 toServerId를 받은 값 그대로 사용하게 하는 프로시저
 : 에레슈키갈 같은 경우 여러 서버를 띄우는 관계로 toServerId가 계속 변하게 되므로 받은 값으로 체크를 안하고 그대로 사용
*/
create PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_ORS_DIRECT_TEST] 
	@serverId	int,
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64),
	@service_db_idx		int
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON;
-- serviceType 4 : 캐릭터 서버 이전 처리

declare @checkConnectServerId	int
declare @ret	int
declare @err_str	nvarchar(256)
declare @checkError	int
declare @toServer	int

/*
set @toServer = 0
select top (1) @toServer = server_id from server_info
where info_name = 'SERVER_START_TIME'
order by int_value desc


if @toServer = 0 or (@serverId <> 0 and @toServer <> @serverId)
begin
	RAISERROR('Check ServerId Error!!!', 1, 1)
	return
end
*/

set @toServer = @serverId

set @checkError = 0

select @checkConnectServerId = fromServer from AionAddedService (nolock)
where serviceType = 4 and serviceFlag = 0 and status = 0 and idx = @service_db_idx

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckConn_ORS @checkConnectServerId, @db_userId, @db_passwd, @ret output, @err_str output
if @ret != 0
begin
	set @checkError = 1
	print @err_str
end

if @checkError <> 0
begin
	RAISERROR('CheckConn Error!!!', 1, 1)
	return
end

declare	@idx	int
declare	@fromServer	int
declare @fromCharId	int
declare @fromCharName	nvarchar(20)
declare @toCharId	int
declare @toCharName	nvarchar(20)
declare @fromUid	int
declare @fromRace	int

declare @linkedServerName nvarchar(50)
declare @retVal	int
declare @retStatus int
declare @newCharId int

-- 우선은 status 는 고려하지 말자...
select @idx = idx, @fromServer = fromServer, @fromCharId = fromCharacterId, @fromCharName = fromCharacter, @toCharId = toCharacterId, @toCharName = toCharacter, @fromUid = fromUid, @fromRace = fromRace from AionAddedService (nolock)
where serviceType = 4 and serviceFlag = 0 and status = 0 and idx = @service_db_idx


set @newCharId = @toCharId
set @retStatus = -1

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckLocalChar_ORS @fromUid, @fromRace, @retVal output
if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_CheckOrgChar_ORS @fromServer, @toServer, @db_userId, @db_passwd, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @retVal output
if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

exec aion_AddedService_Type4_MoveChar_Process_ORS @db_userId, @db_passwd, @fromServer, @fromCharId, @fromCharName, @toServer, @toCharId, @toCharName, @newCharId output, @retVal output
if @retVal != 0	GOTO UpdateRetVal

set @retStatus = 1	-- 성공

UpdateRetVal:
	update AionAddedService Set status = @retStatus, serviceFlag = @retVal, toCharacterId = @newCharId, applyDate = getdate() where idx = @idx

procedures.GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseForbiddenList:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_HouseDA_SrchHouseForbiddenList]
			@race nvarchar(300),
			@size nvarchar(300),
			@state nvarchar(300)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(2000)		
			
			set @sql = 'select t1.*, t2.type, t3.user_id, isnull(t3.org_server,0) as org_server,'+
			't4.land_nameid, t4.world_id, t4.center_x, t4.center_y, t4.center_z '+
			'from house_field t1 join user_auctionfilter t2 on t1.addr_id=t2.goodsid '+
			'left outer join user_data t3 on t1.owner_id=t3.char_id '+
			'join house_addrinfo t4 on t1.addr_id=t4.addr_id '+
			'where t2.type=1 and '+@race+' and ' + @size + ' and ' + @state			
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

			set nocount off

procedures.aion_SetAbyssGuildRank:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetAbyssGuildRank]
	@nRace	int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	-----------------------------------------------------------------------
	-- GUILD RANK도 묻어갑시당.~!!~ cnation 2008.08.18
	-- GUILD RANK 업데이트 타이밍도 유저와 똑같이 같다고 함
	-- GUILD는 ServerId처리가 없으니 무시.~! (개발망에서 길드 랭크 같이 나와서 문제 될것은 없으니.)
	UPDATE guild set [old_rank] = [rank] where race = @nRace
	UPDATE guild SET [rank]=0 WHERE race = @nRace
	UPDATE guild set [rank] = RankList.rnk 
		from ( select top 50 id, rnk = RANK() over (order by point desc, point_max_time,id desc) from guild where race=@nRace order by point desc,point_max_time, id desc) as RankList 
		where guild.id = RankList.id

	delete from abyss_region_ranking
	insert into abyss_region_ranking select [rank],[old_rank],[id],[race],[level],cnt,[point],[name], dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(), 0) from guild inner join 
	(select guild_id,cnt = count(*) from user_data where guild_id !=0 group by guild_id) AS UserCount
	on guild.[id] = UserCount.guild_id
	where [rank] <= 50 and [rank]>0 order by race,[rank] 
END
