procedures.GM_UserItemDAO_UpdateItem:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDAO_UpdateItem]
			@id						bigint
			, @char_id				int
			, @amount				bigint
			, @warehouse			tinyint
			, @enchant_count		tinyint
			, @stat_enchant_name0	int
			, @stat_enchant_name1	int
			, @stat_enchant_name2	int
			, @stat_enchant_name3	int
			, @stat_enchant_name4	int
			, @stat_enchant_name5	int
			, @option_count			smallint
			, @dye_info				int
			, @proc_tool_nameid		int
			, @skin_name_id			int
			, @random_option		int
			, @authorize_count		tinyint
			, @vanish_point			int
			, @exceedState			tinyint
			, @exceedSkillId1		int
			, @exceedSkillId2		int
			, @exceedSkillId3		int
			, @baseSkillId			int
			, @enhanceSkillGroup	int
			, @enhanceSkillLevel	int
			, @equipLevelDown		int
			, @randomAttr1			int, @randomValue1			int
			, @randomAttr2			int, @randomValue2			int
			, @randomAttr3			int, @randomValue3			int
			, @randomAttr4			int, @randomValue4			int
			, @randomAttr5			int, @randomValue5			int
			, @randomAttr6			int, @randomValue6			int
			, @randomAttr7			int, @randomValue7			int
			, @randomAttr8			int, @randomValue8			int
			, @randomAttr9			int, @randomValue9			int
			, @randomAttr10			int, @randomValue10			int
		AS
		BEGIN
			-- user_item
			UPDATE	user_item
			SET		amount				= @amount
					, warehouse			= @warehouse
			WHERE	id = @id and char_id = @char_id

			-- user_item_option
			UPDATE	user_item_option
			SET		enchant_count			= @enchant_count
					, stat_enchant_name0	= @stat_enchant_name0
					, stat_enchant_name1	= @stat_enchant_name1
					, stat_enchant_name2	= @stat_enchant_name2
					, stat_enchant_name3	= @stat_enchant_name3
					, stat_enchant_name4	= @stat_enchant_name4
					, stat_enchant_name5	= @stat_enchant_name5
					, option_count			= @option_count
					, dye_info				= @dye_info
					, proc_tool_nameid		= @proc_tool_nameid
					, skin_name_id			= @skin_name_id
					, random_option			= @random_option
					, authorize_count		= @authorize_count
					, vanish_point			= @vanish_point
					, exceedState			= @exceedState
					, exceedSkillId1		= @exceedSkillId1
					, exceedSkillId2		= @exceedSkillId2
					, exceedSkillId3		= @exceedSkillId3
					, baseSkillId			= @baseSkillId
					, enhanceSkillGroup		= @enhanceSkillGroup
					, enhanceSkillLevel		= @enhanceSkillLevel
					, equipLevelDown		= @equipLevelDown
					, randomAttr1			= @randomAttr1, randomValue1			= @randomValue1
					, randomAttr2			= @randomAttr2, randomValue2			= @randomValue2
					, randomAttr3			= @randomAttr3, randomValue3			= @randomValue3
					, randomAttr4			= @randomAttr4, randomValue4			= @randomValue4
					, randomAttr5			= @randomAttr5, randomValue5			= @randomValue5
					, randomAttr6			= @randomAttr6, randomValue6			= @randomValue6
					, randomAttr7			= @randomAttr7, randomValue7			= @randomValue7
					, randomAttr8			= @randomAttr8, randomValue8			= @randomValue8
					, randomAttr9			= @randomAttr9, randomValue9			= @randomValue9
					, randomAttr10			= @randomAttr10, randomValue10			= @randomValue10
			WHERE	id = @id and char_id = @char_id

			-- user_item_option row가 없으면 insert
			if @@ROWCOUNT = 0
			INSERT	user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, skin_name_id, soul_bound, 
					stat_enchant_name0, stat_enchant_name1, stat_enchant_name2, stat_enchant_name3, stat_enchant_name4, stat_enchant_name5, 
					option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, obtain_skin_type, expire_skin_time, expire_dye_time, random_option, authorize_count, vanish_point
					, exceedState, exceedSkillId1, exceedSkillId2, exceedSkillId3, baseSkillId, enhanceSkillGroup, enhanceSkillLevel, equipLevelDown
					, randomAttr1, randomValue1, randomAttr2, randomValue2, randomAttr3, randomValue3, randomAttr4, randomValue4, randomAttr5, randomValue5
					, randomAttr6, randomValue6, randomAttr7, randomValue7, randomAttr8, randomValue8, randomAttr9, randomValue9, randomAttr10, randomValue10)
			VALUES	(@id, @char_id, @enchant_count, @skin_name_id, 0, 
					@stat_enchant_name0, @stat_enchant_name1, @stat_enchant_name2, @stat_enchant_name3, @stat_enchant_name4, @stat_enchant_name5, 
					@option_count, @dye_info, @proc_tool_nameid, 0, 0, 0, @random_option, @authorize_count, @vanish_point
					, @exceedState, @exceedSkillId1, @exceedSkillId2, @exceedSkillId3, @baseSkillId, @enhanceSkillGroup, @enhanceSkillLevel, @equipLevelDown
					, @randomAttr1, @randomValue1, @randomAttr2, @randomValue2, @randomAttr3, @randomValue3, @randomAttr4, @randomValue4, @randomAttr5, @randomValue5
					, @randomAttr6, @randomValue6, @randomAttr7, @randomValue7, @randomAttr8, @randomValue8, @randomAttr9, @randomValue9, @randomAttr10, @randomValue10)
		END

procedures.aion_SetPetitionMsg:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_SetCharLevel    스크립트 날짜: 2006-02-20 오후 7:52:57 ******/

CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetPetitionMsg]
	@nCharId	int,
	@nPetSvId	int,
	@nLocalSv	int,
	@sPetMsg	nvarchar(1024)
AS
BEGIN
SET NOCOUNT ON

IF @nPetSvId = @nLocalSv
	UPDATE user_data SET petition_msg = @sPetMsg WHERE char_id = @nCharId
ELSE
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM user_petition_msg(updlock) WHERE char_id = @nCharId AND petition_sv_id = @nPetSvId)
		UPDATE user_petition_msg SET msg = @sPetMsg WHERE char_id = @nCharId AND petition_sv_id = @nPetSvId
	ELSE
		INSERT INTO user_petition_msg VALUES (@nCharId, @nPetSvId, @sPetMsg)
END

SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

aion_MailWrite
	do write mail
INPUT
OUTPUT
return
made by
	nero
date
	2005-06-09
********************************************/
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_MailWrite_20160804]
	@to_id		int
,	@to_name 	nvarchar(20)
,	@from_id	int
,	@from_name	nvarchar(20)
,	@title		nvarchar(20)
,	@content	nvarchar(1000)
,	@item_id		bigint
,	@item_nameid	int
,	@item_amount	bigint
,	@money	bigint
,	@abyss_point	bigint
,	@warehouse	int
,	@arrive_time	int	/* 실제 유저에게 전달될 메일의 도착시간 */
,	@express_mail   int
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

if (@item_id <> 0)
begin
	update user_item
	set warehouse = @warehouse, char_id = @to_id
	where id = @item_id and char_id = @from_id
	update user_item_option set char_id = @to_id where id = @item_id and char_id = @from_id
end

insert into user_mail (to_id, to_name, from_id, from_name, title, content, item_id, item_nameid, item_amount, money, abyss_point, arrive_time, express_mail)
values (@to_id, @to_name, @from_id, @from_name, @title, @content, @item_id, @item_nameid, @item_amount, @money, @abyss_point, @arrive_time, @express_mail)

SET NOCOUNT OFF

procedures.aion_SetCharEXPS_RewardTime:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetCharEXPS_RewardTime]
	@charId int,
	@rewardTime int
as 
begin 

SET NOCOUNT ON;
	IF not exists (select char_id from user_data_ext(updlock) where char_id = @charId)
		insert into user_data_ext (char_id, exps_login_reward_time, exps_npckill_reward_num) values(@charId, @rewardTime, 0)
	ELSE
		UPDATE user_data_ext SET exps_login_reward_time = @rewardTime, exps_npckill_reward_num = 0 where char_id = @charId
end
procedures.aion_GetKinaAsset:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetKinaAsset] 
	@nCharacterId		int,
	@nAccountId			int
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
	SELECT top 1 warehouse, amount FROM user_item(nolock) WHERE char_id = @nCharacterId and name_id = 182400001 and warehouse = 0
	UNION
	SELECT top 2 warehouse, amount FROM user_item(nolock) WHERE char_id = @nAccountId and name_id = 182400001 and (warehouse = 6 OR warehouse = 7)
SET NOCOUNT OFF

procedures.GM_UserItemDAO_UpdateWarehouseDeletedIte:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserItemDAO_UpdateWarehouseDeletedItem]
			@char_id int
		   ,@db_id bigint
		   ,@warehouse tinyint
		   ,@returnValue INT OUTPUT
as

set nocount on

DECLARE @error INT
DECLARE @rowCount INT
SET @returnValue = 0

UPDATE user_item SET warehouse=@warehouse
where id=@db_id and char_id=@char_id and warehouse=10

SELECT @error = @@ERROR, @rowCount = @@ROWCOUNT
IF @error <> 0 OR @rowCount < 1
	RETURN

SET @returnValue = 1
RETURN

procedures.GM_UserChatAccusedDA_Srch:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserChatAccusedDA_Srch]
	@top_count		int,
	@page_num		int,
	@user_id		nvarchar(30),
	@account_name	nvarchar(30),
	@account_id		int,
	@char_id		int
as
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	DECLARE @query nvarchar(2000)
	DECLARE @where nvarchar(1000)
	
	if (@char_id != 0) -- 캐릭터조회 화면
	begin
		-- char_id
		SET @where = 'u.char_id = ' + convert(varchar, @char_id)
	end
	else
	begin
		SET @where = '0 < c.penalty_start_time'

		if (ISNULL(@user_id, '') != '')
		begin
			-- user_id
			SET @where = @where + ' and u.user_id = ''' + @user_id + ''' '
		end
		
		if (ISNULL(@account_name, '') != '')
		begin
			-- user_id
			SET @where = @where + ' and u.account_name = ''' + @account_name + ''' '
		end
		
		if (@account_id != 0)
		begin
			-- account_id
			SET @where = @where + ' and u.account_id = ' + convert(varchar, @account_id)
		end
	end

	-- dataset[0] data
	SET @query	= 'SELECT TOP (' + convert(varchar, @top_count) + ') '
				+ ' u.char_id, u.user_id, u.account_id, u.account_name, u.org_server, '
				+ ' c.accused_count, c.penalty_start_time, c.accused_count_penalty, c.last_accused_time '
				+ ' FROM	user_chat_accused c (nolock) '
				+ ' JOIN	user_data u (nolock) ON u.char_id = c.char_id '
				+ ' WHERE ' + @where
				+ ' AND		u.char_id NOT IN (	SELECT TOP (' + convert(varchar, @top_count * (@page_num-1)) + ') u.char_id '
				+ '								FROM	user_chat_accused c (nolock) '
				+ '								JOIN	user_data u (nolock) ON u.char_id = c.char_id '
				+ ' 							WHERE ' + @where
				+ ' 							ORDER BY u.char_id ) '
				+ ' ORDER BY u.char_id '

	-- dataset[1] total
				+ 'SELECT	COUNT(*) as total '
				+ ' FROM	user_chat_accused c (nolock) '
				+ ' JOIN	user_data u (nolock) ON u.char_id = c.char_id '
				+ ' WHERE ' + @where

	EXEC (@query)
procedures.aion_GetCharInfo_20151013:
-- SP
create PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetCharInfo_20151013]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@nCharID	int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON
	-- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT user_id, account_id, user_data.race, class, gender, 
	head_face_color, head_hair_color, head_eye_color, head_lip_color, head_face_type, head_hair_type, height_scale, head_voice_type, head_feat_type1, head_feat_type2,
	ISNULL(head_bump_type, 0), ISNULL(head_expression_type, 0),
	name_id, ISNULL(guild.id, 0) as guild_id, guild_rank, ISNULL(guild.name, '') as guild_name,  recreate_guild_time,

END

procedures.aion_GetLunaDiceGotcha:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetLunaDiceGotcha]
	@char_id int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON
	SELECT 
		open_num, 
		use_special_dice,
		recv_reward_time
	FROM 
		user_luna_dice_gotcha 
	WHERE char_id = @char_id
END
procedures.GM_UserChatAccusedDAO_InsertUpdate:
create PROC [dbo].[GM_UserChatAccusedDAO_InsertUpdate]
			@char_id				int,
			@accused_count			int,
			@penalty_start_time		int,
			@accused_count_penalty	int
		AS
		BEGIN

			UPDATE	user_chat_accused
			SET		accused_count			= @accused_count
					, penalty_start_time	= @penalty_start_time
					, accused_count_penalty	= @accused_count_penalty
			WHERE	char_id = @char_id
			
			IF (@@ROWCOUNT = 0)
			BEGIN
				INSERT INTO user_chat_accused (char_id, accused_count, penalty_start_time, accused_count_penalty, last_accused_time)
				VALUES (@char_id, @accused_count, @penalty_start_time, @accused_count_penalty, 0)
			END
		END

procedures.aion_SetCharGlobalRank_SeasonRank:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetCharGlobalRank_SeasonRank]
@rankId int	
as 
begin
	set nocount on;
	
	UPDATE user_rank 
	SET last_ranking = global_ranking, last_point = point
	WHERE rank_id = @rankId
		
	UPDATE user_rank
	SET best_ranking = last_ranking
	WHERE rank_id = @rankId and last_ranking > 0  and (best_ranking > last_ranking or best_ranking = 0)
	
	UPDATE user_rank 
	SET best_point = last_point
	WHERE rank_id = @rankId and best_point < last_point
	
	set nocount off;
end
procedures.aion_MoveToLegacyAllUserData:
-- 삭제가 완료된 캐릭터 정보를 다른 테이블에서도 제거하는 스크립트
-- legacy item 이 처리되었으면 해당 유저 데이터는 처리 안함
-- where절만 수정하면 legacy_item 처리된 것도 가능. but 혼선이 있을까봐 우선은 처리 안함
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_MoveToLegacyAllUserData]
	@ncount			int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	
	BEGIN TRAN
	
	DECLARE	   @table_name					nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE    @legacytbl					nvarchar(70)
	DECLARE    @column_name					nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE    @id_for_offset				bigint
	
	IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'temp_user_id_object$')
		DROP TABLE temp_user_id_object$

	DECLARE		@sql		nvarchar(4000)
	SET @sql = 'SELECT TOP ' + CAST(@ncount AS nvarchar(50)) + ' char_id INTO temp_user_id_object$ FROM user_data WHERE delete_complete_date <> 0 AND delete_complete_date + 3600*24*90 < dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0)'
	PRINT @sql
	EXEC sp_executesql @sql
	
	insert legacy_log(legacy_date, legacy_count) values(GetDate(), @ncount)	
	SET @id_for_offset = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
	
	
	-- 같은 이름의 legacy_table이 있는지 체크만
	DECLARE check_item CURSOR
	FOR
	SELECT table_name, column_name_of_charid FROM legacy_user_tables
	OPEN check_item
	FETCH NEXT FROM check_item INTO @table_name, @column_name
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @legacytbl = 'legacy_'+ CAST(@id_for_offset AS nvarchar(20))+ '_' + @table_name
		
		IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = @legacytbl)
		BEGIN
			PRINT 'Error! Legacy table is exist. Try again!!'
			RETURN 1
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM check_item INTO @table_name, @column_name
	END
	CLOSE		check_item
	DEALLOCATE	check_item		
	
	
	DECLARE cur_item CURSOR
	FOR
	SELECT table_name, column_name_of_charid FROM legacy_user_tables
	
	OPEN cur_item
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @table_name, @column_name

	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
	
		SET @legacytbl = 'legacy_'+ CAST(@id_for_offset AS nvarchar(20))+ '_' + @table_name
		
		IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = @table_name)
		BEGIN 
			SET @sql = 'SELECT * INTO ' + @legacytbl + ' FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			IF @table_name = 'user_item'
			BEGIN
				SET @sql = 'SELECT * INTO ' + @legacytbl + ' FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE (warehouse <> 3 AND warehouse <> 6 AND warehouse <> 7) AND ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			END

			PRINT @sql
			EXEC sp_executesql @sql

			SET @sql = 'DELETE FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			IF @table_name = 'user_item'
			BEGIN
				SET @sql = 'DELETE FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE (warehouse <> 3 AND warehouse <> 6 AND warehouse <> 7) AND ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			END
			
			PRINT @sql
			EXEC sp_executesql @sql
			
			insert into legacy_table_list(log_id, table_name, result) values(@id_for_offset, @legacytbl, 1)
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			insert into legacy_table_list(log_id, table_name, result) values(@id_for_offset, @legacytbl, 0)
		END
		
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @table_name, @column_name
	END
	CLOSE		cur_item
	DEALLOCATE	cur_item	


	DROP TABLE temp_user_id_object$
	
	COMMIT TRAN
END

CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_ChangeEnhancedStigmaSlotCnt]
	@nCharID	int,
	@cnt		tinyint
AS
set nocount on

-- 존재하는 이름 검사
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_data WHERE char_id=@nCharID AND (delete_date = 0 OR (delete_date > dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0))))
	return -1

UPDATE user_data
SET 	enhanced_stigma_slot_cnt = @cnt
WHERE char_id  =  @nCharId

set nocount off

IF @@ERROR <> 0
	return 0

return @nCharID
procedures.aion_MoveToLegacyAllUserData_OldUserOfLo:
-- MoveToLegacyAllUserData 의 기능과 aion_UpdateOldUserOfLowlevelToDelete의 결합버전
-- aion_UpdateOldUserOfLowlevelToDelete로 업데이트 되는 유저를 Legacy로 처리
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_MoveToLegacyAllUserData_OldUserOfLowlevel]
	@check_days int,
	@low_level	int, 
	@ncount		int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	

	IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'temp_user_id_object_to_del$')
		DROP TABLE temp_user_id_object_to_del$

	IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'temp_user_id_object$')
		DROP TABLE temp_user_id_object$

	BEGIN TRAN

	DECLARE 	@update_time 	int
	DECLARE		@sql					nvarchar(4000)
	
	SET @sql = 'SELECT char_id INTO temp_user_id_object_to_del$ FROM user_data WHERE delete_date = 0 AND delete_complete_date = 0 AND dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(last_logout_time, 0) + ' + CAST((3600*24*@check_days) AS nvarchar(20)) + '< dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0) AND lev < ' + CAST(@low_level AS nvarchar(20)) 
	PRINT @sql
	EXEC sp_executesql @sql
	
	SET @update_time = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0)

	UPDATE user_data SET delete_date = @update_time, delete_complete_date = @update_time where char_id in (select char_id from temp_user_id_object_to_del$)


	
	DECLARE	   @table_name					nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE    @legacytbl					nvarchar(70)
	DECLARE    @column_name					nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE    @id_for_offset				bigint
	
	SET @sql = 'SELECT TOP ' + CAST(@ncount AS nvarchar(50)) + ' char_id INTO temp_user_id_object$ FROM user_data WHERE delete_complete_date <> 0 AND (delete_complete_date + 3600*24*90 <' + CAST(@update_time AS nvarchar(20)) + ' OR ' + 'delete_complete_date = ' + CAST(@update_time AS nvarchar(20)) + ')'
	PRINT @sql
	EXEC sp_executesql @sql
	
	insert legacy_log(legacy_date, legacy_count) values(GetDate(), @ncount)	
	SET @id_for_offset = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
	
	
	-- 같은 이름의 legacy_table이 있는지 체크만
	DECLARE check_item CURSOR
	FOR
	SELECT table_name, column_name_of_charid FROM legacy_user_tables
	OPEN check_item
	FETCH NEXT FROM check_item INTO @table_name, @column_name
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		SET @legacytbl = 'legacy_'+ CAST(@id_for_offset AS nvarchar(20))+ '_' + @table_name
		
		IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = @legacytbl)
		BEGIN
			PRINT 'Error! Legacy table is exist. Try again!!'
			RETURN 1
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM check_item INTO @table_name, @column_name
	END
	CLOSE		check_item
	DEALLOCATE	check_item		
	
	
	DECLARE cur_item CURSOR
	FOR
	SELECT table_name, column_name_of_charid FROM legacy_user_tables
	
	OPEN cur_item
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @table_name, @column_name

	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
	
		SET @legacytbl = 'legacy_'+ CAST(@id_for_offset AS nvarchar(20))+ '_' + @table_name
		
		IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = @table_name)
		BEGIN 
			SET @sql = 'SELECT * INTO ' + @legacytbl + ' FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			IF @table_name = 'user_item'
			BEGIN
				SET @sql = 'SELECT * INTO ' + @legacytbl + ' FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE (warehouse <> 3 AND warehouse <> 6 AND warehouse <> 7) AND ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			END		
			PRINT @sql
			EXEC sp_executesql @sql

			SET @sql = 'DELETE FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			IF @table_name = 'user_item'
			BEGIN
				SET @sql = 'DELETE FROM ' + @table_name + ' WHERE (warehouse <> 3 AND warehouse <> 6 AND warehouse <> 7) AND ' + @column_name + ' IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_user_id_object$)'
			END
			PRINT @sql
			EXEC sp_executesql @sql
			
			insert into legacy_table_list(log_id, table_name, result) values(@id_for_offset, @legacytbl, 1)
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			insert into legacy_table_list(log_id, table_name, result) values(@id_for_offset, @legacytbl, 0)
		END
		
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @table_name, @column_name
	END
	CLOSE		cur_item
	DEALLOCATE	cur_item	


	--DROP TABLE temp_user_id_object$
	
	COMMIT TRAN

END

set nocount on

-- 중복길드명
IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM guild WHERE name = @strNewGuildName)
	return -1

-- 길드 + 공통 금지어
--IF EXISTS (select forbidden_id from forbidden_word where FORBIDDEN_WORD=@strGuildName and status=0 and forbidden_reason=1 and (forbidden_type=2 or forbidden_type=0)) 
--	return 0

-- 금지캐릭터명 + 공통 금지어
-- forbidden_type
-- 0 : 공통
-- 1 : 캐릭터
-- 2 : 길드
-- forbidden_reason
-- 0 : GM 캐릭터
-- 1 : 일반 금지어
-- 2 : 캐릭터 사전 예약
-- 3 : 서버 이전	(1년간 재사용 금지)
-- 4 : 아이템 캐릭터 이름 변경 (1년간 재사용 금지)
-- 5 : 아이템 길드 이름 변경 (1년간 재사용 금지)

-- 금지단어
IF EXISTS (SELECT forbidden_id FROM forbidden_word WHERE FORBIDDEN_WORD = @strNewGuildName and IS_LIKE = 0 and status=0 and forbidden_type=0)
	return -2

-- 금지길드명
IF EXISTS (SELECT forbidden_id FROM forbidden_word WHERE FORBIDDEN_WORD = @strNewGuildName and IS_LIKE = 0 and status=0 and forbidden_type=2 and forbidden_reason <> 5)
	return -2

-- 길드 이름 변경으로 1년간 사용 금지 길드명
IF EXISTS (SELECT forbidden_id FROM forbidden_word WHERE FORBIDDEN_WORD = @strNewGuildName and IS_LIKE = 0 and status=0 and forbidden_type=2 and forbidden_reason = 5 and (datediff(d, regdate, getdate()) < 366))
	return -2

-- 금지단어가 포함된 길드명
IF EXISTS (SELECT forbidden_id FROM forbidden_word WHERE (@strNewGuildName LIKE '%' + FORBIDDEN_WORD + '%')  and forbidden_word <> '' and IS_LIKE = 1 and status=0 and (forbidden_type=2 or forbidden_type=0))
	return -2

declare @ret int
set @ret = @nGuildId

declare @change_log_id int
set @change_log_id = 0

insert into guild_name_change_log (guild_id, old_name, new_name, change_date, item_id, tid, 
								master_id, master_user_id, master_account_id, master_account_name, race, class, gender, lev)
select @nGuildId, @strOldGuildName, @strNewGuildName, getdate(), @nItemId, @nItemTid, 
								char_id, user_id, account_id, account_name, race, class, gender, lev
from user_data
where char_id = @nCharID

if @@error <> 0 or @@rowcount = 0
begin 
	set @ret = -4
	GOTO error_process
end

declare @forbidden_id int
set @forbidden_id = 0

-- 캐릭터 이름을 다른 사람이 다시 사용하지 못 하도록 forbidden_char에 추가
insert into forbidden_word (
			FORBIDDEN_TYPE, FORBIDDEN_REASON, WORLD_ID,
			FORBIDDEN_WORD,
			[STATUS], LOGIN_ID, LOGIN_NM, REGDATE, IS_LIKE)
values(2, 5, @nServerID, @strOldGuildName, 0, 'UseItem', 'ChangeGuildName', GetDate(), 0)

if @@error <> 0	or @@rowcount = 0
begin 
	set @ret = -5	-- Forbidden_char Insert Error!!!
	GOTO error_process
end

UPDATE guild 
SET name = @strNewGuildName, change_info_time = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0)
WHERE id = @nGuildId
set nocount off

IF @@ERROR <> 0
begin 
	set @ret = -6
	GOTO error_process
end

return @nGuildId

error_process:
if @change_log_id <> 0
begin
	delete guild_name_change_log where id = @change_log_id
end

if @forbidden_id <> 0
begin
	delete forbidden_word where forbidden_id = @forbidden_id
end
return @ret
procedures.aion_MoveToLegacyItems:
-- create sp
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_MoveToLegacyItems]
	@ncount			int,
	@offset			int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	
	DECLARE    @legacytbl	nvarchar(50)
	SET @legacytbl = 'user_item_legacy_'+ CAST(@offset AS nvarchar(20))
	
	BEGIN TRAN
	
	IF EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'temp_item_id_object$')
		DROP TABLE temp_item_id_object$

	DECLARE		@sql		nvarchar(4000)
	SET @sql = 'SELECT id, char_id INTO temp_item_id_object$ FROM user_item WHERE (warehouse <> 3 AND warehouse <> 6 AND warehouse <> 7) AND char_id IN (SELECT TOP ' + CAST(@ncount AS nvarchar(50)) + ' char_id FROM user_data WHERE delete_complete_date <> 0 AND delete_complete_date + 3600*24*90 < dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0) AND item_legacy = 0)'
	PRINT @sql
	EXEC sp_executesql @sql
	
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT object_id FROM sys.tables WHERE name = @legacytbl)
	BEGIN
		SET @sql = 'SELECT * INTO ' + @legacytbl + ' FROM user_item WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_item_id_object$)'
		PRINT @sql
		EXEC sp_executesql @sql
		
		UPDATE user_data SET item_legacy = @offset WHERE char_id IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_item_id_object$ GROUP BY char_id)
		DELETE FROM user_item WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_item_id_object$)
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		-- sync tbl.
		EXEC aion_SyncItemLegacyTbl @legacytbl
		
		-- check validity
		DECLARE		@ncolumn_org	int
		DECLARE		@ncolumn_leg	int

		SELECT @ncolumn_org = COUNT(*) FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('user_item')
		SELECT @ncolumn_leg = COUNT(*) FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(@legacytbl)

		IF @ncolumn_org <> @ncolumn_leg
		BEGIN
			PRINT 'Error! Maybe sync failed.'
			RETURN 1
		END
		
		-- copy and delete
		DECLARE		@columns	nvarchar(1000)
		SET @columns = ''
			
		-- cursor
		DECLARE		@name		nvarchar(100)

		DECLARE cur_item CURSOR
		FOR
		SELECT ui.name FROM (SELECT * FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('user_item')) AS ui INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(@legacytbl)) AS ul ON ui.name = ul.name	
		
		OPEN cur_item
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @name

		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
		BEGIN
			IF @columns <> ''
				SET @columns = @columns+', '
			SET @columns = @columns+@name
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_item INTO @name
		END
		CLOSE		cur_item
		DEALLOCATE	cur_item
		
		SET @sql = 'INSERT INTO ' + @legacytbl + '(' + @columns + ') SELECT ' + @columns + ' FROM user_item WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_item_id_object$)'
		PRINT @sql
		
		DECLARE		@_t_sql		nvarchar(4000)
		SET @_t_sql = 'SET IDENTITY_INSERT ' + @legacytbl + ' ON ' + @sql + ' SET IDENTITY_INSERT ' + @legacytbl + ' OFF'
		EXEC sp_executesql @_t_sql
		
		IF @@ERROR = 0
		BEGIN
			UPDATE user_data SET item_legacy = @offset WHERE char_id IN (SELECT char_id FROM temp_item_id_object$ GROUP BY char_id)
			DELETE FROM user_item WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_item_id_object$)
		END
	END
	
	DROP TABLE temp_item_id_object$
	
	COMMIT TRAN
END

-- Description:	<Description,,>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetMaximumInstanceId]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@current_time		int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	
	-- Insert statements for procedure here
	/*
	IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM user_instance)
	BEGIN
		SELECT max(instance_id) FROM user_instance
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SELECT 0 FROM user_instance
	END
	*/
	
	SELECT isnull(max(instance_id), 0) FROM user_instance WHERE instance_id < 0x90000000

--	DELETE user_instance WHERE reentrance_time < @current_time 
	DELETE world_extcondition WHERE world_type = 1 and world_num IN (SELECT instance_id FROM instance WHERE validity_time < @current_time)
	DELETE instance WHERE validity_time < @current_time
END

procedures.aion_ChargeCharRace:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_ChargeCharRace]
	@account nvarchar(20),
	@race tinyint
AS
BEGIN
  if object_id('tempdb..#tempcharid') is not null Begin
     drop table #tempcharid
  End
	CREATE TABLE #tempcharid (
	pid int identity(1,1),
	accountId int,
	charId int,
	charName nvarchar(20),
	classId tinyint
	)
	set nocount on
	declare @n int
	declare @rows int
	SET @n = 1
	INSERT INTO #tempcharid (accountId, charId, charName, classId) SELECT account_id, char_id, user_id, class FROM user_data 
	WHERE account_name = @account
	SELECT @rows = count(*) FROM #tempcharid
	WHILE @n <= @rows
	BEGIN
	   DECLARE @char_id int
		 DECLARE @accountId int
	   DECLARE @charName nvarchar(20)
	   DECLARE @class tinyint
	   SELECT @accountId = accountId, @char_id = charId, @charName = charName, @class = classId FROM #tempcharid WHERE pid = @n
	   IF(@char_id != 0)
	   BEGIN
	      IF(@class = 1 OR @class = 2) BEGIN
		    SET @class = 0
		 END
		 IF(@class = 4 OR @class = 5) BEGIN
		    SET @class = 3
		 END
		 IF(@class = 7 OR @class = 8) BEGIN
		    SET @class = 6
		 END
		 IF(@class = 10 OR @class = 11) BEGIN
		    SET @class = 9
		 END
		 IF(@class = 13 OR @class = 14) BEGIN
		    SET @class = 12
		 END
		 IF(@class = 16 OR @class = 17) BEGIN
		    SET @class = 15
		 END
	   UPDATE abyss_ranking SET race = @race WHERE char_id = @char_id
	   IF (@race = 0)
	   BEGIN
	       DELETE FROM user_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id
				 DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 1006
			   DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 2945
			   DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 2008
			   DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 1920
	       UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 1000 WHERE quest_id = 2000 AND char_id = @char_id
		     UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 21226 WHERE quest_id = 11205 AND char_id = @char_id
			   UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 21230 WHERE quest_id = 11220 AND char_id = @char_id
			   UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 21233 WHERE quest_id = 11064 AND char_id = @char_id
			   UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 21235 WHERE quest_id = 11067 AND char_id = @char_id
				 UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 25690 WHERE quest_id = 15690 AND char_id = @char_id
		     UPDATE user_data 
	       SET race = @race, class = @class, lev = 1, world = 210010000, xlocation = 871, ylocation = 1190, zlocation = 112,
	          last_normal_world = 210010000, last_normal_xlocation = 871, last_normal_ylocation = 1190, last_normal_zlocation = 112,
	          resurrect_world = 210010000, resurrect_xlocation = 871, resurrect_ylocation = 1190, resurrect_zlocation = 112, guild_id = 0
	       WHERE char_id = @char_id
		     DELETE FROM user_item where char_id = @char_id AND name_id = 186000005
			   DELETE FROM user_item where char_id = @accountId AND name_id = 186000005
		     UPDATE user_item set warehouse = 6 where warehouse = 7 AND char_id = @accountId
	   END
	   ELSE
	   IF (@race = 1)
	   BEGIN
		     DELETE FROM user_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id
		     DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 1006
			   DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 2945
				 DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 2008
			   DELETE FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @char_id AND quest_id = 1920
	       UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 2000 WHERE quest_id = 1000 AND char_id = @char_id
		     UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 11205 WHERE quest_id = 21226 AND char_id = @char_id
			   UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 11220 WHERE quest_id = 21230 AND char_id = @char_id
			   UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 11064 WHERE quest_id = 21233 AND char_id = @char_id
			   UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 11067 WHERE quest_id = 21235 AND char_id = @char_id
				 UPDATE user_finished_quest SET quest_id = 15690 WHERE quest_id = 25690 AND char_id = @char_id
		     UPDATE user_data 
	       SET race = @race, class = @class, lev = 1, world = 220010000, xlocation = 593, ylocation = 2464, zlocation = 280,
	         last_normal_world = 220010000, last_normal_xlocation = 593, last_normal_ylocation = 2464, last_normal_zlocation = 280,
	         resurrect_world = 220010000, resurrect_xlocation = 593, resurrect_ylocation = 2464, resurrect_zlocation = 280, guild_id = 0
	       WHERE char_id = @char_id
				 DELETE FROM user_item where char_id = @char_id AND name_id = 186000010
				 DELETE FROM user_item where char_id = @accountId AND name_id = 186000010
			   UPDATE user_item set warehouse = 7 where warehouse = 6 AND char_id = @accountId
	   END
		 INSERT INTO user_skill_backup1 SELECT * FROM user_skill WHERE char_id = @char_id AND skill_id >= 30000
	   DELETE FROM user_skill WHERE char_id = @char_id
	   DECLARE @dbid bigint
	   INSERT INTO user_item (char_id,name_id,amount,slot,warehouse) VALUES (@char_id,188900001, 30, '0', 5)
	   SET @dbid = @@IDENTITY;
	   INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, authorize_count, skin_name_id) VALUES (@dbid, @char_id, 0, 0, 188900001)
	   INSERT INTO user_mail (to_id,to_name,from_id,from_name,title,content,item_id,item_nameid,item_amount, express_mail) 
	   VALUES (@char_id, @charName, 0, N'系统邮件',N'转换种族', N'转种族补发升级药水', @dbid, 188900001, 30, 0)
		 DECLARE @dbid1 bigint
	   INSERT INTO user_item (char_id,name_id,amount,slot,warehouse)
	   VALUES (@char_id,169650000, 1, '0', 5)
	   SET @dbid1 = @@IDENTITY;
	   INSERT INTO user_item_option (id, char_id, enchant_count, authorize_count, skin_name_id)
	   VALUES (@dbid1, @char_id, 0, 0, 169650000)
	   INSERT INTO user_mail (to_id,to_name,from_id,from_name,title,content,item_id,item_nameid,item_amount, express_mail) 
	   VALUES (@char_id, @charName, 0, N'系统邮件',N'转换种族', N'转种族补发外貌变更', @dbid, 169650000, 1, 0)
	   END
	   SET @n = @n+1
	END
    set nocount off
END
procedures.aion_OrderingAbyssRanking_20160415:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_OrderingAbyssRanking_20160415]
	@isSpecialSvr	int,
	@nServerId	int,
	@nRace	int,
	@nTime	bigint,
	@nNum	int,
	@nThisWeekUpdateTime int,
	@nRecentGPMin int
as
set nocount on

DECLARE @update_time bigint
set @update_time = ISNULL((select max(update_time) from abyss_ranking where race = @nRace and server_id = @nServerId), 0)

IF (0 = @isSpecialSvr)
	BEGIN
		/* gp 없는 애들 테이블에서 제거 */
		delete from user_gp_data where glory_point<=0 and ownership_bonus_gp<=0

		insert into abyss_ranking (abyss_ranking, server_id, update_time, char_id, abyss_point, race, class, lev, guild_id, rank, old_Ranking, gp, rank_updatedate)
		select top (@nNum) RANK() over (order by (ISNULL(glory_point, 0) + ISNULL(ownership_bonus_gp, 0)) desc, abyss_point desc, lev desc, user_data.char_id asc) as rank, @nServerId, @nTime, user_data.char_id, abyss_point, race, class, lev, guild_id, 0, 0, (ISNULL(glory_point, 0) + ISNULL(ownership_bonus_gp, 0)) AS gp_sum, NULL
		from user_data LEFT OUTER JOIN user_gp_data ON user_data.char_id=user_gp_data.char_id
		where race = @nRace
		and org_server = @nServerId
		and (delete_date = 0 or delete_date > @nTime)
		and (DateDiff(day, last_logout_time, GetDate()) < 30)	-- 한달 이내
		and (case when (this_week_compare_time = @nThisWeekUpdateTime or (@nThisWeekUpdateTime / 86400) = (this_week_compare_time / 86400)) then (CONVERT(bigint, this_week_glory_point) + last_week_glory_point + two_weeks_ago_glory_point + three_weeks_ago_glory_point)
					when (this_week_compare_time >= (@nThisWeekUpdateTime - 604800)  or ((@nThisWeekUpdateTime / 86400)-7) = (this_week_compare_time / 86400)) then (CONVERT(bigint,this_week_glory_point) + last_week_glory_point + two_weeks_ago_glory_point)
					when (this_week_compare_time >= (@nThisWeekUpdateTime - 1209600) or ((@nThisWeekUpdateTime / 86400)-14) = (this_week_compare_time / 86400)) then (CONVERT(bigint,this_week_glory_point) + last_week_glory_point)
					when (this_week_compare_time >= (@nThisWeekUpdateTime - 1814400) or ((@nThisWeekUpdateTime / 86400)-21) = (this_week_compare_time / 86400)) then this_week_glory_point
					end) >= @nRecentGPMin
		order by rank
	END
ELSE
	/* 특화서버 */
	BEGIN
		insert into abyss_ranking (abyss_ranking, server_id, update_time, char_id, abyss_point, race, class, lev, guild_id, rank, old_Ranking, gp, rank_updatedate)
		select top (@nNum) RANK() over (order by abyss_point desc, lev desc, user_data.char_id asc) as rank, @nServerId, @nTime, user_data.char_id, abyss_point, race, class, lev, guild_id, 0, 0, (ISNULL(glory_point, 0) + ISNULL(ownership_bonus_gp, 0)) AS gp_sum, NULL
		from user_data LEFT OUTER JOIN user_gp_data ON user_data.char_id=user_gp_data.char_id
		where race = @nRace
		and org_server = @nServerId
		and (delete_date = 0 or delete_date > @nTime)
		and (DateDiff(day, last_logout_time, GetDate()) < 30)	-- 한달 이내
		order by rank
	END

update abyss_ranking
set old_ranking = ISNULL((select b.abyss_ranking from abyss_ranking as b where b.race = @nRace and b.server_id = @nServerId and b.update_time = @update_time and b.char_id = abyss_ranking.char_id and b.rank != 0), 0)
where update_time = @nTime
and race = @nRace
and server_id = @nServerId

delete from abyss_ranking
where update_time < (dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(), 0) - 2419200)	-- 4주 지난 것은 삭제

exec aion_SetAbyssGuildRank @nRace

set nocount off

procedures.aion_ProcessLegionDominionTakeOver:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_ProcessLegionDominionTakeOver]
	@nTakeOverTime	bigint,
	@nServerId		int
AS
set nocount on
begin
	DECLARE @lastestTakeOverTime bigint
	SET @lastestTakeOverTime = ISNULL((select max(take_over_processed_time) from legion_dominion_rankings where server_id=@nServerId), 0)

	IF (0 < @nTakeOverTime and @lastestTakeOverTime < @nTakeOverTime)
	begin
		insert into legion_dominion_rankings values(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, @nTakeOverTime, @nServerId)
		update legion_dominion_rankings set take_over_processed_time=@nTakeOverTime where take_over_processed_time=0 and server_id=@nServerId
		/* 오래된 기록(30일 전) 삭제*/
		delete from legion_dominion_rankings where take_over_processed_time < (@nTakeOverTime-30*24*60*60) and server_id=@nServerId
	end
end

-- =============================================

-- Description:	<Description,,>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetOfflineBuddyNoti]
	@charid int,
	@requestCount int output,
	@lastmsg nvarchar(255) output
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	--로그인 해올 때 그 사용자와 관련된 offline 버디 요청들을 기간을 확인해서 정리한다.
	--delete from user_buddy_offline where (USER_ID = @charid or inviter_id = @charid) and DATEDIFF(day, createdate, GETDATE())> 7
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    declare @name varchar(50)
    declare @msg varchar(255)
    select @requestCount= COUNT(*) from user_buddy_offline with(nolock) where USER_ID = @charid
	SELECT top 1 @name = inviter_name, @msg = inviter_msg from user_buddy_offline with(nolock) where USER_ID = @charid and DATEDIFF(day, createdate, GETDATE())<= 7 order by id desc
	if @name is not null
		set @lastmsg = @name + ':' + @msg
	else 
		set @lastmsg = '';
END

procedures.aion_SetReformCount:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetReformCount]
(
	@char_id INT,
	@next_reset_time INT,		
	@reform_count INT
)
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON
	
	UPDATE 
		user_reform 
	SET 
		next_reset_time = @next_reset_time, reform_count = @reform_count
	WHERE 
		char_id = @char_id
	
	IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO user_reform(char_id, next_reset_time, reform_count)
		VALUES (@char_id, @next_reset_time, @reform_count)
	END
END

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_CountCharByWorldorUserIDor:
create proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_CountCharByWorldorUserIDorAccountNMorCnt]
			@user_id nvarchar(10), -- 캐릭터 명
			@account_name nvarchar(50), -- 로그인 ID
			@builder nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000), @tmp int
						
			set @sql = ' select count(char_id) cnt ' +
					   ' from user_data (nolock) '
					   
			set @tmp = 0
			
			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' WHERE user_id like '''+@user_id+''''
				set @tmp = 1
			END 
				
			IF @account_name IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				IF @tmp = 1
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND account_name like '''+@account_name+''''
				ELSE
					BEGIN
						set @sql = @sql + ' WHERE account_name like '''+@account_name+''''					
						set @tmp = 1
					END
			END
			
			IF @builder IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				IF @builder = 95
					BEGIN
						IF @tmp = 1
							set @sql = @sql + ' AND builder > ''0'' '
						ELSE
							BEGIN
								set @sql = @sql + ' WHERE builder > ''0'' '
								set @tmp = 1
							END
					END
				ELSE
					BEGIN
						IF @tmp = 1
							set @sql = @sql + ' AND builder = '''+@builder+''''
						ELSE
							BEGIN
								set @sql = @sql + ' WHERE builder = '''+@builder+''''					
								set @tmp = 1
							END
					END				
			END
								
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.aion_CheckPersonalInstantHousingUserRace:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_CheckPersonalInstantHousingUserRace]
	@user_id	INT,
	@requiredQuestLight INT,
	@requiredQuestDark	INT
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	declare @questCount int
	declare @id int
	
	SELECT @questCount=quest_count FROM user_finished_quest WHERE char_id = @user_id AND (quest_id = @requiredQuestLight OR quest_id = @requiredQuestDark)
	IF (0 < (@questCount))
	BEGIN
		-- valid user personal house available, return state and race
		SELECT @id = id FROM house_field WHERE owner_id = @user_id AND owner_type = 2
		IF (0 < (@id))
		BEGIN
			SELECT 65535, 2, 3;		-- race, state(NO_OWNER), permission(CLOSED)
			RETURN -2;	-- found qualified user, already have field house
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			IF EXISTS (SELECT id FROM house_instant WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE id = @user_id)
			BEGIN
				-- include only state 5
				IF EXISTS (SELECT [state] FROM house_instant WHERE id = @user_id and [state] = 5) -- state 5(HSTATE_OCCUPIED)
				BEGIN
					DECLARE @race AS TINYINT
					DECLARE @state AS TINYINT
					DECLARE @permission AS TINYINT
					SELECT @race = race FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE char_id = @user_id;
					SELECT @state = state, @permission = permission FROM house_instant WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE id = @user_id
					SELECT @race, @state, @permission
					RETURN 0;
				-- RETURN (SELECT state FROM house_instant WHERE id = @user_id);
				END
				ELSE
				BEGIN
					SELECT race, 6, 3 FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE char_id = @user_id	-- race, state(HSTATE_PAY_REQUIRED), permission(HPERMIT_CLOSED)
					RETURN -5; -- pay fee required
				END
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				SELECT race, 5, 1 FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE char_id = @user_Id; -- race, state(HSTATE_OCCUPIED), permission(HPERMIT_OPEN)
				RETURN -1;	-- found qualified user, not created house yet
			END
		END
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SELECT 65535, 2, 3;		-- race, state(NO_OWNER), permission(CLOSED)
		IF EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_data WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE char_id = @user_Id)
			RETURN -3;	-- found user, not finished required quest
		ELSE
			RETURN -4;	-- invalid user
	END
END
procedures.aion_SetCharInGameBlockPunishInfo:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetCharInGameBlockPunishInfo]	
	@nCharID int,
	@nPunishCode int, 
	@RemainMinute int
as
set nocount on
if  (@RemainMinute <= 0)
begin
	update  User_Punishment 
	set Remain_Minute=@RemainMinute,
		cancel_date = GetDate(),
		cancel_reason = 'Apply_All_Penalty', 
		status = 1		
	where char_id=@nCharID and status = 0 and punish_code = @nPunishCode
end
else
begin
	update  User_Punishment 
	set Remain_Minute=@RemainMinute
	where char_id=@nCharID and status = 0 and punish_code = @nPunishCode
end

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchAbuseQina:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchAbuseQina]
			@world_id nvarchar(5),
			@user_id nvarchar(30),
			@account_name nvarchar(50),
			@bx_char_id nvarchar(25),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @tmp int, @sql_etc nvarchar(1000)

			set @sql_etc = ' and delete_type != ''10000'' '

			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and user_id = N'''+@user_id+''''				
			END
			
			IF @bx_char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and char_id = '''+@bx_char_id+''''				
			END 
			
			IF @account_name != 'null'
			BEGIN
					set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' AND account_name = '''+@account_name+''''
			END
									
			set @sql = 'select top ' + @view_count +
					   ' 	delete_type, delete_complete_date, inventory_growth, char_warehouse_growth, delete_date, char_id, user_id, account_id, account_name, org_server, cur_server,isnull(login_server, org_server) login_server,' +
					   ' 	convert(nvarchar,create_date,20 ) create_date, convert(char, gender) gender, convert(char, race) race, convert(char, class) class, convert(char, lev) lev, convert(char, builder) builder, exp, world,	' +					   
					   '   case ' +
					   '     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
				       '     WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +					  
				       '     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
					   '   end as logonoff, t2.* '+				   
					   ' from user_data t1(nolock), qina_manipulate t2(nolock)' +
					   ' where t1.char_id=t2.charid and t2.qina_id not in(select top ' + @top_count + ' t2.qina_id from user_data t1(nolock), qina_manipulate t2(nolock) where t1.char_id=t2.charid and org_server='''+@world_id+''' ' + @sql_etc + '  order by t2.qina_id desc) '
						
			set @sql = @sql + @sql_etc
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' and org_server = '''+@world_id+''''		
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t2.qina_id desc '
					
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off

procedures.aion_CheckValidCharName:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_CheckValidCharName]
	@strName	nvarchar(20),
	@strAccount	nvarchar(14)
AS
set nocount on

-- 2016년 7월 6일 09시 기준
-- 이름변경시 유지 1년 -> 60일
declare @applyDate datetime = Cast('2016-07-06 09:00:00' as datetime)

-- 존재하는 이름 검사
IF EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_data WHERE user_id=@strName AND (delete_date = 0 OR (delete_date > dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0))))
	return -1

-- 금지캐릭터명 + 공통 금지어
-- forbidden_type
-- 0 : 공통
-- 1 : 캐릭터
-- 2 : 길드
-- forbidden_reason
-- 0 : GM 캐릭터
-- 1 : 일반 금지어
-- 2 : 캐릭터 사전 예약
-- 3 : 서버 이전	(1년간 재사용 금지)
-- 4 : 아이템 캐릭터 이름 변경 (1년간 재사용 금지)
-- 5 : 아이템 길드 이름 변경 (1년간 재사용 금지)
IF EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_word WHERE FORBIDDEN_WORD = @strName and IS_LIKE = 0 and status=0 and (forbidden_type=0 or forbidden_type=1))
	return -2	-- 금지 단어, GM 캐릭터

--IF EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_word WHERE FORBIDDEN_WORD LIKE '%'+@strName+'%' and IS_LIKE = 1 and status=0 and (forbidden_type=1 or forbidden_type=0)) 
IF EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_word WHERE (@strName LIKE '%' + FORBIDDEN_WORD + '%') and forbidden_word <> '' and IS_LIKE = 1 and status=0 and (forbidden_type=1 or forbidden_type=0))
	return -2	-- 금지어 포함

-- IF EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_char WHERE FORBIDDEN_CHAR=@strName and status=0 and (forbidden_reason in (3,4)) and (datediff(d, regdate, getdate()) < 366))
IF EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_char WHERE FORBIDDEN_CHAR=@strName and status=0 and (forbidden_reason in (3,4))
	and ((REGDATE < @applyDate and datediff(d, regdate, getdate()) < 366) or (datediff(d, regdate, getdate()) < 61)))
	return -2	-- 서버 이전이나, 캐릭터 이름 변경으로 1년간 사용 금지

-- 사전 예약
IF EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_char WHERE FORBIDDEN_CHAR=@strName and status=0 and forbidden_reason = 2)
	BEGIN
		IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT FORBIDDEN_ID FROM forbidden_char WHERE FORBIDDEN_CHAR=@strName and FORBIDDEN_ACCOUNT_NM=@strAccount and status=0 and forbidden_reason = 2)
			return -3
	END

return 0
set nocount off
procedures.aion_SetCharLocalRank_All:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetCharLocalRank_All]
	@rankId int
as 
begin
	set nocount on;
	
	UPDATE user_rank SET local_old_ranking = local_ranking, local_ranking = 0 WHERE rank_id = @rankId
	
	UPDATE user_rank SET local_ranking = num 
	from 
	(
		select RANK() over (partition by user_data.race order by point desc) as num, rank_id, user_rank.char_id
		from user_rank with(nolock)
		join user_data with(nolock) on user_rank.char_id = user_data.char_id and user_data.delete_complete_date = 0
		where rank_id = @rankId and point > 0
	) x
	where x.num <= 1000 and user_rank.rank_id = x.rank_id and user_rank.char_id = x.char_id
	
	set nocount off;
end

procedures.aion_SetCharLocalRank_All_byRating:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetCharLocalRank_All_byRating]
	@rateId int
as 
begin
	set nocount on;
	
	UPDATE user_rank SET local_old_ranking = local_ranking, local_ranking = 0 WHERE rank_id = @rateId
	
	UPDATE user_rank SET local_ranking = num, point = CONVERT(int, x.mu)
	from 
	(
		select RANK() over (partition by user_data.race order by CONVERT(int, mu) desc) as num, rate_id, user_rate.char_id, user_rate.mu
		from user_rate with(nolock)
		join user_data with(nolock) on user_rate.char_id = user_data.char_id and user_data.delete_complete_date = 0
		where rate_id = @rateId and update_cnt >= 5
	) x
	where x.num <= 1000 and user_rank.rank_id = x.rate_id and user_rank.char_id = x.char_id
	
	
	INSERT INTO user_rank (char_id, rank_id, local_ranking, point)
	SELECT x.char_id, x.rate_id, x.num, CONVERT(int, x.mu)
	from 
	(
		select RANK() over (partition by user_data.race order by CONVERT(int, mu) desc) as num, rate_id, user_rate.char_id, user_rate.mu
		from user_rate with(nolock)
		join user_data with(nolock) on user_rate.char_id = user_data.char_id and user_data.delete_complete_date = 0
		where rate_id = @rateId and update_cnt >= 5
	) x
	where x.num <= 1000 and x.char_id not in (select char_id from user_rank where rank_id = @rateId)
		
	
	set nocount off;
end
procedures.GM_UserMailDA_SrchMyMailByCharID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserMailDA_SrchMyMailByCharID]
			@char_id nvarchar(20),
			@mail_type int,
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
				
			declare @sql nvarchar(1300)
			
			set @sql =  ' select top '+ @view_count + ' t1.id, t1.to_id, t1.to_name, t1.from_id, t1.from_name, t1.title, t1.item_id, t1.item_nameid, t1.item_amount, t1.money, t1.state, t1.arrive_time, t1.express_mail, t1.abyss_point ' +
					    ' from user_mail t1(nolock) '					    
		
			IF @mail_type = 1
				set @sql = @sql + ' where (t1.from_id = '''+@char_id+''') '
			ELSE IF @mail_type = 2		
				set @sql = @sql + ' where (t1.to_id = '''+@char_id+''') '				
				
			set @sql = @sql + ' and t1.id not in (select top ' + @top_count + ' id from user_mail(nolock) '
				
			IF @mail_type = 1
				set @sql = @sql + ' where (from_id = '''+@char_id+''') '
			ELSE IF @mail_type = 2		
				set @sql = @sql + ' where (to_id = '''+@char_id+''') '	
				
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by id desc ) '
				
				
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t1.id desc '
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

procedures.aion_SetSkillSkin:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetSkillSkin]
	@char_id		int,
	@skill_skin_id	smallint,
	@command_type	tinyint
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON

	IF @command_type = 3	-- USE		//장착
	BEGIN
		UPDATE user_skill_skin SET use_skin = 1 WHERE char_id = @char_id AND skill_skin_id = @skill_skin_id
	END

	IF @command_type = 4	-- DIUSE		//해제
	BEGIN
		UPDATE user_skill_skin SET use_skin = 0 WHERE char_id = @char_id AND skill_skin_id = @skill_skin_id
	END

	IF @command_type = 5	-- EXPIRE	//만료
	BEGIN
		UPDATE user_skill_skin SET use_skin = 0, expire_time = 0 WHERE char_id = @char_id AND skill_skin_id = @skill_skin_id
	END

	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByAccountID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByAccountID]
			@account_id nvarchar(20),
			@world_id  nvarchar(5)
		as		
			set nocount on	
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			select	delete_type, delete_complete_date, delete_date, char_id, user_id, account_id, account_name, org_server, cur_server, isnull(login_server, org_server) login_server,
					convert(nvarchar,create_date,20 ) create_date, convert(char, gender) gender, convert(char, race) race, convert(char, class) class, convert(char, lev) lev, convert(char, builder) builder, exp, world,
					case 
						WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' and last_logout_time > '2007-12-12 00:00:00.000' THEN '#339900'
						WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'  THEN 'brown'
						WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != '1970-01-01 00:00:00.000' THEN 'black'				       	  
						end as logonoff
			from	user_data(nolock)
			where	account_id=@account_id and org_server=@world_id
procedures.aion_GetCharLocalRankPoint:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetCharLocalRankPoint]
@rankId int
as 
set nocount on

begin
	
	select 
		a.point,
		a.local_ranking,
		a.local_old_ranking,
		a.char_id,
		b.race,
		b.class,
		b.user_id
	from user_rank as a with(nolock), user_data as b with(nolock) 
	where a.char_id = b.char_id and a.rank_id = @rankId and a.local_ranking <= 1000 and a.local_ranking != 0
	order by point desc
			
	return @@rowcount
end

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByAccountIDAndStat:
CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByAccountIDAndStatus]
	@account_id		int,
	@world_id		int,
	@include_normal	tinyint,
	@include_delete	tinyint,
	@include_delete_completed	tinyint
AS
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	declare @query nvarchar(1000)
	declare @where_or nvarchar(255)
	
	set @query = '
	select	char_id, USER_ID, account_id, account_name, race, class, gender
			, org_server, cur_server, world, builder, lev
			, create_date, last_login_time, last_logout_time
			, delete_date, delete_complete_date, delete_type, login_server
	from	user_data (nolock)
	where	account_id = ' + convert(nvarchar, @account_id) + '
	and		org_server = ' + convert(nvarchar, @world_id)
	
	set @where_or = '1 != 1'
	if (@include_normal <> 0)
	begin
		set @where_or = @where_or + ' or (delete_date = 0 and delete_complete_date = 0)'
	end
	if (@include_delete <> 0)
	begin
		set @where_or = @where_or + ' or (delete_date != 0 and delete_complete_date = 0)'
	end
	if (@include_delete_completed <> 0)
	begin
		set @where_or = @where_or + ' or (delete_complete_date != 0)'
	end
	set @where_or = '
	and		(' + @where_or + ')'
	
	set @query = @query + @where_or

	exec (@query)
procedures.aion_GetCharLocalTournamentInfo:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetCharLocalTournamentInfo]
	@race tinyint
as 
begin 
	select 
	a.char_id,
	b.user_id,
	b.lev,
	b.class,
	b.guild_id,
	ISNULL(c.name, ''),
	a.local_tnmt_apply_seq
	from user_data_ext as a, user_data as b left join guild as c on b.guild_id = c.id 
	where a.local_tnmt_apply_seq > 0 
		and a.char_id = b.char_id

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_PutChallengeTaskQuest]
	@nTaskDbId bigint,
	@nQuestId int
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	IF EXISTS (Select challenge_task_id, quest_id From challenge_task_quest(nolock) Where challenge_task_id=@nTaskDbId and quest_id=@nQuestId)
		Begin
			return 1;	-- 중복 도전 과제 퀘스트
		End
	ELSE
		Begin
			Insert Into challenge_task_quest(challenge_task_id, quest_id, complete_count)
				Values(@nTaskDbId, @nQuestId, 0);

			IF @@ERROR <> 0
				Begin
					return 2; -- insert 실패
				End
		End
	return 0;
END

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByCharID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByCharID]
	    @char_id nvarchar(20)
    as
	    set nocount on
	    set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
	
	    select	convert(nvarchar,create_date,20) create_date,
			    convert(nvarchar,last_login_time,20) last_login_time,
			    convert(nvarchar,last_logout_time,20) last_logout_time,
			    convert(nvarchar,guild_update_date,20) guild_update_date, 
			    isnull(login_server, org_server) login_server 
			    , ISNULL(g.glory_point, 0) as glory_point, ISNULL(g.ownership_bonus_gp, 0) as ownership_bonus_gp
			    , u.*
			    , ISNULL(e.use_bot_channel,0) as use_bot_channel
			    , ISNULL(ude.exps_login_reward_time, 0) as exps_login_reward_time, ISNULL(ude.exps_npckill_reward_num, 0) as exps_npckill_reward_num, ISNULL(ude.creativity_point, 0) as creativity_point, ISNULL(ude.usecp_resetcount, 0) as usecp_resetcount, ISNULL(ude.next_usecp_resetcount_dec_time, 0) as next_usecp_resetcount_dec_time
			    , ISNULL(ude.familiar_func_expireTime, 0) as familiar_func_expireTime, ISNULL(ude.familiar_energy, 0) as familiar_energy, ISNULL(ude.familiar_energy_autocharge, 0) as familiar_energy_autocharge, ISNULL(ude.familiar_func_autocharge, 0) as familiar_func_autocharge
			    , ISNULL(e.prevSeasonReward, 0) as prevSeasonReward, ISNULL(e.currentSeasonReward, 0) as currentSeasonReward
	    from	user_data (nolock) u
	    left join user_gp_data (nolock) g on g.char_id = u.char_id
	    left join user_extra_info (nolock) e on u.char_id = e.char_id
	    left join user_data_ext (nolock) ude on u.char_id = ude.char_id
	    where	u.char_id = @char_id
procedures.aion_GetCharPlayBlockPunishInfo:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetCharPlayBlockPunishInfo]
	@nCharID	int
as
set nocount on

	declare	@utc_adjust_hour bigint
	set	@utc_adjust_hour = DATEDIFF(HH, GetUTCDate(), GetDate())

	SELECT punish_code,
			DATEDIFF(SS, DATEADD(HH, @utc_adjust_hour, '1970-01-01'), start_date) as start_date,
			DATEDIFF(SS, DATEADD(HH, @utc_adjust_hour, '1970-01-01'), end_date) as end_date,
			punish_reason 
	FROM user_punishment
	WHERE	char_id = @nCharId and play_block = 1 and status = 0 and end_date > GETDATE()
	
set nocount off

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByWorldorUserIDorA:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharByWorldorUserIDorAccountNMorCnt]
			@world_id nvarchar(5), 
			@user_id nvarchar(30), -- 캐릭터 명
			@account_name nvarchar(50), -- 로그인 ID
			@builder nvarchar(5),
			@deleted_char nvarchar(5),
			@char_on nvarchar(5),
			@deleted_move nvarchar(5),
			@bx_char_id nvarchar(25),
			@multi_user_ids nvarchar(1000),
			@view_count nvarchar(6),
			@top_count nvarchar(6)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @tmp int, @sql_etc nvarchar(1000), @tmp2 int

			set @sql_etc = ' and delete_type != ''10000'' '
			set @tmp = 1
			set @tmp2 = 0
			
			IF @char_on != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' '				
			END
			
			IF @deleted_move != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and delete_type != ''0''  '
				set @tmp2 = 1
			END
			
			IF @deleted_char != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @tmp2 = 0
					set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and delete_date = '''+@deleted_char+''' '
			END
			
			IF @bx_char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and char_id = '''+@bx_char_id+''''
			END
			
			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and user_id = N'''+@user_id+''''
			END
			
			IF @multi_user_ids != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and ('+@multi_user_ids+') '
			END
			
			IF @account_name != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @tmp = 1
					set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' AND account_name = '''+@account_name+''''
				ELSE
					BEGIN
						set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' WHERE account_name = '''+@account_name+''''
						set @tmp = 1
					END
			END
			
			--IF @builder != 'null'
			IF @builder IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				IF @builder = '95'
					BEGIN
						IF @tmp = 1
							set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' AND builder > ''0'' '
						ELSE
							BEGIN
								set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' WHERE builder > ''0'' '
								set @tmp = 1
							END
					END
				ELSE
					BEGIN
						IF @tmp = 1
							set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' AND builder = '''+@builder+''''
						ELSE
							BEGIN
								set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' WHERE builder = '''+@builder+''''
								set @tmp = 1
							END
					END
			END
			
			set @sql =	'select top ' + @view_count +
						' 	delete_type, delete_complete_date, inventory_growth, char_warehouse_growth, delete_date, char_id, user_id, account_id, account_name, org_server, cur_server,isnull(login_server, org_server) login_server,' +
						' 	convert(nvarchar,create_date,20 ) create_date, convert(char, gender) gender, convert(char, race) race, convert(char, class) class, convert(char, lev) lev, convert(char, builder) builder, exp, world,	' +
						'   case ' +
						'     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
						'     WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +					  
						'     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
						'   end as logonoff '+
						-- [4.71] 가챠
						'	, gotcha_fever_point, gotcha_fever_expire_time '+
						' from user_data (nolock) ' +
						' where char_id not in(select top ' + @top_count + ' char_id from user_data (nolock) where org_server='''+@world_id+''' ' + @sql_etc + '  order by char_id desc) '
			
			set @sql = @sql + @sql_etc
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' and org_server = '''+@world_id+''''
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by char_id desc '
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

procedures.aion_SetTrialAccountData:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetTrialAccountData]
	@accountId int,
	@resetTime int,
	@sellGold bigint,
	@tradeGold bigint,
	@decomposeSum int,
	@gatherSum int,
	@extractGatherSum int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	if EXISTS (SELECT account_id FROM trial_account_data(UPDLOCK) WHERE account_id=@accountId) 
	begin
		UPDATE trial_account_data
		SET 
			reset_time = @resetTime,
			sell_gold_sum = @sellGold,
			trade_gold_sum = @tradeGold,
			decompose_sum = @decomposeSum,
			gather_sum = @gatherSum,
			extract_gather_sum = @extractGatherSum
		WHERE account_id=@accountId
	end
	else
	begin
		INSERT trial_account_data(account_id, reset_time, sell_gold_sum, trade_gold_sum, decompose_sum, gather_sum, extract_gather_sum) 
		VALUES (@accountId, @resetTime, @sellGold, @tradeGold, @decomposeSum, @gatherSum, @extractGatherSum)
	end

END

procedures.GM_UserMoveServiceLogDA_SrchCustomizeHis:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserMoveServiceLogDA_SrchCustomizeHistory]
			@user_id nvarchar(30), -- 캐릭터 명
			@account_name nvarchar(50), -- 로그인 ID
			@char_id nvarchar(25)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000)
			
			set @sql = ' select ' +
					   ' t1.char_id, t1.user_id, t1.account_name, t1.account_id, t1.class, t1.lev, t1.race, t1.gender, ' +
					   ' t1.history_date, t1.head_face_color, t1.head_hair_color, t1.head_eye_color, t1.head_lip_color, t1.head_face_type, t1.head_hair_type, t1.height_scale, t1.head_voice_type, t1.head_feat_type1, t1.head_feat_type2, ' +
					   ' t2.delete_complete_date, t2.org_server, t2.delete_date ' +
					   ' from user_customize_history t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) ' +
					   ' where t1.char_id = t2.char_id '
			
			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.user_id = N'''+@user_id+''' '
			END
			
			IF @char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.char_id = '''+@char_id+''' '
			END
			
			IF @account_name != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.account_name = '''+@account_name+''' '
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t1.history_date asc '
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchCharLogonStatus]
			@csv_char_ids	varchar(2000)
		AS
		BEGIN
			DECLARE	@query	varchar(4000)
			SET		@query = '
					SELECT	char_id,
							CASE WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time AND last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''on'' ELSE ''off'' END AS ''logonoff''
					FROM	user_data (nolock)

procedures.aion_SetUseCP:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetUseCP]
	@char_id			int,
	@category			tinyint,
	@enchant_object_id	int,
	@value				smallint,
	@accumulated_cp		smallint,
	@data_id			int
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_use_cp (UPDLOCK) WHERE char_id = @char_id AND category = @category AND enchant_object_id = @enchant_object_id) 
	BEGIN
	UPDATE user_use_cp
	SET value = @value,
		accumulated_cp = @accumulated_cp,
		data_id = @data_id
	WHERE char_id = @char_id AND category = @category AND enchant_object_id = @enchant_object_id
END
ELSE
	BEGIN
		INSERT user_use_cp
		VALUES (@char_id, @category, @enchant_object_id, @value, @accumulated_cp, @data_id)
	END
END
	
SET NOCOUNT OFF
procedures.aion_SetCharRankPoint_byRating_EndSeason:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_SetCharRankPoint_byRating_EndSeason]
	@rank_id int	
as 
begin
	set nocount on;
	
	INSERT INTO user_rank(char_id, rank_id, point)
		select char_id, @rank_id, CONVERT(int, mu) 
		from user_rate 
		where rate_id = @rank_id and update_cnt >=5 and char_id not in (select char_id from user_rank where rank_id = @rank_id)
		
		
	UPDATE user_rank 
	SET point = -2147483648 
	WHERE rank_id = @rank_id and char_id not in (select char_id from user_rate where rate_id = @rank_id)
	
	set nocount off;
end
procedures.aion_PutCharChangeLog:
/****** 개체: 저장 프로시저 dbo.aion_PutCharChangeLog    스크립트 날짜: 2006-02-20 오후 7:52:57 ******/

CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_PutCharChangeLog]
	@nCharId	int,
	@nType		int,
	@nOldValue	int,
	@nNewValue	int
as
set nocount on
declare @user_last_logintime datetime
declare @user_play_time int
declare @user_race tinyint
declare @user_class tinyint
declare @user_lev tinyint
select @user_race = race, @user_class = class, @user_lev = lev, @user_play_time = playtime, @user_last_logintime = last_login_time from user_data  WHERE char_id = @nCharId

declare @interval_time int
set @interval_time = (select top 1 playtime from user_change_log where char_id = @nCharId and change_type = @nType order by change_time desc)
if (@interval_time is null)
begin
	set @interval_time = 0
end

insert user_change_log (char_id, change_type, race, class, lev, old_value, new_value, change_time, playtime, intervaltime)
VALUES (@nCharId, @nType, @user_race, @user_class, @user_lev, @nOldValue, @nNewValue, GETDATE(), @user_play_time + datediff(minute,@user_last_logintime,GETDATE()), @user_play_time + datediff(minute,@user_last_logintime,GETDATE()) - @interval_time)

set nocount off
procedures.GM_UserMoveServiceLogDA_SrchGuildNameCha:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserMoveServiceLogDA_SrchGuildNameChange]
			@user_id nvarchar(30), 
			@char_id nvarchar(25),
			@account_name nvarchar(50),
			@guild_name nvarchar(40),
			@guild_id nvarchar(25)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1500)

			set @sql = ' select ' +
					   ' t1.change_date, t1.old_name, t1.new_name, t1.item_id, t1.tid, t1.guild_id, ' +
					   ' t1.master_id, t1.master_user_id, t1.master_account_name, t1.master_account_id, t1.class, t1.lev, t1.race, t1.gender, ' +
					   ' t2.delete_complete_date, t2.org_server, t2.delete_date ' +
					   ' from guild_name_change_log t1(nolock), user_data t2(nolock) ' +
					   ' where t1.master_id = t2.char_id '
			
			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.user_id = N'''+@user_id+''' '
			END
			
			IF @char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.char_id = '''+@char_id+''' '
			END
			
			IF @account_name != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.account_name = '''+@account_name+''' '
			END
			
			IF @guild_name != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t1.new_name = N'''+@guild_name+''' '
			END
			
			IF @guild_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t1.guild_id = '''+@guild_id+''' '
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t1.change_date asc '
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchMailList:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchMailList]
			@world_id nvarchar(5),			
			@builder nvarchar(5),			
			@char_on nvarchar(5),
			
			@from_char_id nvarchar(30),
			@to_char_id nvarchar(30),
			
			@from_lev nvarchar(30),
			@to_lev nvarchar(30),
			
			@from_create_date nvarchar(30),			
			@to_create_date nvarchar(30),
			
			@race nvarchar(5),
			@class_str nvarchar(200)
			
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @sql_etc nvarchar(1000)
			
			set @sql_etc = ' '
			
			IF @char_on = 'Y'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' '				
			END
			
			IF @from_char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and char_id between '''+@from_char_id+''' and '''+@to_char_id+''' '				
			END 
			
			IF @from_lev != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and lev between '''+@from_lev+''' and '''+@to_lev+''' '				
			END			

			IF @from_create_date != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and create_date between '''+@from_create_date+''' and '''+@to_create_date+''' '				
			END 
			
			IF @race != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and race = '''+@race+''''				
			END 
			
			IF @class_str != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and ('+@class_str+') '				
			END

						
			set @sql =' select lev, exp, account_id, char_id, user_id from user_data (nolock)' +
				        ' where delete_date=0 and org_server='''+@world_id+''' and builder='''+@builder+''' ' + @sql_etc
				       
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.aion_SetUserGuildJoinApplicationInfo:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetUserGuildJoinApplicationInfo]
	@nCharId			int,
	@nGuildId			int,
	@strApplicantIntro	nvarchar(32),
	@nApplyTime			int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	-- Update user_gp table
	IF EXISTS (SELECT char_id FROM user_guild_join_application WHERE char_id=@nCharId)
	BEGIN
		UPDATE user_guild_join_application 
		SET guild_id = @nGuildId,
			applicant_intro = @strApplicantIntro,
			apply_time = @nApplyTime
		WHERE char_id=@nCharId
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		-- table에 추가하는 경우는 guildId가 0이 아닌 경우.
		IF (@nGuildId <> 0)
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO user_guild_join_application (char_id, guild_id, applicant_intro, apply_time) VALUES (@nCharId, @nGuildId, @strApplicantIntro, @nApplyTime)
		END
	END
	
	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

				set @sql = @sql + ' and t2.account_name = '''+@account_name+''' '
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t1.change_date asc '	
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.GM_UserDataDA_SrchMoveCharByWorldorUserI:
CREATE proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchMoveCharByWorldorUserIDorAccountNMorCnt]
			@world_id nvarchar(5), 
			@user_id nvarchar(30), -- 캐릭터 명
			@account_name nvarchar(50), -- 로그인 ID
			@builder nvarchar(5),
			@deleted_char nvarchar(5),
			@char_on nvarchar(5),
			@deleted_move nvarchar(5),
			@bx_char_id nvarchar(25),			
			@multi_user_ids nvarchar(1000),			
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @sql_etc nvarchar(1000)
			
			set @sql_etc = ' '
			
			IF @account_name != 'null'
			BEGIN				
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and t1.account_name = '''+@account_name+''''				
			END		

			IF @bx_char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and char_id = '''+@bx_char_id+''''				
			END 
			
			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and user_id = N'''+@user_id+''''				
			END 
			
			IF @multi_user_ids != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and ('+@multi_user_ids+') '				
			END

			IF @builder IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				IF @builder = 95
					BEGIN
						set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and builder > ''0'' '
					END
				ELSE
					BEGIN					
						set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and builder = '''+@builder+''''								
					END				
			END
						
			set @sql =' select top ' + @view_count +
						' 	delete_type, delete_complete_date, inventory_growth, char_warehouse_growth, delete_date, b.char_id, user_id, account_id, account_name, org_server, cur_server,	' +
					   ' 	convert(nvarchar,create_date,20 ) create_date, convert(char, gender) gender, convert(char, race) race, convert(char, class) class, convert(char, lev) lev, convert(char, builder) builder, exp, world,	' +					   
					   '   case ' +
					   '     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
				       '     WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +					  
				       '     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
					   '   end as logonoff '+	
								'from'+
								'('+
								'	select t2.char_id from('+
								'	select c.account_name'+
								'	from('+
								'	select race, account_name from user_data (nolock)'+
								'	where delete_date=0 and org_server='''+@world_id+''' '+
								'	group by race, account_name) c'+
								'	group by c.account_name'+
								'	having count(*) > 1) t1, user_data t2(nolock)'+
								'	where t1.account_name=t2.account_name and delete_date=0 and org_server='''+@world_id+''' '+
								+ @sql_etc +
								') b, user_data f(nolock)'+
								'where b.char_id=f.char_id and f.char_id not in '+
								'('+
								'	select top ' + @top_count + ' t2.char_id from('+
								'	select c.account_name'+
								'	from('+
								'	select race, account_name from user_data (nolock)'+
								'	where delete_date=0 and org_server='''+@world_id+''' '+
								'	group by race, account_name) c'+
								'	group by c.account_name'+
								'	having count(*) > 1) t1, user_data t2(nolock)'+
								'	where t1.account_name=t2.account_name and delete_date=0 and org_server='''+@world_id+''' '+
								+ @sql_etc +
								')'
					
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.aion_dbreindex_all:
CREATE   proc [dbo].[aion_dbreindex_all]	
	@fillfactor	tinyint
as

DECLARE @Table VARCHAR(255) 
DECLARE @cmd NVARCHAR(500) 

BEGIN
   SET @cmd = 'DECLARE TableCursor CURSOR FOR select name from sys.all_objects where type_desc=''USER_TABLE'' and is_ms_shipped=0'
   EXEC (@cmd) 
   OPEN TableCursor  

   FETCH NEXT FROM TableCursor INTO @Table  
   WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
   BEGIN         
       SET @cmd = 'ALTER INDEX ALL ON ' + @Table + ' REBUILD WITH (FILLFACTOR = ' +
               CONVERT(VARCHAR(3),@fillfactor) + ')' 
               
       print @cmd + ' -- applied.'       
       EXEC (@cmd) 
       FETCH NEXT FROM TableCursor INTO @Table  
   END  

   CLOSE TableCursor  
   DEALLOCATE TableCursor   
END

	@animationId	smallint,
	@animationType	tinyint,

-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetCustomAnimation]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@charId			int,	
	@animationId	smallint,
	@animationType	tinyint,
	@commandType	tinyint
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	if @commandType = 4	-- CUSTOM_ANIM_USE
	Begin
		Update user_customAnimation Set useState=0 
			Where char_id=@charId and animation_type=@animationType
		Update user_customAnimation Set useState=1
				Where char_id=@charId and animation_id=@animationId
	end

	if @commandType = 6 -- CUSTOM_ANIM_EXPIRE
	Begin
		Update user_customAnimation Set useState=0, expire_time=0
				Where char_id=@charId and animation_id=@animationId
	end
END

procedures.aion_SetDeletedCharComplete:
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<thahn>
-- Create date: <2008/03/07>
-- Description:	<삭제 대기 시간이 지난 Character 정보 읽기>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_SetDeletedCharComplete] 
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
	@nCharId	int,
	@nDeleteCompleteTime	int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	UPDATE user_data 
	SET delete_complete_date = @nDeleteCompleteTime ,guild_id = 0,
		change_info_time = dbo.GetUnixtimeWithUTCAdjust(GetUTCDate(),0)
	WHERE char_id = @nCharId and delete_complete_date = 0 and delete_date != 0 and delete_date <= @nDeleteCompleteTime

	-- dual charge 처리
	declare @nAccId as int
	declare @userId as varchar(40)
	declare @nLevel as smallint
	declare @nMaxCharId as int
	declare @nMaxLevel as smallint
	
	if @@rowcount = 1
	Begin
		Select @nAccId=account_id, @userId=user_id, @nLevel=lev From user_data with(nolock) Where char_id=@nCharId;
		Select top(1) @nMaxCharId=char_id, @nMaxLevel=lev From user_data with(nolock) Where account_id=@nAccId and delete_complete_date=0 Order by lev desc
		select @userId, @nAccId, @nLevel,ISNULL(@nMaxCharId, 0), ISNULL(@nMaxLevel, 0)
	End
	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END
